[**June 1, 1789:** The first law passed by the U.S. Congress after the ratification of the Constitution was “An Act to regulate the Time and Manner of administering certain Oaths,” which President George Washington signed into law. The law established an oath of office for members of Congress and other government officials.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f90b9a0f461749709a98f10e87658c0e&_e=U9kIo_JcWgEsFbdUCPyuYFMSuukb7cHnvIN89ItMN2IP_zgB_a0FCdKzy4W8BUd6k9hi_yAVPhobKH-1vI_SRZRq9uH8fvQ-XDSZoilUSZy28_Q54ovruTa1OciYC2iNyHPyif-qPpxM6sZVLWmx5-bM74sAgAkb8Pe2LkeVoXJm-y757etWxg3tRYUIbv0JzLhQju9Dm2YjX0PkWKcPX3N_A9r-DEw2AD93P8kATRr_oSj03zx2RXyssriiCsiTNUElEHv4ln2h1S_PjkcZDA%3D%3D) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f90b9a0f461749709a98f10e87658c0e&_e=U9kIo_JcWgEsFbdUCPyuYFMSuukb7cHnvIN89ItMN2IP_zgB_a0FCdKzy4W8BUd6k9hi_yAVPhobKH-1vI_SRZRq9uH8fvQ-XDSZoilUSZy28_Q54ovruTa1OciYC2iNH_-t5boq2n1Ks814svpux5LfzBOd6wO3U2c7Dl-7wNLzXyQzAnTkzGR7i_DddaFvvV7MfkHuDfwjTB2LD2GhpIZzKrU49c-AJGm92TUWs66h70Udp6Kl5RpQAD1Fa8pPKyt5VHJ4LB9ElIZYyeufig%3D%3D)**

[**June 1, 1792:** Kentucky became the first state admitted to the Union west of the Appalachian Mountains. It had temporarily been considered a Virginia county but was eventually granted statehood. Many settlers arrived in the area by route of the Wilderness Road through the Cumberland Gap.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f90b9a0f461749709a98f10e87658c0e&_e=U9kIo_JcWgEsFbdUCPyuYFMSuukb7cHnvIN89ItMN2JFfRH-haztarTwX0A_0rbQd4q2Q8nm4fMPZY521v2y_lMpPHhptBDXPjV5-BSlAerbvgOW2-55ByffA1-R8cDhWu88xvigTJ3IfDzcPqxHWShaHM9xe6AlecKiuEEzbyR-A2gcqXClHcciZksBMt3OJl1rXrUTmMrWIWv_3G6_9LMhgISHF5gsZGHJNzYEW8g4RMoZXt96ldL1I3BVvxd5ODet1H1iDpTwYsdlkOSZEQ%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f90b9a0f461749709a98f10e87658c0e&_e=U9kIo_JcWgEsFbdUCPyuYFMSuukb7cHnvIN89ItMN2JFfRH-haztarTwX0A_0rbQd4q2Q8nm4fMPZY521v2y_lMpPHhptBDXPjV5-BSlAerbvgOW2-55ByffA1-R8cDh8xl1-VDlk2K1dwn63ZNTnKHAQymtTrknOYy4g3_2BaEwhSHgqVZUP5mYYzPTwpwHmpxs6g_FDrWODGhDmHWNQUr_TESzW8tSMKQnEk4-zXN7so_RojJHUyoDMC5gY144m6wq7_mNDlIHS-GWRqSxOQ%3D%3D)**

[**June 1, 1813:** During the War of 1812, Navy Captain James Lawrence was fatally wounded, and he uttered his final command, “Don’t give up the ship.” The phrase was cemented in history when his friend Commodore Oliver Hazard Perry had it sewn onto a flag which he flew above his ship in the ensuing maritime battle. The Navy has made this a rallying cry, song, and motto.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f90b9a0f461749709a98f10e87658c0e&_e=U9kIo_JcWgEsFbdUCPyuYFMSuukb7cHnvIN89ItMN2K6h4veQTncWGjjY_AB61yfVf5p8HvkL-AFmawXJFISBg6uIIeA_bU75GT_cVkaqNesagOxDoukvPw20_-B7m-bdGUaolxx1lLxlcRk0213SrSLNPmhUvj2WlLIgMOgHJGA7Lj6YfBODyCkvdGivdL8spYKCGjP2W-fWFmYqUeRy2N_7indn9TkELf7ltlwK7bgM2nPYtdmeJt4HT9_YOBt) **Source -[navyonline.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f90b9a0f461749709a98f10e87658c0e&_e=U9kIo_JcWgEsFbdUCPyuYFMSuukb7cHnvIN89ItMN2K6h4veQTncWGjjY_AB61yfVf5p8HvkL-AFmawXJFISBg6uIIeA_bU75GT_cVkaqNcjd41GhWenIoBL80M0-ZBYHfXfyhsVU8cNxA4206tKo32UfIA9nOZIr0VOVd6See7SwirOcROEls05K9ySFp6SCwXXgcU1Q8ow0OhUANuS6-tr__B2WQdEsObpULVSUHntmj8O2ysBKIQm8mneu7rA)**

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bec6c16eb383448d8fd9892e9a9a247c&_e=KLREGvW2mxqQeNl-dSQZuf4TubtlxDvK5jkafkKLIhJEbuD2kRbpY_NqN-rPcD8qUzt_jfWaGRn1Q9gdc39tcwZeuCcHPvxB6WMTpyS_EOMyfd36ATTyoA3zHAwucFfasBbdywZRKFDfqv3cgkghDv9SWzsgqLxVqzkQBVENnv3hZFiIhmBOqNQm0RyKoYw0Jza9QWi98qTxlpcRbJHASKieJ4tTStvgDJVG898Q1O1LmwQ3s-ULB6w-DlVIglRMbCzphKaNnpGPJ_Qu4CZchYdp-cFGw23nh0cGT98o9Va4DQOYaRbXtlCg4cV1DogL)
---
| | **I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.** The group calls itself the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” And their motto is “go forth and sin some more.” **The “sisters” are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored “nun” clothing with one purpose: ** _To mock Christians. _ Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible.
* A “condom savior mass”
* An annual “Jesus in drag” competition
* Pole dancing on a cross
* And much more.

_They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist._ **And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.”**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bec6c16eb383448d8fd9892e9a9a247c&_e=KLREGvW2mxqQeNl-dSQZuf4TubtlxDvK5jkafkKLIhJEbuD2kRbpY_NqN-rPcD8qUzt_jfWaGRn1Q9gdc39tcwZeuCcHPvxB6WMTpyS_EOMyfd36ATTyoA3zHAwucFfasBbdywZRKFDfqv3cgkghDppfTAEANkUSrL3V6VsvzAv-hhFbKtSRd_kubswaMcqiQaCsbSZ6e0nsMaUxJtmZs1woLHSYfVO_ePPV4UmXyQm22LqMWVzModGYWEiZ3GMo2VP9yLY9je8WcaArEraY_d_WyFhPBYEQ9okwqP5osoqqmX1lAwg3vzQH1PPMk6zc)
---
It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. _And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred._ ** ****That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message:**** ****Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences.**
---
[FLOOD THE AIRWAYS!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bec6c16eb383448d8fd9892e9a9a247c&_e=KLREGvW2mxqQeNl-dSQZuf4TubtlxDvK5jkafkKLIhJEbuD2kRbpY_NqN-rPcD8qUzt_jfWaGRn1Q9gdc39tcwZeuCcHPvxB6WMTpyS_EOMyfd36ATTyoA3zHAwucFfasBbdywZRKFDfqv3cgkghDvKanfbWuPYWhlBFiyl0Wh7u8dI6l3sXZUVXHSjQJsI9yNBqSo9Tbze_pcoW6mvVBdlwj-RoPo55qGhfSU7we8u2ptGN9aOxaH0sWSCDIW-_l7RdEhgm_CUCRVoiv2ORH3AgFdbRDH3nF-Fd5iWd63_rwgSQTxbMJS_yFBIpGpsx)
---
If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. _Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes._ The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. **But unfortunately****Patriot,****the story doesn’t end there.** As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. **Then, the Dodgers**** _re-invited_****the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.”** They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. _The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place._ It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. **_But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior._**
---
[DEFEND CHRIST!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bec6c16eb383448d8fd9892e9a9a247c&_e=KLREGvW2mxqQeNl-dSQZuf4TubtlxDvK5jkafkKLIhJEbuD2kRbpY_NqN-rPcD8qUzt_jfWaGRn1Q9gdc39tcwZeuCcHPvxB6WMTpyS_EOMyfd36ATTyoA3zHAwucFfasBbdywZRKFDfqv3cgkghDmzcs5y1ohpBjPjB8zMP3GkvBEjRrIUwu9xePZubaMZC_YrnWvELprIBJZrApfE-V0AnhswoKzfSCrs3CXawhTPd9R4j6VP5ry5SJ-kRj443duTElMCBWI7OK3V9K1BhJqMR9IkPHdYZHm4305d-4mDKuXRq1um-B6inu7PLmDFO)
---
As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, “Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don’t just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it.” He’s spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: **_Hate has a home at Dodger stadium._** **And it’s our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.** For God and for country, Brian BurchPresident, CatholicVote

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” [**Please click here to donate anything you can spare today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bec6c16eb383448d8fd9892e9a9a247c&_e=KLREGvW2mxqQeNl-dSQZuf4TubtlxDvK5jkafkKLIhJEbuD2kRbpY_NqN-rPcD8qUzt_jfWaGRn1Q9gdc39tcwZeuCcHPvxB6WMTpyS_EOMyfd36ATTyoA3zHAwucFfasBbdywZRKFDfqv3cgkghDlLcb4JCFaRnKaR4yU-YPoyMeKno0N5cbfg3LSRf11YPFsoy86IeDCXd_vZaj8libSCnoaQQjpO4YNS2n04Zo1hu_NcZ3RjVuA3kFQ7Af3My2w2RiKRpBVI4K2pm-mrxgd-dLT3USUyqo1JrneHowjKPbgEVNt9lW-Pa_C76tmGv) We didn’t have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.
---
| |
---

clean_body: | = | Impeached Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton just admitted that he suppressed votes from being counted in the 2020 election. → = You read that. Harris County, a highly Democratic area, was BLOCKED from sending mail-in ballots to over 2.4 MILLION voters. Remember: Donald Trump won Texas by just 631,000 votes. Paxton’s actions could have changed the trajectory of the election results and prevented Pres. Biden from winning. It’s clear: Republicans are hell-bent on suppressing Democratic votes so they can rig elections in their favor. And we must do everything we can to defeat them. = | = = = = = = Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. = | =

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: 46th Annual Dinner Featuring Rep. Burgess Owens & Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us at our upcoming 46th Annual Dinner - Get your tickets now!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Since launching this campaign just over 3 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a difference. This campaign is proving that building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them. That's why I've personally invested in this campaign. I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to revive our nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, | | | ---|---|--- | | This isn't just a political campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our purpose as citizens. As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline. I am not focused on the amount of your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the Washington elite. We are leading this race with actual solutions. I will do what the other GOP candidates appear afraid to even say. name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UkquuMacZJ2w9cji0cwHnQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7WokTrF%2bJnV02n%2b7DuM5xg&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668613%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7WokTrF%2bJnV02n%2b7DuM5xg&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6bc8tksjfi4j491odrr7vgk5q34g6omogkjr6fo_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg60p72cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvkoh6i76173mo9l28oad8fc7c2opi60uj82sm0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg60p72cph2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqk4fgu6t1bc4asa83uhn6vkl4keirefi96l34u0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg60p72cph2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

### MVP HAS NO PLACE IN DEBT CEILING DISCUSSION

Congress must throw out the provision in the debt-ceiling agreement which wrongfully green-lights the Mountain Valley Pipeline.
"We've been consistently against this project which is not needed in our region. As united Republicans, Democrats and many other landowners have said, "if you're going to be taking all of this private property for the wealth of a few...that's simply just not right."
---
| |
### CASA OF CENTRAL VA NEEDS VOLUNTEERS

CASA of central Virginia needs more volunteers to help advocate for children who are abused and neglected. These volunteers serve as a consistent presence in a child's life during a scary time.
If you are interested, the next volunteer information session is on June 6 and June 22.

### [Kellen Squire for HD-55 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RinO-nZVZYqxxDmfBgLIBeI-ZeBLsMAx4FsHAf1DRLGK4NzEihP6Zt6jK9_9m-0NtjyqxNMGnFvonm7y-nJLOWjZyqqAl1ZqdPhL-woSVV_89yOOsuATXvTD9k3I7Yn3Z3_fJXfvtearVd8PjLtaGA==&c=b9aek5zzl41yq9AN_TIpfKZTvAmW4B9Y4Gdq-9N0RobicrgJfdyxQg==&ch=G1IMhb668fdzCGbnQMVzDcK47kI3arX6-lBwjSn7vnpilziOsYFdUw==)

Kellen is a father, husband, and an ER nurse. As a nurse, he has seen people in their most dire times of need, crisis, and worry. He worked through the COVID-19 crisis and was on-duty in the emergency department during the Unite the Right attack. He has lived the hard lesson that it's his duty to provide compassionate, competent care for all people, regardless of who they are or where they came from. And he's seen firsthand the people out there who are vested in keeping the system broken, and work tirelessly to make sure progress is always just out of reach.
It's these recognitions that underpin his entire campaign, a people-powered, grassroots movement of everyday Virginians. The strength and commitment he derives from our people is what will see him through to Richmond.
It's why he will always listen- really listen and why he will always keep the promises he makes.

### Happy Pride Month!
---
This week marks the beginning of Pride Month 2023! It is time to celebrate and commemorate our LGBTQ+ community members and all of their contributions to our society.
The fight for equality is not over. We must both celebrate the progress we have made and continue the fight against intolerance and bigotry together.

---
Today is National Gun Violence Awareness Day, and we must unite and continue our calls to end gun violence. Today we wear orange to draw attention to our cause.
Don't forget to participate in #WearOrange today, National Gun Violence Awareness Day, and throughout the weekend.

---

### Roanoke Lebanese Festival - June 2-4
---
After a three-year hiatus, the popular Roanoke Lebanese Festival returns on June 2-4, 2023 at St. Elias Maronite Catholic Church, 4730 Cove Road, N.W., Roanoke, VA. The festival is open Friday and Saturday, 11 am - 9 pm, and Sunday, 11 am - 8 pm.
There will be delicious Lebanese food, music and traditional Lebanese folk dancers in full costume. Admission and parking are free.

### 65th Annual Sidewalk Art Show - June 3-4
---
From paintings to sculptures and from photography to jewelry, the Taubman Museum of Art is pleased to present one of Virginia's oldest and most anticipated outdoor art shows.
Hosted on the streets immediately surrounding the Museum, this annual event is not one you want to miss.
The 65th Annual Sidewalk Art Show is free and open to the public June 3-4 from 10 am-5 pm daily.

The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. "We've been consistently against this project which is not needed in our region. As united Republicans, Democrats and many other landowners have said, "if you're going to be taking all of this private property for the wealth of a few...that's simply just not right." | | CASA OF CENTRAL VA NEEDS VOLUNTEERS CASA of central Virginia needs more volunteers to help advocate for children who are abused and neglected. These volunteers serve as a consistent presence in a child's life during a scary time. If you are interested, the next volunteer information session is on June 6 and June 22. | == | == | | | | | == Canvass for Lily Franklin! This Sunday, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event! Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. Please download the MiniVAN app before you arrive. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Eleanor at Eleanor@LilyForDelegate.com or call 540-257-6797. South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018 | | | CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT | | | | == | == | == Kellen is a father, husband, and an ER nurse. As a nurse, he has seen people in their most dire times of need, crisis, and worry. He worked through the COVID-19 crisis and was on-duty in the emergency department during the Unite the Right attack. He has lived the hard lesson that it's his duty to provide compassionate, competent care for all people, regardless of who they are or where they came from. And he's seen firsthand the people out there who are vested in keeping the system broken, and work tirelessly to make sure progress is always just out of reach. It's these recognitions that underpin his entire campaign, a people-powered, grassroots movement of everyday Virginians. The strength and commitment he derives from our people is what will see him through to Richmond. It's why he will always listen- really listen and why he will always keep the promises he makes. | | | IN THE COMMUNITY | | | == Happy Pride Month! This week marks the beginning of Pride Month 2023! name: Tim Scott
subject: Whoopi Goldberg
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I knew it wouldn’t take long. The Democrats were right on cue...

| |
---
| | |

I knew it wouldn't take long. The Democrats were right on cue...

Just a few hours after I officially announced that I was running for President of the United States, I was already under attack.

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z31l79esgovroos85ud6227fi057dln11dsq8368_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "Whoopi Goldberg suggests Tim Scott has 'Clarence Thomas syndrome,' accuses him of using racial 'dog whistle'")
---

Democrats will do everything they can to undermine me, my experience, and my story because I'm a THREAT to their narrative. They're more interested in cheap shots and scoring political points than progress. They're more invested in inciting anger and hatred to ensure they win the next election.

**That 's why I need your help. This isn't the first and won't be the last time the Left attacks me for daring to speak out against them. I won't stop fighting, but it's an uphill battle I can't - _and won 't_ - win alone.**

**_[If you're able, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to show we won't take this lying down?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2b0obg4q275o7rqih35eh2k0qggkqp1pnpq4lr8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "If you’re able, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to show we won’t take this lying down?")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN NOW](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdocd3ltgomi4t8ej5hg9g5shttju2imuhpp4buo_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---

They can keep calling me names, but I will never fall in line. We will always fight back.

God Bless,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z72dn19hakc4ohep9gbdqc2c2hinp7o50f167hm0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zucbg9qqmj5jdqgiksbaq6irc9t1geaamdrd5fo0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsioi5ed59o3llsgeea0a7a4l6f7f26elfltusj8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z98a4o3bsu2tel8n16ol5bf6ftl3ugkkffcsmcv0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrjct82lhmhtrprgdaftsktcs95ul45dcsvh9qqo_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

[Privacy Policy](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6skpa8mks4v8fh59uf4om94gk0o1pim77pdb320_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cph2bs)

body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6qd2h8qfcm36uvk8u6d23i6861nq3s7jg440nrg_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9676v3q79eg530n2hlhnpf148210m03o7tqimgo_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1i0jo2dnsodks5doce911jfc39011au1pd4jb08_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zck0mp275g4e1tjc2na1vsbtm4h2g5bn0j6uamu8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zde7h718iil2pfka20p2r5f6tqtifrlqo6glfa9o_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zphdhstr1eqkn2dltj0okv2d742acfjpj2o3u4k0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2rq8r1370e8qlt9g4moalfemf7f8tar2ruav7vg_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctg6cor2cjh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Kevin McCarthy announced this week on Fox News his intention to launch a commission to directly assault our Social Security & Medicare, with the intent to cut both.
body:
Social Security AND Medicare at risk
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T827bc7f1-5b47-4bbb-ac0e-e10e483ce588/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Kevin McCarthy announced on Fox News his intention to launch a commission to directly assault our Social Security & Medicare, with the intent to cut both****. ** _We warned you that the MAGA Republican Freedom Caucus wanted to blow up the debt ceiling and pay for it by stealing our Social Security. Now even though the debt ceiling bill has passed, Kevin McCarthy is still going to come after Social Security and Medicare._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2adfd119-d0e4-4bc0-ae70-f5d7610cf458/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_This is not a drill! _** [**_Can you please join us in rushing Social Security Works $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight McCarthy's Social Security & Medicare ambush? The time to stop him is now, we may not get a chance later._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9322a938-c173-4550-ad91-2281c99d8828/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a63047a-a510-43f9-baee-23225797a679/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: I need your help TOMORROW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
| | |
---
| | Hi there- Things are really ramping up in my campaign, and that only means one thing: more opportunities to join the team and volunteer! This weekend, I’m hitting the ground running with some good old fashioned door-knocking, and I would love for you to join me! My goal is to knock on as many doors as possible to talk about my campaign, share what I’ve accomplished so far in Richmond, and listen to the needs and concerns of voters in my district. It’s a lot, but that’s why I could really use your help. Here are the details:
---
---
**Who:** You! (and me)**What:** Door knocking**When:** 10:00AM on Saturday, June 3rd**Where:** Our New Office! 468 Investors Place Suite 202 **Why:** To spread the word about my re-election campaign! If you have time to join us this weekend, I’d love to see you there! If you have any questions, feel free to email my campaign manager, Abby at [abby@karengreenhalgh.com](mailto:abby@karengreenhalgh.com) See you there!
---
---
|
---
| |
---
| **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh****House of Delegates, 85th District** 1-757-598-1733 District Office1-804-698-1185; Room E425 Pocahontas Building [karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/4073adb8fe530624/73e1b6cf4409d0bbc3d6b838967d376c/37923)

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48fe7b8b3879484aa409b29f4a936868&_e=ejQn4zSUSgEeYschUTDXp3TGi75MVZfQHJguDABg8dp4bCQ4o4pwUwqVl7C-3NPtqDwYuEgGdK_4Ud2FO_JuNutfEBYFPWJEY9XBQO_-etFQsCfBjhYV8huTv2xn9Q6wVw1WL9h9M4SulgbzojuCGvoz27mWZDKGqN1kLlgOO18ceMpZWpMZ7Gc-0Rblh4eqcnV50nAmx9wrQ4Jsq8V6BEmlEdACNqgrr3Chizn3avk73NAAxGg2G97b1w7wy3OzFvQrBTczRDZQ6HuYJayF6XQLg3oP9-ggEsB70NSQlMcqmV3J4bnDN5TB7bNLQowo)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48fe7b8b3879484aa409b29f4a936868&_e=ejQn4zSUSgEeYschUTDXp3TGi75MVZfQHJguDABg8dp4bCQ4o4pwUwqVl7C-3NPtqDwYuEgGdK_4Ud2FO_JuNutfEBYFPWJEY9XBQO_-etFQsCfBjhYV8huTv2xn9Q6wVw1WL9h9M4SulgbzojuCGrIjXIwwq5PG07Ik2KB9_F9GHJvs5IGIdiCeyG1oCzYBZmN4X5TBv_6Pd3z9xVpO_e6k5QTUFOoeVt8FYEqYFB1483rl-mVyda_47iQUTgSi54u3UXyrKKRCN53heSawpfHZWjW4Fbb59hfeE--tfpB7MB15YMsGyvyhrRhPWac2)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48fe7b8b3879484aa409b29f4a936868&_e=ejQn4zSUSgEeYschUTDXp3TGi75MVZfQHJguDABg8dp4bCQ4o4pwUwqVl7C-3NPtqDwYuEgGdK_4Ud2FO_JuNutfEBYFPWJEY9XBQO_-etFQsCfBjhYV8huTv2xn9Q6wVw1WL9h9M4SulgbzojuCGspNOD9drWgzi99FT6JbdJfVke5y1_s9OxA3C4JX3kNOD6sG2O-MaaOwDOOsL7DL6xn2yleP4aEoYBvEOJ-fCVFZfEw6WHzhpPGVh-cPtKOAYjZXgm6OOXwsloZOgmTEujwFRveXFX7IBcM2xvaWdrmapeZDEUFOjtU5Qhq1YMOm)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48fe7b8b3879484aa409b29f4a936868&_e=ejQn4zSUSgEeYschUTDXp3TGi75MVZfQHJguDABg8dp4bCQ4o4pwUwqVl7C-3NPtqDwYuEgGdK_4Ud2FO_JuNutfEBYFPWJEY9XBQO_-etFQsCfBjhYV8huTv2xn9Q6wVw1WL9h9M4SulgbzojuCGu6p6lfvl2HieQlyVD2sFHdL86ZjwMyUu_ErI4HOT5J_0oEUlKRrmT9yDqUcidy3Ohkm2yEhdni2NYkIHSRF-0AKJkQYkSZnoSLJmdc22OsfY7bQhriNPddzE8XCGk6wrBFK7tDYnYLj3dUELV5KzgmnJqEdrC1ZNYoPLebKXTG4)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=48fe7b8b3879484aa409b29f4a936868&_e=ejQn4zSUSgEeYschUTDXp3TGi75MVZfQHJguDABg8dp4bCQ4o4pwUwqVl7C-3NPtqDwYuEgGdK_4Ud2FO_JuNutfEBYFPWJEY9XBQO_-etFQsCfBjhYV8huTv2xn9Q6wVw1WL9h9M4SulgbzojuCGncEng4e8r6XqN4yFN8Ft_c2W4TaHanjS_-WYHtUNH5INhutNf8EjY3qCQQ1OVXZods-Zrr3JHmqfKumHJaBGZkADmi7ipZg9OFr8GYNO953dE5b5LzRyxdLU0WtZHM3HU8M5d_r-ub1SUdlWw3ESa60V7MHGSTxBEeXF-TYwO6a)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f48e6a5530354d5b8345274452c912e0&_e=nE52Y088U8JjDqeO11DOETuLO5vo7HaZbCNvag-9LMKeVBQcziMjgAHw2ACCg5KevsHv9Td--DNa53hK4Bji2qAO6Z_jv1qeVZIwRfIcsJh3yREXbveBRfcG4YEau-hIdJifXKe1GgaccbKwYI6kiIUGIep9NIEosAE1OII2_mTEwv1z4rsB-GH6kDMx_5kUpAdVLel-PewpP74i7r27kCQXQqFAEQbPxDCUGceUPEltQudQDn1CI_-O3uTx1ybIyGJj0tSmXiJuC-cb2HCXTjg3UBqOqnbTb7A4yM1f5Y6UwaLHp-bOIMGpukRaW5Ye1rsJ2RI3rbsAIiazFgYqQMnzmkyGSmOrhn1r7Hctt-bYSooVJ3wq0V0dXvUXF8q91f7LIXQ3SvaA1NBsZsoIRw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f48e6a5530354d5b8345274452c912e0&_e=nE52Y088U8JjDqeO11DOETuLO5vo7HaZbCNvag-9LMKeVBQcziMjgAHw2ACCg5KevsHv9Td--DNa53hK4Bji2qAO6Z_jv1qeVZIwRfIcsJh3yREXbveBRfcG4YEau-hIdJifXKe1GgaccbKwYI6kiIUGIep9NIEosAE1OII2_mTEwv1z4rsB-GH6kDMx_5kUpAdVLel-PewpP74i7r27kCQXQqFAEQbPxDCUGceUPEltQudQDn1CI_-O3uTx1ybINBmMnf-B-3vg4jZL3iJk579g0MtdDfEIRsieh4HvA6s89ax0pGKHJD04nUFa8lCZV1c6Drgd5ktTu_gar5PZMWR6ZDSi9t_lXWsIsbRFKYcsNKMkcqTE89P90R--fBCpq1T630OAiyWytjh_LWHA3Q%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f48e6a5530354d5b8345274452c912e0&_e=nE52Y088U8JjDqeO11DOETuLO5vo7HaZbCNvag-9LMKeVBQcziMjgAHw2ACCg5KevsHv9Td--DNa53hK4Bji2qAO6Z_jv1qeVZIwRfIcsJh3yREXbveBRfcG4YEau-hIdJifXKe1GgaccbKwYI6kiIUGIep9NIEosAE1OII2_mTEwv1z4rsB-GH6kDMx_5kUpAdVLel-PewpP74i7r27kCQXQqFAEQbPxDCUGceUPEltQudQDn1CI_-O3uTx1ybIRbUTYtGNqSkbhOYuINv_yhE1UA-bZSzDC7vDUI_uQVfJbF23dn5d3ydp0PCu2BUm_k4TdCFi4Rtmg9UEk2KWtfD8dQhQJh3h1mkcRHDHJ6I4pwpCQCxHQHDRPDOouEKd9qrU_ILKokTBaUsNS3ObrQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Read/Act News
subject: C.S. Lewis is now available on DVD
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews._fc0LUNA)Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty-like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author-C.S. Lewis.In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://trk.readactnews.)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.readactnews.)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings.[](http://trk.readactnews.)We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://trk.readactnews._He9jm9JRrNw)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last:[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://trk.readactnews.-V8OWFP6xgg) Warm regards, Bill GrayClass of 2001Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College

# Friday, June 2, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Here’s a little-known fact to begin your day: Today marks the 158th anniversary of the actual end of the Civil War, when the last Confederate army surrendered to the Union in Galveston, Texas. In today's edition, we’re covering Elon Musk regaining his title as the world’s richest man, Steve Garvey weighing a run for U.S. Senate, and the list of 10 Most Trusted Universities in America. Have thoughts on what we can do better? [Please send us a note and fill us in.](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQgOGnsbdGZ59zSQZvqFtZGSP3fG4POTUKJoi3R2Kl6y_9w_d2WS9Jqz5ur2mT2EtbE3c9ZAU6gT95XL3NsYh4QSvR0TxOQEho77FcJyaBybkrzcsYFl4SsBsRlyKM2Wr04BEIvAOH6AYkKKMEAGGeQ8kmgGTtbR_emz76XUr9aYfsA7fN1vg_Gn82eP7qm8GXAHaP-eNba9VPmkyA25a0_r39OeU3AAD__-ckSg4) and make sure you don't miss our next edition. ## Senate Slams Student Loan Forgiveness
Senate Republicans, joined by a handful of Democrats, [voted to kill](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL8GNqPjbAwZPHRhS9eOyMHncK1jR_EF2r-v0rnz05Oe3sd5OXtOnK_v_kZOYln8KrzTAlYBKtQLtsFFIiTdkuvtNIxgtdXt5lAP0ylc4hR8BGNHPa4AAWM_9CckbVp2CKjBAvbQa9132kIcyADQuk4mhsYABZby6D4LZ9kopp-y06Nby61NbhO510a_NTg3OB_H0cXynemoL97gfC-Jhdfa4FwpeyG1F6GqvjglZQDUhVPiklWVZ6AsKhWf1eZzKE9RkaNs6sKBstpJSvtw4X68jGrHxsD15jn9lcj_Y34DAAD___pSZnE) President Biden's $400 billion student loan handout--a vote Biden promised to veto. It will be his fifth veto since taking office. There aren't enough votes to override the veto, but legal experts say [it won't matter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOozAQBp_GdIvM2jFJQZGGLtdeiYxZhz0ZG-El6N7-lKv_6vukaUbz-zW9PCfO719-o0FimXwQ_tCkHWgENBM2yxCJkExDQ-fut14740yzDtH3FmeMvb-FiMHdbejs7B6dQ_d4OGp4QI1GO42d7ozpWuN0vJHVmkK427goq2lhKUf7p3CWlWL6Wz50tKFsTRpWkb0q81Q4Khyv62q3mr9M4UgZzqpwzHR9Zy-JhcP3VspeCA7ayacKMy-UoUKVc6EssNAscFBiiiBEnN9w7nCtLARrOSvBh6QoHP0Bz2cXtI22OYZlvzglrq5XVr83z-m_pPzc7F8AAAD__yARbsM) in the long run. The student loan plan is specifically killed in the debt-ceiling relief bill just passed by the House. Also, the [Supreme Court](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhSAUQL8GN8zloujC0MXtde1oEC4-WgQDVNO_b17nbic5y8n5eKwPE2JI-7s5SDefV2NbuGgFxQE5yhU7pz0RkuxICzWPEyipZPfUsJGxdnYEgkYxO-OFwcmNypKwYlJd0AgoQQEKEFKKXirwIw0AZO08eMcGIBdaLv1nDqk9yceffFHpbT66qJ-tnZXJN4YLw-W-7z5tNtFdX57hcuYYWrCV4WJz2gvVF1ZKphG_ciO-xWy_-BYcpcpr-3aUGne0NV4oBvL8LHkv5uDFJjNPiLIr2p13iDFUNbEB9sOE-NfT_t_zGwAA__9vk2k8) is still weighing two challenges to the forgiveness program, and a decision on those cases should come out this month.
## Elon Musk Is the Richest Man on Earth, Again
Elon Musk has regained his title as the [world's richest man](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FurDAQQNGvsTuj8YzXsIWL19Dta1MiB48XRwavYLSIv4-SOvUtrs7HY3rEUsv2_B9XDpLbFGcpb57AG0CDNKFOITMjk-Zg_XDrwZMnvQQ_e2Iboc8x5eHzZnOyONyHHhMD2bsuAQEJPKAFS2Q78pBv7AB4ngeXk3LAqUjbu69WNlk416u9ee_mtuoaFpHXoeifwlHhuPF5dFdcWvvJCkeubTOp8bGJkZNZDJoUr8NYhw7Aub5bZK16D-l1llrL4Xvl4LnGUn8P8jf4OwAA__-ktFYD) with a net worth of $192 billion, according to the latest Bloomberg ranking of billionaires. Musk lost ground with his $44 billion purchase of Twitter, which has reportedly lost two-thirds of its value. But most of his wealth is in Tesla stock, and [those shares](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1vgzAUAH-N2YzMszFk8JAFdUnXZkPGfoTX-iPCTlD-fZXOXe-W031d5oulQOn2aSOauubZukpPnIXmAjjIGRpvVkRA2aDp9NgPQkstm80Mqrd-WfrTCKNDPXhUJ-vU0gGiOAE0ZECAFFpAJzopu1ZqsfaohEDnRrV6pgR6qnlvvzOluuEaXvmJe-tybILZar0XJs8MJgbTcRxtLOntGEyY-KMwmGJO-GIwuRzvNhG-GYaceHyUH06F5-SQ25ulxOuG_Mh78LzwndyGpfJoE4PJ7vx87pbr9aNrduPvB4VARQ9MiVu0FP6C6v9_fgMAAP__pplnRQ) are up 65% year to date. The [second richest person](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljnOwzuwNDFW7p2tMAcNhU2EUax-vdVOmd9enrS-77Pd5dyOtYvt7NtscxuaenJM-gb4A1pRhlsZEYmybbX42BAkya52TEq8CaypkBm0QObqEIcjPcfwXkPMlkEJNCAPfREfUca4sAKgJdlVDEIBRxSK7X7KeloG8f8W55cu6XsMtuttccp6FPgJHC6rqvzuZTdc11fhsDJp5xTOVyqfAqcZLXhcb3YqY1QsO4u5f9Ye__2FwAA__-HmlDQ) in the ranking is LVMH CEO Bernard Arnault, at $187 billion, followed by Jeff Bezos, CEO of Amazon, at $144 billion.
## Hall-of-Famer Mulls Senate Bid
L.A. Dodger baseball legend [Steve Garvey](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGP4yAUhH-N3RE9gxdnCxdp3O21V0bPMJB3IhABibX360-5eqsZaab49P3-un6xJMnxF9-x9lCu7Lq8cCWrSCttrnr0awA0zIh1suePhayxZrytfAZZmo2fP5fP4IjZLBaOl0UbggmjrJq0IUt6osmY6WQshQ_MRHDuPAc_zAQvvdTTnyK53xDSd3mhnly5j2m99f5og7kMehv0dhzH6d7yexv0hqyebdBbxvGOR0nSxb3rzg07p6QSIrJXreMFFbm-8K1cyU08quSonk01ZO5Qu3glWTlOEkrNwgoZNcrf921HAscnKryK5THojau6XCZHO2Osq38ckpI0uwwzxTtL-o_ff7b5LwAA__-eTXlr) says he's considering running for the U.S. Senate in California as a Republican. Garvey is already meeting with voters, fundraisers, and senior GOP officials as he weighs a decision. If he runs, his "Mr. Clean" superstar status could energize the GOP in a state dominated by Democrats. It's been 35 years since a Republican won a U.S. Senate race in California. Garvey, 74, had a Hall-of-Fame [18-year career in baseball](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGP4yAQBeBfgzus8eBgNxTXuMu1V1oYxmROBCIgtrK_fuWtt3nVp6en9---3i1HTuGvfZJpe16ta3zQCloCSlQrdt7sREiqIzPo-TaBVlp1D0Nu9n5D2NBqmNykJ_Az4c3qydMw-I4NAirQgAMMSg290rDfaAQg5-Zx92IE8txy6f9nTu1Be_zkg0rv8rOL5tHaqwr1R-AicDnPs_eW4yfRWS8hcLn6BS6grxgELputtNkYZaRAycva6CAZbDnoI11OlT0VTkG-q6yUbCO5sZecpLOR91wSW0mJSuCvi20UyYY3FfIy5JfApSvGv06OkauexAjhaTn-DG6___cdAAD__2bfc1o) and was voted National League MVP in 1974. He would be running for the seat now held by retiring Senator Diane Feinstein.
➤ **The Pentagon** canceled a drag show scheduled for this month at Nellis Air Force Base in Nevada. The show has taken place in June for the last two years, but the Defense Department now says no government funds can be used for drag shows on military bases. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O4yAURp8Gd1iXn-C4oNjGXbbd0iJwse8OBsugoLz9KFNP81WfdI7Ov8f6cJQob3_dgbbFsjrf6IUrGA6SS7XKIdiIKFENaIW53yYwyqhht0Ebre_OoJjjEybQRoDzIoRwizN4HMhKkAoMSAFCKTEqA_GGGgC9v-sYmAYM1Mo1_i-U244xvcsLr9GXY0h2b-2sTP1hcmFy6b2PZ0nUyJfPgcklY69MLh8KkwuYzwgmlxNzc1vJ3F_Of1UeSs-8ZB4ut_G6l165a_ygRM1db_50FSsHgHmelBkuG85OKVE1E9OwHY7Sj1H7PdB3AAAA__8n92W8)) ➤ **ABC News** suspended its on-air relationship with Chris Christie now that the former N.J. governor has announced plans to run for President. Christie joined ABC News as a contributor in 2018 but has been absent from their air for the past two weeks. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUxfGngY3o8mHihaGLt3TtaBG4hFthsAxJ2revUqlb5590dPT_uKwXT4Xq7d1v6EZqqw-DHriCFaCE0qvi0SVEhZqjk3aezmC11Tw7OU0QQZuztdaEeQJvg7Qo52hTusqJk1OgNFhQEqTW8qQtpAkNAIYwmxSZAYw02nH6bFRHxlS-2wOPU2gbLy6PsXem35hamFpGxkylvIypJbcNKz47U0vw2-7pVplaDGgAPQt_DeKlot_7jjV2cWDxg1rtmXbxpJFFyAf1QSh8Rh9FSwK_dgwDo_hbFMXfa8hMLfxwcX9SKdTtmRm4bZ5-r_Dxf7WfAAAA__91hW-b)) ➤ **Republican** Rep. Chris Stewart has announced he'll resign from the House as soon as possible, shrinking the already-slim GOP majority down to just four votes. The Utah congressman is expected to be replaced by another Republican, but not for months. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSpCAQgOGn0QyrbRDnAoJLzObSCy3ERnoWxQJm3Hn7rd144z_56_t_n--WIx_bP7uTqT7N1lV-0QxaAAqUM7ar8URIsiXT69swgpZatsEMi1oH6z2SW5WHxeOoNC7Wj4jqzzK0bBBQggbsoZey76QGP5ACIOduyq-NAlq5ptw9Eh81kI_v9KLcubS30YRaz9LIvw1ODU7XdXU-fR50le_e4HSmyJVdaXB6VhtEplO4kLmIUumyuYpMhbdDhPQsJErIfHzwsYktnWK3j5S5vtts1vPiGLnosVGw7Zbjz0D93eMrAAD__4GlZP4)) ➤ **Oregon** Republicans have begun their fifth straight week of boycotting state Senate sessions to block the Democrat majority from passing abortion and transgender bills. GOP leaders say they intend to stay out until the session ends or the bills are killed. It will be his fifth veto since taking office. Senate Republicans, joined by a handful of Democrats, voted to kill President Biden’s $400 billion student loan handout—a vote Biden promised to veto. It will be his fifth veto since taking office. | | | | | | Friday, June 2, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Here’s a little-known fact to begin your day: Today marks the 158th anniversary of the actual end of the Civil War, when the last Confederate army surrendered to the Union in Galveston, Texas. In today's edition, we’re covering Elon Musk regaining his title as the world’s richest man, Steve Garvey weighing a run for U.S. Senate, and the list of 10 Most Trusted Universities in America. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, . | Senate Slams Student Loan Forgiveness Senate Republicans, joined by a handful of Democrats, President Biden's $400 billion student loan handout--a vote Biden promised to veto. It will be his fifth veto since taking office. There aren't enough votes to override the veto, but legal experts say in the long run. The student loan plan is specifically killed in the debt-ceiling relief bill just passed by the House. Also, the is still weighing two challenges to the forgiveness program, and a decision on those cases should come out this month. Elon Musk Is the Richest Man on Earth, Again Elon Musk has regained his title as the with a net worth of $192 billion, according to the latest Bloomberg ranking of billionaires. Musk lost ground with his $44 billion purchase of Twitter, which has reportedly lost two-thirds of its value. But most of his wealth is in Tesla stock, and are up 65% year to date. The in the ranking is LVMH CEO Bernard Arnault, at $187 billion, followed by Jeff Bezos, CEO of Amazon, at $144 billion. Hall-of-Famer Mulls Senate Bid L.A. Dodger baseball legend says he's considering running for the U.S. Senate in California as a Republican. Garvey is already meeting with voters, fundraisers, and senior GOP officials as he weighs a decision. If he runs, his "Mr. Clean" superstar status could energize the GOP in a state dominated by Democrats. It's been 35 years since a Republican won a U.S. Senate race in California. Garvey, 74, had a Hall-of-Fame and was voted National League MVP in 1974. He would be running for the seat now held by retiring Senator Diane Feinstein. ➤ The Pentagon canceled a drag show scheduled for this month at Nellis Air Force Base in Nevada. The show has taken place in June for the last two years, but the Defense Department now says no government funds can be used for drag shows on military bases. () ➤ ABC News suspended its on-air relationship with Chris Christie now that the former N.J. governor has announced plans to run for President. Christie joined ABC News as a contributor in 2018 but has been absent from their air for the past two weeks. () ➤ Republican Rep. Chris Stewart has announced he'll resign from the House as soon as possible, shrinking the already-slim GOP majority down to just four votes. The Utah congressman is expected to be replaced by another Republican, but not for months. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Wild bees dying. A crumbling food system. Toxic pesticides.
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend, ** | **Stand up to corporate greed and save our bees from the brink of extinction. Bees and our planet need you -- donate $27 today! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801622?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801623?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801624?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801625?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Imagine a world with a crumbling food system. One where some of your favorite fresh fruits and vegetables are extremely expensive or virtually impossible to find. Where you never see wild bees in your backyard garden. **We are getting far too close to this reality.** And despite the risks to pollinators, companies like Bayer-Monsanto continue their RECKLESS production of massive amounts of BEE-TOXIC pesticides. **[But with your immediate gift of $27 or more to Friends of the Earth, you can help save bees, our food system, and our planet and help us reach our $4,700 goal before it’s too late!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801626?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
One in three bites of the food we eat is at stake. Vulnerable ecosystems are at stake. The health of our families and communities is at stake. Yet Big Ag corporations like Bayer-Monsanto continue to disregard these facts. Instead, they continue to profit from **toxic pesticides linked to the decline of wild bees and other pollinators on the brink of extinction.**
Friend, your gift of $27 or more now could help turn around the _**“insect apocalypse.”**_ We can’t wait a moment longer when our bees are dying -- and scientists are warning of a potential _**“catastrophic collapse of nature’s ecosystems.” **_
**We have no time left to lose to save our bees and protect our planet. Donate $27 to Friends of the Earth today! **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801622?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801623?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801624?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801625?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
In the last two decades, western bumblebee populations have declined by 93% -- and **within just one human generation, the odds for bumblebee survival have dropped by a third.** U.S. beekeepers lost a staggering 45.5% of their managed honeybee colonies from April 2020 to April 2021 -- among the highest losses ever recorded. Every day, bees are dying at devastating rates while working to pollinate $50 billion worth of crops in the U.S.
But the threats to bees are present at every turn. When exposed to toxic neonics like those Bayer-Monsanto sells, bees’ ability to forage, navigate, and reproduce is severely affected. These toxic pesticides can also kill bees directly.
Big Ag’s continued production of toxic pesticides threatens not only bees but our health as well. Many commonly used **pesticides have been linked to cancer, reproductive harm, and learning disabilities** , yet they continue to be sold and used on millions of acres across the U.S.
We can shift the market to bee and people-safe alternatives by putting pressure on key companies. We are demanding that garden retailers like Home Depot and Lowe’s stop selling toxic pesticides and that grocers like Kroger stop selling food produced with bee-killing pesticides. Friends of the Earth is also working with legislators at the state and national levels to ban bee-killing pesticides -- a bold but necessary step towards a healthy future for bees, people, and the planet.
**Help hold corporations accountable for harming bees, our health, and our planet with toxic pesticides. Donate $27 today and help us reach our $4,700 goal before midnight TONIGHT. **
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1801622?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

---

Big Ag corporations like Bayer-Monsanto have fought our efforts to save bees and other pollinators from their toxic products at every turn. We are not giving up -- not by a long shot -- and we are only able to continue our fight because we know you and other members are with us. But if we are going to get bee-killing pesticides out of our food system, we need your donation today.
With **over 700 North American bee species currently at risk,** wild bees are becoming a rarer sight every day. Bees are showing us that the massive use of toxic pesticides in our food system is not sustainable for our future, and we are working to amplify this message and fight against corporate greed.
Your membership gift today can help ensure a brighter tomorrow for bees, for all of us, and for our only Earth. We cannot rest until this threat to people, pollinators, and the planet is stopped! Will you join us, Friend?
**Vulnerable bees are barely hanging on, encountering toxic pesticides at every turn. Help us fight for a sustainable future for bees and our planet by making your urgent $27 donation to Friends of the Earth.**

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | Stand up to corporate greed and save our bees from the brink of extinction. Bees and our planet need you -- donate $27 today! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == Imagine a world with a crumbling food system. One where some of your favorite fresh fruits and vegetables are extremely expensive or virtually impossible to find. Where you never see wild bees in your backyard garden. We are getting far too close to this reality. And despite the risks to pollinators, companies like Bayer-Monsanto continue their RECKLESS production of massive amounts of BEE-TOXIC pesticides. == One in three bites of the food we eat is at stake. Vulnerable ecosystems are at stake. The health of our families and communities is at stake. Yet Big Ag corporations like Bayer-Monsanto continue to disregard these facts. Instead, they continue to profit from toxic pesticides linked to the decline of wild bees and other pollinators on the brink of extinction. Friend, your gift of $27 or more now could help turn around the “insect apocalypse.” We can’t wait a moment longer when our bees are dying -- and scientists are warning of a potential “catastrophic collapse of nature’s ecosystems.” We have no time left to lose to save our bees and protect our planet. Donate $27 to Friends of the Earth today! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == In the last two decades, western bumblebee populations have declined by 93% -- and within just one human generation, the odds for bumblebee survival have dropped by a third. U.S. beekeepers lost a staggering 45.5% of their managed honeybee colonies from April 2020 to April 2021 -- among the highest losses ever recorded. Every day, bees are dying at devastating rates while working to pollinate $50 billion worth of crops in the U.S. But the threats to bees are present at every turn. When exposed to toxic neonics like those Bayer-Monsanto sells, bees’ ability to forage, navigate, and reproduce is severely affected. These toxic pesticides can also kill bees directly. Big Ag’s continued production of toxic pesticides threatens not only bees but our health as well. Many commonly used pesticides have been linked to cancer, reproductive harm, and learning disabilities , yet they continue to be sold and used on millions of acres across the U.S. We can shift the market to bee and people-safe alternatives by putting pressure on key companies. We are demanding that garden retailers like Home Depot and Lowe’s stop selling toxic pesticides and that grocers like Kroger stop selling food produced with bee-killing pesticides. Friends of the Earth is also working with legislators at the state and national levels to ban bee-killing pesticides -- a bold but necessary step towards a healthy future for bees, people, and the planet.
