| | Hey Peter, May was a great month for conservative victories, and I've been fighting hard for you in the House. Just wanted to give you a quick update on what we've accomplished together: **✅ Passed** a major bill to **protect women's sports** from the radical gender ideology of the Left.**✅ Passed** a critical bill on the debt ceiling and**put the brakes on Washington's out-of-control spending spree.****✅ Passed** a bill that will **complete the border wall** , **reinforce border patrol,** and finally **put an end to Biden's border crisis**. But we still have Senate Democrats and Chuck Schumer to contend with. That's why I need your help to finish these fights, and**here's the thing, I fell a bit short of my May fundraising goal.** I'm extending our deadline, so if you and every person reading this email can **chip in now** , it would make a world of difference. **I’m humbly asking for your support before MIDNIGHT tonight to see these fights through to the end:[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=47255b1f4c494bb385d6394c04b61f09&_e=HPQtR2r1NzSin4HMLS1hQfE0a-8BqTfjWDaxAXProTaxFB5U0i0SXYsxPCfHW1RExgIp9OyGl7-4lNc3CZE-oYjgS7tYFbMMuhlSwgCgiCPWR9ZFuHWf2JkLIUhU5x8k466UAK5042wg2birunj6GqNMF8PIpcVvoO8C1PKZxY41unNgKNFBgbcdr1XZzA4FUibbpWvE23uqBB6GL88oV5ChOzC7Mhe7epIP2wvvExDxzzPZJxFj-Wznp23XMCRbaGGoAkjm_RPjNycVwqnUHxmZvbcUYLoLG0EahP6cH3Qznt6iFfjwQcRSWlyPcUqtp_IYIxEIm9bQj2MEfd1HRoklkD0Hevfl7t4V8GQ4tZw%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Victor=20Avila?=
subject: They're lying to us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victor Avila for Congress
body:
| | | | | New message | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5ff15bb483&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | | Fellow Patriot,
It's about time that our representatives in DC stop lying to the voters about this debt deal being great.
They're selling this as though it's some amazing bill.
The voters would honestly respect it more if you guys told them it is absolute crap but you're voting for it anyway to avoid a default.
There's no need to act as though this is a win. The American people aren't dumb, though, spare them the lines about how amazing this thing is.
Everyone knows it's not and this is why they don't trust DC.
My name is Victor Avila. I am a retired ICE-HSI Special Agent who survived a deadly 2011 ambush by Cartel hitmen.
Now, I am running for Congress to bring **REAL conservative representation** to Texas's 23rd District.
---
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=9f8ee92b03&e=84ee529f47)
| | | Too often, the politicians in Washington DC just lie to us. Even the ones on our side. We see it all the time but it was **REALLY** obvious the past few days.
I'm not a politician. I took bullets for this country as an ICE agent. So when they lie about a bad deal, I don't mind calling it out. When they lie about the Southern Border, I **REALLY** don't mind calling it out.
It's high time that we restore honesty and integrity to our political leadership. That's been missing for some time. It's the only reason that they have allowed our country to be recklessly invaded for years on end. We're now reaching the point where that invasion is speeding up to levels we could never have even imagined.
I’d like for the Democrats and RINOs to look me in the eye and explain to me why they refuse to secure our border. It’s possible to do. They just refuse to do it.

I want them to explain to a man that has been shot in a cartel invasion defending the border why they refuse to give Border Patrol the resources to repel this invasion.
****
**They have no explanation. They have no excuses. When I get to Congress, I will get the job done.** **It's VERY personal to me.******
****So, I want to ask you humbly today for your help in getting through this race and TO Congress. We're in a tough primary, against an opponent who refuses to truly protect our border.

Hitting our financial goals are **EXTREMELY** important because we’re a month out from our end of quarter deadline. That’s the one where we publicly report how much we’ve raised to the Federal Election Commission. **The number we report sends a big signal about the strength of our campaign.******
****We’re a bit behind where we need to be in order to hit our end of quarter goal. So we’re trying to raise $25,000 more over email before the end of the week to get us back on track.**Can you click below and get us the help we need to WIN?**

---
| | [DONATE $25.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=64a9475d22&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $100.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b644bece53&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $50.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c028c1c933&e=84ee529f47)
---
[DONATE $250.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=6da127c08c&e=84ee529f47)
| [DONATE $75.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=1d953037f1&e=84ee529f47)
---
[DONATE $500.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=6016c259e2&e=84ee529f47)
| | You have my word, I will get a handle on this border crisis if it's the last thing I do. I was willing to die for this nation if that's what I had to do to protect it. That comittment hasn't changed.
Let win this race so we can get this nation back on track.
Sincerely,
Victor AvilaCandidate, TX-23

body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
|
---
# _A Few More Knocks_
---
With the unofficial beginning of summer behind us, you may notice a few more knocks on your door. With warmer weather now settling in, campaigns and candidates are hitting the streets and getting out into the community, meeting with voters on their front porches and working hard to spread their message. Over the coming months, there will be plenty of opportunities for you to be the one knocking on that door, making that phone call, attending that event, or helping a campaign out in some other way. While November may seem far off, it'll be here faster than we know, and we all have a part to play to ensure Republican victories on Election Day. Speaking of that ... our candidate training is fast approaching and you won't want to miss it. At this all-day event, you'll have the opportunity to hear and learn from the best on all things grassroots, finance, and communications that will give you the edge over your opponent. But this isn't just for candidates — any volunteer or grassroots activist is welcome to join! All of the information to register can be found at [this link](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/944dce1278c87667c3d6b838967d376c/40313). We're looking forward to seeing you next week! Sincerely,
---
---
Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---

# **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| |
# Perfect Pitch
---
| |
---
_**Governor Eric Holcomb** speaks during the groundbreaking of Eleven Park in downtown Indianapolis._**
---
This week, **Governor Eric Holcomb **participated in the groundbreaking of Eleven Park, the soon-to-be permanent home of Indiana's professional soccer team, Indy Eleven.
* According to a release from Indy Eleven, Eleven Park will feature a 20,000-seat multi-purpose stadium, 600 apartments, 205,000 square feet of office space, 197,000 square feet of retail space and restaurants, hotels, public plazas and green space, parking, and more.

**What they're saying:** “The Eleven Park project is a gamechanger for the capital city and magnet for the entire state,” said **Gov. Holcomb**.
* “Eleven Park will create quality of life benefits for all Hoosiers that go far beyond a soccer stadium and will be yet another showstopper to add to our toolbox as we work to attract next-level investment from across the globe.”

---
|
---
| | **More:** On Monday, **Gov. Holcomb** shared a Memorial Day message urging Hoosiers to use the day to honor the sacrifices of our veterans and "commit to doing our part to keep our country strong and free."
* Watch it [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/a35c4576caee0246c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

---
|
---
# _Register for Our 2023 Municipal Candidate Training_
---
---
Our 2023 municipal candidate training —**** IN IT TO WIN: Victory in Indiana's Cities & Towns — **is fast approaching!** **Details:** The training will be held on**** Saturday, June 10, 2023,**** at the University of Indianapolis. **What to expect: **This one-day session will include breakout sessions with industry experts and consultants on all things grassroots, finance, and communications, to give candidates and their campaigns the winning edge for November.

* Breakout sessions include: Door to door and phone app training, one on one media training, communications and messaging, campaign finance and fundraising, digital advertising, discussions on various municipal issues, **and more!**

**Take action:** [Register](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/34fad3ec282d7923c3d6b838967d376c/40313) for $100 and [see more details](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/2e7a2f5cd7ad786dc3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# _Avoiding a Democrat Default_
---
Thanks to Republican leadership, the United States will avoid a first-of-its-kind catastrophic default while cutting spending for the first time in decades. **How we got here:** For over 100 days, President Biden refused to negotiate over raising the debt ceiling, saying he would accept nothing less than a "clean raise" and a blank check.
* But when House Republicans passed the Limit, Save, Grow Act, President Biden was forced to come to the table.

**The result:** With just a four-vote majority in the House — the slimmest in decades — and with Democrats controlling the Senate and the White House, Republicans were able to stop the President Biden's $5 trillion tax hike and reckless agenda, while taking the first step to restoring fiscal sanity in Washington, D.C.
* According to the CBO, the [Fiscal Responsibility Act](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/a9e1c52dd3b33684c3d6b838967d376c/40313) will save $2.1 trillion over the next six years.

This is just the first step in breaking Democrats' spending addiction.
---
|
---
# _Op-ed: New state laws will boost affordable homeownership development_
---
In _[The Herald Bulletin](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/a5d235b8b712ba01c3d6b838967d376c/40313):_ "The governor just signed House Bill 1005 into law this week, and it is the perfect kickoff to June’s National Homeownership Month in Indiana. HB1005 will help make housing infrastructure costs more affordable. This session legislators also included the Attainable Homeownership Tax Credit in the budget to aid nonprofits in affordable homeownership development.

"With record lows in housing inventory due to rising construction costs, these new laws will be a big boost for affordable homeownership development across the state." _[Op-ed continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/3c8716c61589f057c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# _Congressmen Pence, Bucshon See Legislation Pass House Commerce Committee_
---
Legislation from Congressmen **Greg Pence (IN-06)** and **Larry Bucshon** **(IN-08)** passed the House Committee on Energy and Commerce last week. **The details:** Though the bills tackle vastly different issues, both bills focus on cutting bureaucratic red tape to make processes more efficient and effective for Hoosiers and Americans.
* **Pence's** SPEED Act will improve consumer access to broadband internet, especially in rural locations.
* **Bucshon's** Securing the U.S. Organ Procurement and Transplantation Network Act will expedite the process for Americans at risk and waiting for organ transplant.

**More:** You can learn more about the bills [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/2db2853516eca9f9c3d6b838967d376c/40313) and [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/1cdb01ae062843b3c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

# _Session Spotlight: SEA 2_
---
This session, there were 252 bills passed by the legislature and signed by **Gov. Holcomb**. Over the next several weeks, this section will be dedicated to highlighting some of those bills. **The bill: SEA 2** (taxation of pass through entities), signed February 22, 2023. **The details:** **SEA 2** alters state taxation law so businesses may deduct all state payments on federal tax returns, granting Hoosier businesses millions in federal tax savings.
* This bill will help small businesses to receive unlimited federal deductions for their state tax payments, leveling the playing field with larger corporations.

---
|
---
# _The Latest from FactCheckBiden.com_
---
Biden has falsely claimed that Republicans are rooting for a default. Nothing could be further from the truth. That’s why House Republicans passed a responsible debt limit increase. **The facts:** Biden is (again) lying to distract from his record, but the facts speak for themselves.
* Biden has wreaked havoc on American energy independence after promising to [“eliminate”](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/bbc623dde9d19287c3d6b838967d376c/40313) oil and natural gas.
* Under Biden’s leadership, illegal immigrants and deadly drugs like fentanyl have [flooded](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/6e74704de049a147c3d6b838967d376c/40313) across the border.
* On crime, Biden has done nothing to solve the crime wave and instead has [surrounded himself](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/aab2ce914357efffc3d6b838967d376c/40313) with "defund the police" supporters.
* Republicans are the ones who are working to [rein in](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/02ae0dad465e4016c3d6b838967d376c/40313) spending while Democrats fearmonger and obstruct.

**What is true?** Biden is a failing president.
---
|
---
# _Upcoming Events Across the State_

---
June 4: [Putnam County Lincoln Day Dinner](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/c65265a16918e8f1c3d6b838967d376c/40313) June 7: [33rd Annual Henry County Golf Outing](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/de0494b8ca07af27/a599fc9491f59bebc3d6b838967d376c/40313) _Events past these dates are available on our website and will be added to the newsletter as we get closer to them._

subject: Will you stand with us?

body:

| | | As a critical member of my team I need to loop you in on the bill my colleagues and I just passed to secure our southern border - so my team has bulleted it out for you below:

---

_**HOUSE REPUBLICANS SECURE THE BORDER ACT**_
* SLASHES illegal immigration
* Resumes border wall construction
* ENDs the failed policy of catch-and-release
* And INCREASES the number of Border Patrol agents

---
| | | [ENDORSE OUR BILL](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z85p1h9l0f93m2rdceqqc2a94kk62tiq9ku7jr2o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth6cp34cdh2bs)

# [CDF issues rallying cry to Christians as "pride month" begins](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TbYDAQYaXXw4KZVZMJ5JL2mRkwk2_GukG3DyCg84dz_7H1ZlCxAlqEVZTvCfXtHH5FkBZWdy3pLBY7ugm8-fBVEAB7lJW1suEdS9iw5BJlJW7vdWknTZNJ1Th2vd00XbY-5OMUJWhNHKbnk-SWOx85s9gOiZC00Hl4YSOlbC-eC15bkuQh4SV-tDiAEz4B6qiDtwC3HYQGZXKRszvChBAU5qRUSyFU3-ImQGMLh-aOifam1aD0HYzb4D2bfW_zTZsLsGEB6atOg=&c=WtVBiu248oSbh-SVvO8VRZzUe89TsYuaaG0VU6Fl6YBPW3gju_agYQ==&ch=frUCi-ajBaDbhYhZaZyqjG-RCkSLFxCLXd_ynwORmlqGEQLZLzdsDg==)
#

TAMPA, Fla. -- Citizens Defending Freedom, a nonprofit focused on protecting the faith and freedom of Americans, is calling for Christians to join together during "pride month" and make their voices heard.
Citizens Defending Freedom is calling for peaceful prayer in the face of flamboyant gay pride activists.
The group is encouraging Christians to organize at gay pride rallies and other "pride month" events to pray for our country, along with those who participate in gay pride events. The goal is to bombard gay pride groups with prayer, just like those groups bombard Christians with their homosexual agenda daily.
Anheuser-Busch, who recently featured a man dressed as a woman on Bud Light cans, and Target, who was recently caught selling homosexual coloring books and gay pride clothing for children, are just two examples of how the alphabet agenda is force-fed to faith-based Americans on a daily basis.
"From the standpoint of freedom, we don't take issue with what consenting adults do with one another, though we certainly pray that those living deviant lifestyles find the love of God," said Judge. "But what the gay pride community is doing in the media, in public spaces and in our nation's workplaces is a totally different story. We do take issue with that. Every day, Christian Americans are force-fed and bombarded with pro-gay and pro-transsexual propaganda. It's everywhere, and it is not only directed at adults, but it's also increasingly directed at our children."
[READ MORE HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TbYDAQYaXXw4KZVZMJ5JL2mRkwk2_GukG3DyCg84dz_7H1ZlCxAlqEVZTvCfXtHH5FkBZWdy3pLBY7ugm8-fBVEAB7lJW1suEdS9iw5BJlJW7vdWknTZNJ1Th2vd00XbY-5OMUJWhNHKbnk-SWOx85s9gOiZC00Hl4YSOlbC-eC15bkuQh4SV-tDiAEz4B6qiDtwC3HYQGZXKRszvChBAU5qRUSyFU3-ImQGMLh-aOifam1aD0HYzb4D2bfW_zTZsLsGEB6atOg=&c=WtVBiu248oSbh-SVvO8VRZzUe89TsYuaaG0VU6Fl6YBPW3gju_agYQ==&ch=frUCi-ajBaDbhYhZaZyqjG-RCkSLFxCLXd_ynwORmlqGEQLZLzdsDg==)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Fewer than 3 weeks away: this June 20th primary means we can ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year.
body:
Protect abortion patients in Virginia
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f4c0d6c-e172-44db-997b-d34fa86b8610/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Did you see this? June 20th is our chance to ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year.**_ _ _We only have a slim one vote pro-choice majority in the State Senate because_ _ __one of 2 Democrats who make up our majority, Joe Morrissey, is a "pro-life" Democrat who'll sign any awful anti-choice Republican garbage._ [**_But we have the perfect solution!__ __If you join us, in less than 3 weeks we'll replace the anti-choicer with progressive champion & former State Delegate. Laschrecse Aird, who's challenging Morrissey in the June 20th primary._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc044eac4-21c1-439e-a5a1-5f7bae685110/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird is exactly the kind of candidate we must get behind. She grew up impoverished to a teenage mother and father who worked multiple jobs to get by. This motivated Aird to run for the VA House of Delegates. _ _In 2021, she was named Legislator of the Year by the Virginia Education Association. Aird was also lauded by the Virginia Chamber of Commerce for job creation. Two very different groups--both seeing Aird's __accomplishment and integrity. Now that's someone who can bring people together._ _Not surprisingly, when comparing Aird to Morrissey, this was the result:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7119e98-b22d-4ab6-a26a-f8a6824036c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird has made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign, running for "Roe Not Joe." She'll be taking that fight all the way to June 20th, but early voting has begun, so we must **SUPPORT AIRD** **NOW** or risk an anti-choice majority! _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," fundraiser, and support Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1c1a397-4935-4712-809f-e32cd77b1d8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you and have a great long weekend! Cliff

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94cafd44-51b5-4d6e-ab06-402c1aae38ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: URD HQ
subject: We need to talk about how we’re taking back the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Join URD and Congressman Chris Deluzio to do exactly that

| |
---
Hi Peter – We're hosting an exclusive virtual event with Rep. Chris Deluzio in less than two weeks. We know you've been a top supporter of our organization, so **we wanted to give you the first chance to RSVP and ask questions** ahead of the event! [**_Peter, we want this conversation to be for United Rural Democrats – including you. We encourage you to RSVP and submit questions for Rep. Friend, the folks at American Bridge just told me you haven't responded to their official Biden approval poll yet.
**In plain English, here are the stakes for this election – if Republicans have their way in 2024, we can say goodbye to: **

Hello, **We just wanted to say _thank you_ for all the hard work you’ve done to support our people-powered movement.** It’s been a whirlwind couple of months, and we’ve been amazed by the level of grassroots enthusiasm we’re seeing in southeastern PA. Our campaign depends on PA supporters like you chipping in a small donation here and there. And since Ashley doesn't accept corporate PAC money, it means _that_ much more to her that we can count on you to show up whenever a critical deadline comes around. This summer, we’re going to stay laser-focused on building relationships with voters and introducing Ashley to every community in southeastern PA. **Together, we will kick GOP Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick out of office next year and bring our shared Pennsylvania values to Congress.** Thanks for putting in the work to flip PA-01 blue. Team Ehasz 🚁 | | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA.

body:
This is what Congress really looks like

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z763r1vg4fm6sflguk3ec7d1ph09egpdnlsv68jg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth66p32cth2bs)

---
Friends, Yeah. I just sent you a picture of an ostrich with its head in the sand. Why? Because I wanted to show you what I have to look at all day in Congress. You see, the Washington D.C. establishment has killed my bill to enact a Balanced Budget Amendment 9 TIMES now... **I 'm SICK and TIRED of the people who run our government refusing to address one of the greatest threats our republic has ever faced: over $1 trillion dollars of debt owed to our greatest international foe - CHINA!** Friends, that's why I desperately need your help to send a message to the establishment that's so loud and so large that it can't be ignored. All I need is your answer to one simple question: **_Do you believe that Washington D.C. needs a Balanced Budget Amendment?_**
---
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zslgn4vl1bmeph9gfj28q672s753jsgh2ra8hab0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth66p32cth2bs)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: 🚨 Sinema voted to overturn PresidentBiden’s plan
body:
Sinema voted to block student debt relief after taking thousands from the student loan industry | | | Peter – Today, Kyrsten Sinema joined every Senate Republican to overturn President Biden’s plan for relieving student debt. We’re disappointed but not surprised. By contrast, Congressman Ruben Gallego, who we endorsed to replace Sinema, voted to help students and save the plan. Of course, a little digging will tell you that Sinema has accepted tens of thousands of dollars from the student loan industry, including student loan servicers like Navient. On top of that she’s taken more than $100,000 from for-profit schools, the kind of places that rip off veterans and leave students with crushing debt and poor job prospects. **Sinema is a sellout, plain and simple._[Help us let Arizona know so we can replace her in 2024 – make a contribution now >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w-AlXJYyvQKM8Cd9MU7Xxd0xs1S-mOvpx9hMbih8XaVLlPqWWqQft9IloU0YO1JQXFpNfQJMALB6J3npbg5hzsaygZFHI3C76c4yiZ6w856oSsKjIndG2kOMjL-EiETA1eaJSf1PcKwiZiIUxZO_dkOFk-U-ZsyeD8C7XnAv31vpIwPXT9r7pcvGUB6qafjFqFSxgEQpTrKFN6jSARNr-Cpo9T1DqDeU69xuk9PclzBN5JiVtD1WYJ29Gq29u3LRmmTjoqE6tYpPadcpjEAs2Kf5keEs7HQvPp-jPcw86x_OjPRZdeGAGtYT6Qhp6ttpbITUK0qGXK-KziTSzr1ZTi/3wp/3iuwJCrxSGSXjGPn-ujvag/h0/o7z2cVPhiVPXEbnZFPVNpD9DWDtDkKnj8tAgfUVtUlk)_ ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w-AlXJYyvQKM8Cd9MU7XxdsvuunTs9ObEvWfnVVc1VOtwqa9k9NtTRJisoOFMskqaNWs7eQZvp9VEwBanonBqVVh1WMNu3sa-HUr6eQCrgMY_eWd1kljwYpZ3V-wIZn1DXttEujdJUH0s7Bcnq9G03Hxz1OKiPAwp0s6RtNuJx86MDTZEESBCChyQgmx62lqVVRzKYwFT1IZzjx6B8Uhk_j4bv0unW4l12Kyz5JYasstRoh87OaDRSY93JG2ppyfvNbk4ojyOp-cWe3-6L1Kh_0er2hnX0xsOnBrLUxkvJTeVWzMtCdK5daElW1O0vNhRt_CqTd0cOiGdfP1YempDpSMPtXdsjmXiFttG9habv63jyU3D-VsJxLc2knajNn7D8LGdISRr7BCre0uaU5ITD/3wp/3iuwJCrxSGSXjGPn-ujvag/h1/-DzFj65qwg6wprAO9WlNzg9cfPn8axBk_7Qi8Z0iMR0)

Since 2015, **Sinema has taken at least $26,000 from PACs for student loan companies** , including donations from Navient and other student loan servicers, as well as the CEO of a student loan company. And that’s just a quick search. We’re sure there’s more where that came from. And if this follows Sinema’s familiar pattern, she’ll be receiving even more student loan industry money after today’s vote.

clean_body: Sinema voted to block student debt relief after taking thousands from the student loan industry | | | Peter – Today, Kyrsten Sinema joined every Senate Republican to overturn President Biden’s plan for relieving student debt. We’re disappointed but not surprised. By contrast, Congressman Ruben Gallego, who we endorsed to replace Sinema, voted to help students and save the plan. Of course, a little digging will tell you that Sinema has accepted tens of thousands of dollars from the student loan industry, including student loan servicers like Navient. On top of that she’s taken more than $100,000 from for-profit schools, the kind of places that rip off veterans and leave students with crushing debt and poor job prospects. Sinema is a sellout, plain and simple. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Since 2015, Sinema has taken at least $26,000 from PACs for student loan companies , including donations from Navient and other student loan servicers, as well as the CEO of a student loan company. And that’s just a quick search. We’re sure there’s more where that came from. And if this follows Sinema’s familiar pattern, she’ll be receiving even more student loan industry money after today’s vote. ** Sinema cannot be trusted to work in the best interests of Arizona–that’s why we’re going to do everything we can to help Ruben Gallego defeat her. ** Thanks for your help, \- Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 | | Sent via . name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Peter, will you personally endorse Ruben Gallego?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Let us explain why this is no ordinary ask
#

Peter -
We need to ask you to do something important today.
Can you add your name to say you personally endorse Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona? It's a small and simple act, but it speaks volumes about the strength of our campaign.
If that's all you need to hear, use this link to get it done.
[**https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/Endorse-Ruben**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230601_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230602-1&refcode2=677.734936.iFU_Lf&akid=677%2E734936%2EiFU_Lf)
Otherwise, here's why this is important. Please give it some thought:
Winning this race will require us to unite Democrats behind our effort, and that includes national Democrats whose endorsements matter.
Those folks are paying attention to three things: the polls, how much money we raise, and the grassroots enthusiasm for our campaign.
They don't want to be on the opposite side of a campaign that has broad grassroots appeal.
That's where these endorsements come in. When Ruben has these conversations, this is the story he is telling: the polls, the money and the grassroots support.
So please:
[**Use this link to add your name as a personal endorser of Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate in Arizona. It's a small act that means a big deal to our chances.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230601_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230602-1&refcode2=677.734936.iFU_Lf&akid=677%2E734936%2EiFU_Lf)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em230601_Personal_Endorse/?source=em230602-1&refcode2=677.734936.iFU_Lf&akid=677%2E734936%2EiFU_Lf)
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=677%2E734936%2EiFU_Lf). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=677_734936_iFU_Lf&akid=677%2E734936%2EiFU_Lf)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Our Next Two Endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

We are excited to announce our support for two exceptional congressional candidates - Marlin Stutzman and Yvette Herrell. They are proven conservatives who will join the House Freedom Caucus and fight for our principles and values.

Please help them defeat the liberals in both parties by contributing to their grassroots campaigns.

Marlin Stutzman (IN-03)
Marlin Stutzman was first elected to Congress in 2010 and was one of the founding members of the House Freedom Caucus. He left the House in 2016 to run for the U.S. Senate but was defeated in the Republican primary. Sadly, Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY) spent millions to defeat
the outspoken conservative.

 

Fmr. U.S. Rep. Marlin Stutzman (R-IN) / Photo by Gage Skidmore

 

Stutzman is now running for the open House seat he previously held. This is a solidly Republican district that must be won by a strong conservative who is willing to stand up for our values.Stutzman will fight the reckless spending that has buried our nation in debt. He will
fight to secure our nation's border. And he will fight the woke liberals who deny God and encourage our kids to reject the bodies God gave them.We're ramping up our support for Stutzman because we know that the GOP establishment will try to fill the seat with another spineless Republican.

Yvette Herrell (NM-02)
One of our proudest accomplishments was helping Yvette Herrell win the election to Congress back in 2020. Despite being from a swing district, she was an outspoken conservative voice and never shied away from the big fights.

 

Fmr. U.S. Rep. Yvette Herrell (R-NM)

 

Democrats spent big to defeat Herrell in 2022, but thankfully she's not giving up and has decided to run again.This is our chance to take another seat away from the Democrats and fill it with a conservative who will stand up to the liberals in both parties.Proven Leaders
We know that Marlin Stutzman and Yvette Herrell can win these races, join the Freedom Caucus, and fight for our values. Why? Because they have done it before.Please contribute to their campaigns through HFF. We will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your
contributions directly to their campaigns. It's the best way to support them!Thank you for considering this request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

 

 

SUPPORT THE HOUSE FREEDOM CAUCUS

 

 

The House Freedom Fund is the only political group in America that is exclusively dedicated to defending and expanding the House Freedom Caucus. Please support our conservative mission by making a one-time or monthly donation today!

 

DONATE

 

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status
are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I need your advice on something crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It's the only way we can stop Biden| | | Friend, Senate Republicans have a crucial task at hand. They’re one of the only firewalls** _ protecting our country from the worst of the far-Left’s impulses. _**However, we don’t have enough Republicans in the Senate right now. One of the only ways we can get MORE Republicans in the Senate is by prioritizing our supporter's top issues and fighting for America First principles that are most important to YOU, Friend. Peter,

As a progressive in Texas, Greg’s path has often been uphill. His fight to deliver for working families and protect vulnerable communities has seen its fair share of setbacks.

**But as a former labor organizer, he knows there’s power in people. That’s why he’s spent his career building coalitions to achieve our common goals. **

In a**[new profile in The New Republic](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64211097/409362981/2038740798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNkMGNmNi00ZDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sFGt8yh1_4H6-3Axe2g3L9Hm1CfaFCihvx4dTVb9_wE=&emci=c9cd0cf6-4d01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=d4cd0cf6-4d01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)**, Greg discussed what it means to be a progressive in Texas—and how he’s taking the fight for working families to Congress.

Greg has never shied away from a challenge. He’s always stood up for what he believed in and brought people together to tackle big challenges.

And that’s what he’s doing in Congress every day—fighting back against those who seek to divide us and building coalitions to achieve a vision for a better state and nation.

Sometimes the road to progress can be difficult. But with support from people like you, it’s made a bit easier. **[Help us fight for progress in Texas and across the nation—chip in $6 today to support Greg and Team Casar in this fight!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64211101/409363034/203052467?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGNkMGNmNi00ZDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sFGt8yh1_4H6-3Axe2g3L9Hm1CfaFCihvx4dTVb9_wE=)**

clean_body: Peter, As a progressive in Texas, Greg’s path has often been uphill. His fight to deliver for working families and protect vulnerable communities has seen its fair share of setbacks. But as a former labor organizer, he knows there’s power in people. That’s why he’s spent his career building coalitions to achieve our common goals. In a, Greg discussed what it means to be a progressive in Texas—and how he’s taking the fight for working families to Congress. = Greg has never shied away from a challenge. He’s always stood up for what he believed in and brought people together to tackle big challenges. And that’s what he’s doing in Congress every day—fighting back against those who seek to divide us and building coalitions to achieve a vision for a better state and nation. Sometimes the road to progress can be difficult. But with support from people like you, it’s made a bit easier. = **= Thank you for being a part of this team, -Laura Laura Hernandez Holmes Campaign Manager Greg Casar for Congress ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |
---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764261:JvdWpmI9N:m:1:3299561967:A079B0AB6A04B0B8D109CA6C61E112A0:r "Can you handle the
truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Patriot. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for one donation right here, right now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764262:JvdWpmI9N:m:1:3299561967:A079B0AB6A04B0B8D109CA6C61E112A0:r "Can I personally
ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764262:JvdWpmI9N:m:1:3299561967:A079B0AB6A04B0B8D109CA6C61E112A0:r "INVEST
IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12 >>")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764261:JvdWpmI9N:m:1:3299561967:A079B0AB6A04B0B8D109CA6C61E112A0:r "John Kennedy")

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: LGBTQ+ rights = human rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Join me in celebrating Pride Month with open hearts, open minds, and the courage to fight anti-LGBTQ+ rhetoric. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64213818/409369441/-662322978?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZhZGVjMi00ZjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeBReuMrLZynA1lRYK_XVyFobxnaZImrwjRbKo4aES4=)
Dear friend, **The fight for equal protection under the law is far from over.** This year alone, more than _5_ _00 bills_ in state legislatures across our country have been introduced aimed at attacking the LGBTQI+ community. Whether it's legislation banning _drag performances_ , _LGBTQI+ history_ , or _ gender-affirming care_, it's clear these attacks are rooted in lies and conspiracies. **It couldn’t be more obvious: MAGA extremists all across the country want to _silence and legislate away the LGBTQI+ community._** | [SUPPORT **🏳️🌈 ****»**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64213819/409369443/-2039027626?refcode=E21612-20230602-HappyPride-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZhZGVjMi00ZjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeBReuMrLZynA1lRYK_XVyFobxnaZImrwjRbKo4aES4=)
---
But let me be clear: **Pride is for everyone and no one should face discrimination because of who they are or who they love. I will always stand up for our right to live and love freely.**
[**Pride Month this year is more important than ever for our LGBTQI+ friends, family, and community members. Join me in celebrating Pride Month with open hearts, open minds, and the courage to fight back against hateful, anti-LGBTQI+ rhetoric.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64213822/409369445/-2039027626?refcode=E21612-20230602-HappyPride-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZhZGVjMi00ZjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeBReuMrLZynA1lRYK_XVyFobxnaZImrwjRbKo4aES4=)
**I will always be an ally, advocate, and safe-space for the LGBTQI+ community because LGBTQI+ rights are human rights. **
Happy Pride, friend. **🏳️🌈**
— Eric Swalwell

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
Do you want to know something important I’ve learned?

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqpk8b5ct10rf0uno55ccdg7oj525duekt9aadq0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztjcqfpahgni8rtva8ntg4rp62lmatk3m3qs8lvg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqa32190f0hvq703ml6o6bmtc1m0sg7j3j3f715o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zakt6rn1ad8bdrbc4gbcit77q0jt0qo2mq3n5t68_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk432rmuofdl7sobjl8cmag38ru53c2he6uv7bpg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsl2gba4tcfttpt5mm4pbnees30gavmemso3um58_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztrjqfthu5jjaeed6pl980lpitbjq0r4iuo15eho_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2hs2fdl4ms3i2caj0j1t5e2g1jccc40gvptbteg_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn55spaj021b4uaen5bv8u1lu79dtulkp0i47hso_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrn93daeinipp4eucblqdn39jhec78crkvl998j8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl23sb8clsd1471e9eo2e9u6dr9t4vlsdp3hqmk8_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>> **_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs7mhji3b75c3cl08v43b8dba684ajum3o1aio50_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqmtbp25fmgtehn4nh3himn3q0fhf2c5frdv7em0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69or3c5h2bs)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE's newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:
Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our goal. Anything you can give helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win.
Thank you,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Vern Buchanan
subject: This is a picture of an Ostrich.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vern Buchanan For Congress
body:
This is what Congress really looks like

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo6hck01uha7d01nvfp6soqum4av3u6qob3i955o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69ob2clh2bs)
---

---
Friends, Yeah. I just sent you a picture of an ostrich with its head in the sand. Why? Because I wanted to show you what I have to look at all day in Congress. You see, the Washington D.C. establishment has killed my bill to enact a Balanced Budget Amendment 9 TIMES now... **I 'm SICK and TIRED of the people who run our government refusing to address one of the greatest threats our republic has ever faced: over $1 trillion dollars of debt owed to our greatest international foe - CHINA!** Friends, that's why I desperately need your help to send a message to the establishment that's so loud and so large that it can't be ignored. All I need is your answer to one simple question: **_Do you believe that Washington D.C. needs a Balanced Budget Amendment?_**
---
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1qg1fv2de4ko01rvgl6uot1gflv5cv7cbj22u7o_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69ob2clh2bs)
---

---
[_**Please, we 're running out of time to send this crucial message. Will you take just a brief moment to record your answer?**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0a6cn7phvekgknf4mqp28ubde0r6dhf0n61lbv0_rp22sh2s8i66o75cth69ob2clh2bs) Thank you for your response.

Sincerely, Vern Buchanan

Team -- Like so many of us, Justice Sonia Sotomayor says she was shocked and saddened when the Supreme Court's far-right majority overturned _Roe v. Wade._

name: Politicians will not save us
subject: Rand Paul
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrpb1kpmv6f67a3nol298vtvgvfn2huec5sfmot8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj60p33c5h2bs)

Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I 've learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched "FEE In the Classroom."

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teach young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterwards is : "_why haven 't I heard these ideas before_?"

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before: _America 's public schools don't teach our nation's founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[_**I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $10. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc87uj4n95okob4mue06lc2pkdc8ku9pu5j6fc3g_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj60p33c5h2bs)

[_**Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg00o5p468v3k3e1gnen72mh53n6rk49i9m7uqc8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj60p33c5h2bs)

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlp6urag21prshdhvf97re6i8lk00a9stc1o17eo_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj60p33c5h2bs)

**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE 's efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It's no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation's youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

FEE's President, Zilvinas Silenas, knows this more than anyone... Zilvinas once lived under the Soviet Union's Communist rule in Lithuania. He's now made it his life's mission to educate young people about the dangers of socialism and how free markets and free people solve problems.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the links below:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z120dp5n1340csu6g42cc0n3b1ho6a30qen6igmo_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj60p33c5h2bs)

Friend, I'm sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[_**Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcb2okm4lm49kppt7fq6c12t9d6advv8f08f10mg_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj60p33c5h2bs)

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Matthew Diemer via ActionNetwork.org
subject: What I've been up to
body:
| | | Dear Peter, I hope this email finds you well. I apologize for my recent radio silence; I’ve been deeply engaged in some vitally important initiatives and events that I hope will warrant your attention. I wanted to take a moment to update you on my recent activities and shed light on crucial matters affecting our democratic process in Ohio. Over the past few months, I have been actively involved in supporting the effort to secure signatures to place abortion rights on the November ballot. I believe it is our duty to stand up for those who deserve to make choices about their own bodies, and that it’s crucial that we protect the fundamental reproductive rights of individuals. In addition to the signature drive, I have been dedicating my time to raising awareness about Ohio's HJR 1 and SJR 2. These proposed amendments, which will be brought to the ballot in a special election on August 8th, are of significant concern. The GOP state legislature aims to raise the threshold for constitutionally ratifying people-powered initiatives from 50% + 1 to 60% + 1, effectively nullifying the power of a simple majority in our democratic system. This change threatens the very essence of our representative democracy and must be confronted head-on. On a positive note, I am excited to announce the launch of a new podcast called "Cuyahoga Today” with the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party. The podcast aims to inform our community about important issues, legislation, initiatives, and candidates. I encourage you to tune in and engage in the discussion to foster a better understanding of our political landscape. [Check out the "Cuyohoga Today" podcast here!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKeqdhWuIqpW0eQhmA8EUWy-XYp6kMtscEdxF3FvRLGTQr9QUkyroZoqlX__NBe59TYBrm5eWfYuUmnxBXjC3HpVO_Ugny5U9NgKT85ofYJpkCwPjRY7uaJic20N5yFXZZMu7ucDlHO9P33SKvLuN6QnUHDMSlu_X9cnr8LkPzZjjC0vtUCua7N-oFaCNlIcLr2zxUoEsxNEVl7OiXtnimhDFZJWPXRoaHJ_kAgPkgLW2IEOj3Di8NCD7W8RQNcgqog85OXtLMhMe_1_huktjxTc/3wp/wlxD7nUQQJGR1M5MMCvqdg/h0/6zGXrKVIlxAhjKfqrv-j-AGEaecRBU1h2KGNfb7T-vk) In future emails, I will delve into more detail about current events and elections taking place throughout our county. However, I would like to take this opportunity to address a matter of utmost importance: our nation's financial stability. I am relieved that Congress has taken action to raise the debt ceiling, thus avoiding a default on our obligations. Nevertheless, we must be proactive in planning for the future and finding ways to balance the budget. It is unsustainable to continue spending $2 trillion more than our tax revenue each year. We owe it to ourselves and future generations to address this issue responsibly. As engaged citizens, we have the power to shape the future of our state and country. It is essential that we stay informed, stand up for our values, and actively participate in the democratic process. I encourage you to reach out to your friends, family, and colleagues, and educate them about the initiatives, elections, and challenges we face. Together, we can make a meaningful impact. Thank you for your ongoing support and commitment to our shared goals. I look forward to updating you on further developments and, most importantly, to working together to build a brighter future for Ohio. Warm regards and Happy Pride Month, Matthew Diemer
* * *
Diemer for Congress P.O. Box 16753 Rocky River, Ohio 44116 [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GHjDXYRtUm3kteQsEXLdcwUnpE0a7Z-_f5RcESEZtvkNuzloqLQumoYJed0tobxU5pa7YPVS4-ndaZoOL7BSZYFDayip5ez39E3FnsO1cAJzARyj2yL1DE_CDZGjC-2Hc2p6KzNAy4MSdurx1Lr9vzuEBlJhjuZ9NJsT_yLNjLcI4b14OIBkKBihKWm1osOvAaEEw0UEXWE4YqsH1CXa1Wi1L1ehLjz7Q6mW_i-m0QztydXVeFPAgoQhZMn5-HcxJXOliF7e9iwR6P_Q4IE7Rm7Lrf3dDh55Ouap3J1xq9TxIq6JNYtJ7vXabzxUSTMeTCiXhzQol2f7p1XJ5GI_AVmMMzOLQ-ETDdCA2Kko2BOURKC1bttansLevDJhTNeSymh790LEbg3ifPzjdfrojDHMnbrzljIDa_cnvIzNnW3NQs7nJUlWr4UoP9GERlSyh/3wp/wlxD7nUQQJGR1M5MMCvqdg/h1/Dod8Q8-iGgpMLh-kF8gBh1_61pK-BsH0orXd7oT5JyU) | |
---

name: GIFFORDS
subject: June is Gun Violence Awareness Month
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We hope that as we start Gun Violence Awareness Month, you’ll make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC and forward this email to a friend
#

Friends -
June is Gun Violence Awareness Month—a month of reflection and action for our movement to end gun violence.
[**As we start Gun Violence Awareness Month, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC and forward this email to a friend or family member? Your support is what allows us to keep up our work towards a safer, better future in our nation. We need to keep our movement growing in order to finish this fight.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230602-1-15&t=1&akid=5901%2E3935704%2EDkjch6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&amount=3&refcode=em230602-1-15&t=2&akid=5901%2E3935704%2EDkjch6)**
While we’ve made progress to keep our communities safe, there’s still so much for us to do. Gun violence is a public health crisis. Data released by the CDC earlier this year showed that in 2021, our country had a record number of gun deaths. And gun violence rose to be the number one cause of death for children in our nation.
It doesn’t have to be this way. There are real, commonsense solutions that we fight for every day at GIFFORDS, such as universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka “red flag laws”), and safe storage requirements. But we have to keep fighting for a future where these measures are enacted nationwide, not just in a few states.
[**We need you with us. So please, as we recognize Gun Violence Awareness Month, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC and encourage the people in your life to join the movement to end gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230602-1-15&t=3&akid=5901%2E3935704%2EDkjch6)
Thank you. Our movement can only stay strong if we continue to work together.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5901%2E3935704%2EDkjch6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: We hope that as we start Gun Violence Awareness Month, you’ll make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC and forward this email to a friend Friends - June is Gun Violence Awareness Month—a month of reflection and action for our movement to end gun violence. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: While we’ve made progress to keep our communities safe, there’s still so much for us to do. Gun violence is a public health crisis. Data released by the CDC earlier this year showed that in 2021, our country had a record number of gun deaths. And gun violence rose to be the number one cause of death for children in our nation. It doesn’t have to be this way. There are real, commonsense solutions that we fight for every day at GIFFORDS, such as universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka “red flag laws”), and safe storage requirements. But we have to keep fighting for a future where these measures are enacted nationwide, not just in a few states. Thank you. Our movement can only stay strong if we continue to work together. \- The team at GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Team Lateefah
subject: A new opponent has entered our race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is a crucial time for our movement.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=33%2E1163%2EoQTD3E)
We wanted you to hear it from us: _Another person just announced they're running against Lateefah in California's 12th Congressional District._
Looking the other way is not an option. This is a critical inflection point in our fight for continued progress -- and we all have to step up to show that we have Lateefah's back. **And having her back means investing in a strong community organizing and political team.**
**[Can you rush a contribution of any amount so we have the resources to keep California's 12th Congressional District in progressive hands?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230602-1?refcode=em20230602-1&refcode2=33_1163_oQTD3E&akid=33%2E1163%2EoQTD3E)**

Lateefah's opponents have already started distorting her record. With transportation, reproductive, and housing justice on the line, it couldn't be more important to stay on track to win. Grassroots support from folks like you power everything we do -- so whatever you chip in really matters.
**[If you're able to, please rush a contribution so we're ready for whatever comes our way in this race »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230602-1?refcode=em20230602-1&refcode2=33_1163_oQTD3E&akid=33%2E1163%2EoQTD3E)**

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/7a2bc383a45d/alert-this-conservative-vision-is-nothing-more-than-click-bait?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Don Tracy Disses Grassroots, Now He's Using Them as Bait to Attract Donors to Fund "Conservative Vision," Despite Supporting Pro-Choice, Pro Obama Candidates During 2022 Election (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/06/don-tracy-disses-grassroots-now-hes-using-them-as-bait-to-attract-donors-to-fund-conservative-vision-despite-supporting-pro-choice-pro-obama-candidates-during-2022-electi.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On May 20th, Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy spoke to a group of Republicans in Lake County where he publicly slammed his favorite target: the grassroots.

As a caller pointed out during a segment on Black and Right Radio – and who was at the event with Tracy earlier in the day, they recalled Tracy’s speech, saying,

“..he [Tracy] brought up the fact that everybody’s pointing at him, but he goes, ‘Where are the grassroots? We don’t need people sitting in their chairs’...but it’s people [grassroots] that just bi**h and moan constantly about how bad things are and are not election judges, are not walking doors for candidates and not supporting people...”
https://youtu.be/DVIMetFSdLA?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL GOP Chair Don Tracy slams the grassroots during a speech in Lake County on May 20, 2023.

In early May, Tracy caught some of his fellow state central committee (SSC) members off guard when several of them received an email naming them to the new Endorsement Policy Committee (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-secretly-creates-il-gop-endorsement-committee-in-attempt-to-block-grassroots-from-winning-future-primary-elections-catching-gop-leaders-by-surprise.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , which Tracy will chair – paving the way for the chairman and the state party to officially endorse their preferred candidates in primary elections, in an apparent dig at the grassroots-base of the party.

In January, Tracy floated this idea during an interview with Bishop on Air, and blamed the top of the ticket – a grassroots candidate, for the midterm election losses in November – saying that the IL GOP needs to re-evaluate their primary election neutrality policy moving forward.

https://youtu.be/O6DHuWDOgrI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP Chair Don Tracy, during a live radio interview blames the “top of the ticket” — the grassroots candidate, for the midterm election losses in 2022.

During the school board elections in April, Tracy and the IL GOP abandoned (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-silent-abandons-republican-school-board-candidates-while-il-democratic-party-funds-school-board-races-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the grassroots base of the party – choosing instead to sit on the sidelines while Gov. JB Pritzker and the Democratic Party of Illinois spent $800,000 to support their far-left candidates and to viciously attack the conservative ones.

And where was Tracy? He was silent.

Tracy and the IL GOP even secretly supported a slate of
anti-grassroots candidates (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/il-gop-secretly-supported-a-slate-of-anti-grassroots-candidates-in-will-county-during-april-4th-election-and-improperly-used-mailers-to-attack-the-conservative-base-of-the-party.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) during the April elections – approving mailers and allowing the other candidates to use the IL GOP postage discount to level attacks against the conservative slate – a perk unavailable to the grassroots candidates.

And the advisor to the anti-grassroots slate of candidates? John Fogarty – Tracy’s chief legal advisor and the general counsel to the Illinois Republican Party.

But on late Wednesday evening, Tracy sent out a fundraising email, invoking the grassroots and using the conservative base of the party as bait – urging donors to “please consider sending a donation...before midnight tonight.”

“Ever since I became Chairman of the Illinois Republican Party, I’ve seen the tremendous impact that grassroots leadership and activism can have on elections...2023 has been a testament to the power that ordinary people can have in shaping their government, and it makes me optimistic for the future of our party and our conservative vision for Illinois.”
IL GOP Chair Don Tracy’s email, using the grassroots as bait, to try and solicit donors who can help support the IL GOP’s “conservative vision for Illinois.”

A conservative vision?

In October, Don Tracy and IL GOP leaders
endorsed (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-il-gop-leaders-endorsed-a-pro-choice-pro-same-sex-marriage-pro-transgender-candidate-who-voted-for-barack-obama-violating-gop-party-platform.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) pro-choice, pro-same sex marriage, pro-transgender rights candidates who voted for Barack Obama and Joe Biden.

And during that same month, Tracy and the IL GOP paid for a
pro-choice mailer (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-violates-party-platform-pays-for-and-endorses-pro-choice-mailer-during-2022-midterm-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in support of anti-Trump Republican Greg Hart, who was running for DuPage County Board Chair.

Just the other day, Hart – a close friend and ally of Tracy, sent out a tweet calling President Donald Trump – the national leader of the grassroots movement, “not fit to be President.”
https://twitter.com/_Greg_Hart/status/1663383150179778561?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

In the email, Tracy continues,

“We put such a huge emphasis on Congress and the White House that we sometimes forget about our local offices. Our city councils, judicial seats, school boards...matter just as much, and we intend to make inroads there!”
IL GOP Chair Don Tracy’s email, using the grassroots as bait, to try and solicit donors.

But too little, too late – and Illinois Review has reviewed emails sent to Tracy asking for the IL GOP to help during the school board election this past April. And what was Tracy’s response?

Silence.

Tracy ignored the pleas for help from the grassroots – and now he wants to use them as bait to raise money.

The Illinois Republican Party website even highlights the party’s “commitment to our core ideals” – and that includes “The Right to Life.”
The IL GOP website lists the party’s commitment to support core ideals like “The Right to Life,” despite supporting pro-choice candidates last Fall. (Source: Illinois.GOP)

But it’s difficult for donors to fund Tracy’s conservative vision, when Tracy and the IL GOP continue to support candidates whose pro-choice, pro-same sex marriage, pro-transgender rights policies violate the party platform.

But what do you expect from a chairman who once ran as a Democrat,
donates (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/don-tracy-donates-to-democrat-endorsed-by-sen-durbin-just-months-before-his-il-gop-chair-election.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Democrats and continues to support Democratic candidates?

Don Tracy, IL GOP Leaders Endorsed a Pro-Choice, Pro-Same Sex Marriage, Pro-Transgender Candidate Who Voted for Barack Obama, Violating GOP Party Platform (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-il-gop-leaders-endorsed-a-pro-choice-pro-same-sex-marriage-pro-transgender-candidate-who-voted-for-barack-obama-violating-gop-party-platform.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Despite Bob Fioretti’s record as a Democrat, and his longtime support of issues like abortion, same sex marriage and transgender rights – and the fact that he last ran as a Democrat in 2020 – that didn’t seem to bother Illinois Republican Party Chairman Don Tracy, who hosted a fundraiser for Fioretti last October and made a personal donation to his campaign on September 2, 2022. CLICK TO READ MORE. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/don-tracy-il-gop-leaders-endorsed-a-pro-choice-pro-same-sex-marriage-pro-transgender-candidate-who-voted-for-barack-obama-violating-gop-party-platform.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Alleged Republican Bob Fioretti, candidate for Cook County Board President, left, and IL GOP Chair Don Tracy, right, knock on doors just a day before the 2022 November election. (Illinois Republican Party/Facebook)
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b7bf02dceb-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_06_02_01_58&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b7bf02dceb-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
