clean_body: Behind Don Tracy's "conservative vision" lies a troubling history of endorsing and financially supporting pro-choice candidates.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zov4sq3clecsp00og61t6s1809ai45l01lu9sll8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj64oj3clh2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zota3nk654k11t4arbjrd3ocnkgdj2eanv1scov8_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj64oj3clh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zce1ut9qk6sngid59fns1g6ht0ocqpg234a4i4eg_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj64oj3clh2bs)
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z682qbtn7lk3alp2ccv3sjm7vfadu53nvn8reoi0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj64oj3clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34clj6aob24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf0qg4nafc39opqgkj95e701kh3j1jt3j6ce3lh0_rp22sh2s8i66o75ctj64oj3clh2bs)_

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb66nu5hha5vtj6rpigp2jcbpe8tl4msdkuiibpo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or0sljmcoj2cdim49fg)

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I need your personal endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: [**I need your personal endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64217157/409381816/1547604405?source=20230602_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI2MzEzMi01NjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6K6KQqOnZ4OG7gSTPMaUrbZb7GmRptDCKPd2Vg9HFU=&emci=008d1a8e-efff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=98b63132-5601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) [_**If you already believe in me and my campaign, you can go ahead and sign your name here. If you’re not sure yet, let me explain and fight for your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64217158/409381817/1547604405?source=20230602_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI2MzEzMi01NjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6K6KQqOnZ4OG7gSTPMaUrbZb7GmRptDCKPd2Vg9HFU=&emci=008d1a8e-efff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=98b63132-5601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) Peter, I need you to understand my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream -- and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. Now, Trump’s Republicans are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about taking back the House, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. [_**It’s because of my upbringing that I believe all Americans deserve a fighting chance. That’s why I’m leading the charge to make sure our hardworking Democrats take back our Majority \-- but I need to make sure my supporters have my back as I do. I need 25,000 endorsements before midnight to prove I have the support of voters -- will you add your name now? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64217159/409381818/1547604405?source=20230602_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI2MzEzMi01NjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6K6KQqOnZ4OG7gSTPMaUrbZb7GmRptDCKPd2Vg9HFU=&emci=008d1a8e-efff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=98b63132-5601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) | [**Endorse Raja! >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64217160/409381819/1547604405?source=20230602_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI2MzEzMi01NjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6K6KQqOnZ4OG7gSTPMaUrbZb7GmRptDCKPd2Vg9HFU=&emci=008d1a8e-efff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=98b63132-5601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
---

Peter, I’ll be blunt: We must do everything in our power to stop Trump and his Republicans from retaking power.
That’s why I need to know supporters like you are behind me every step of the way.
[_**Right now, I’m hoping you’ll help me with your endorsement. I need 25,000 endorsements before midnight to prove I have the momentum to protect our Democrats from coast to coast. So please, will you sign your name? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64217161/409381820/1547604405?source=20230602_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI2MzEzMi01NjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6K6KQqOnZ4OG7gSTPMaUrbZb7GmRptDCKPd2Vg9HFU=&emci=008d1a8e-efff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=98b63132-5601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Raja
| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64217162/409381821/-1810142053?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OGI2MzEzMi01NjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6K6KQqOnZ4OG7gSTPMaUrbZb7GmRptDCKPd2Vg9HFU=)

clean_body: Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: Peter, I need you to understand my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream -- and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. Now, Trump’s Republicans are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about taking back the House, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. | Peter, I’ll be blunt: We must do everything in our power to stop Trump and his Republicans from retaking power. That’s why I need to know supporters like you are behind me every step of the way. Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | = | | Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress Friends of Raja for Congress PO Box 681202 Schaumburg, IL 60168 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Dr. Debby Burnett
subject: I’m so grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-db-email?refcode2=logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-db-email?refcode2=logo]
Folks,
We’ve crunched all the numbers, and I’m thrilled to say we met our May grassroots fundraising goal!
Thank you to everyone who gave to help us get there!
Look, we know this race is going to be tough. Lauren Boebert is a right-wing extremist who puts her fame and fortune — and the interests of her dark-money donors — ahead of those of the folks she’s supposed to represent.
Democrats came incredibly close to replacing her last cycle, and we’ve got a people-powered plan to replace her once and for all.
It’s time for a new congresswoman here in Colorado’s 3rd District.
I know that if everyone does their part, our team can make it happen!
Thanks for being here,
Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian for 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of western and southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-db-email?refcode2=btn_biobox]

Paid for by Burnett for Colorado

Patriot,

I thought I'd see a HUGE response to my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey, but it hasn't happened.

This input is desperately needed to shape the party's strategy for this MUST-WIN election. Joe Biden and the liberal media hate that we are so closely involved with our grassroots base. This survey is the type of thing that gives him nightmares.

You don't have to write anything fancy, just tell me what matters to you.

subject: Do you approve of the Supreme Court?

CNN: Supreme Court approval rating declines amid controversy over ethics and transparency | | |

| | **_CNN:_ Supreme Court approval rating declines amid controversy over ethics and transparency** Just over a year ago, the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade._ Since then, the Court’s ultra-conservative majority has continuously attacked voting rights, ignored environmental protection efforts, and dodged questions about their unethical behavior. And people are taking notice – _only 41%_ of Americans approve of the Supreme Court. It’s no shock that the Court’s approval rate is declining, but we want to hear what you think. I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. And I wouldn’t ask for it to be any other way.

Charleston is home to me. It’s where I grew up, it’s where I learned to play football, and it’s where I learned to be a man of faith and conservative values.

It’s all of these things that I learned in Charleston that have led me to this exact moment: **I’m officially running for President of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668759%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VBD6utMYD3xRrQkqqcNI9A&sysid=1 "SUPPORT ME HERE")
---

Today, our country is being tested. Once again, our divisions run deep and the threat to our future is real. Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They’re promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they’re indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

And all too often when they get called out for their failures they weaponize race to divide us... to hold onto their power. When I fought back against their liberal agenda they called me a prop. A token. Because I disrupt their narrative. I threaten their control.

And that’s how I know I’m doing something right. And that’s why I will continue to fight because I believe America’s best days are ahead of us.

**_[So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I’m going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I’m really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668750%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZWiJJuM6RoZz5NJQ4fWZTA&sysid=1 "So, Friend, will you
please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I’m going to need
every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I’m really
counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow
American that has faith in this country.")_**

---
| | | [YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668751%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r%2f9KhgIR2bhCjcmHHJHnRQ&sysid=1 "YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!")
---

God bless you,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668752%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yx%2bMNvuDTrT0GowvpIrBFw&sysid=1 "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT
YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668753%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZchXVq2Ts8Oxzn4S5%2bUF2w&sysid=1 "That’s why I announced I
am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hePri5OnGnPutzhlq2AD6A&sysid=1 "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here’s the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn’t going to be easy.** I’ll need your help to win.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YVGtsVzpYYC1v3D3f9px0w&sysid=1 "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c668766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hqz4JiSrTz7lK7HE9nLxvA&sysid=1 "Can you chip in $5, $10 or
even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden’s America, so even if it’s just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

body:
America’s 250th birthday.
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kTFvpDAQhX-N6UD22BhTUNzGR7PSNSly3coZO7uTsw0Bcyj360-sNmm_9zR6n8alOdLb58C6EwO4kV8ZAJM_GMBZnX7_0ueXs61Vv_-srW7VfqTwxADK5xy-q48rTUiO4kE7W_kB0ABiFQahTduJnhtT3QYOTmgUspdGyR5b4YRrW6lA96gkFxUNwEFyzUG0wnDVqFYro4WXHr1DJZniO-XGT9lF_16WLc0NTqmKw62Ueb1PGhmMa8BtCc1OeQn-aBzM_Q21S2EhdPX7RLnUb1v2i6OV8rXGKSUqJQQGY8bIA5rewytg_wpCMDluJV1S8LQlJu1DVx9wnbYFA5MW6eIeDF2aHV0zk_ZL6SuZcgm5MGl7EJqBvuRInkmrttx9rM9Pf9Id3h8i7Uc6_Xtu44uplsHPO8VIq-6Y4tdjwaH2PwAA___V1Yv3)
---
Friend,
I’m excited to be back in the White House in 2025, because I’ll get to be your President during a very special moment in American history.
3 years from now, America will celebrate the biggest and most important milestone in our country’s history: _**250 years of independence.**_
Beginning on Memorial Day 2025 and continuing until July 4, 2026, we will celebrate this incredible milestone and give our nation the birthday it truly deserves.
I will work with all 50 governors (Republican and Democrat alike) to create the great American State Fair – a unique one-year exhibition featuring pavilions from all 50 states – which will be hosted at the legendary Iowa State Fairgrounds.
_Not only will we be honoring 250 years of American independence, but we will also celebrate the fact that we RESCUED our nation from collapse and MADE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_

clean_body: America’s 250th birthday. | | | Friend, I’m excited to be back in the White House in 2025, because I’ll get to be your President during a very special moment in American history. 3 years from now, America will celebrate the biggest and most important milestone in our country’s history: 250 years of independence. Beginning on Memorial Day 2025 and continuing until July 4, 2026, we will celebrate this incredible milestone and give our nation the birthday it truly deserves. I will work with all 50 governors (Republican and Democrat alike) to create the great American State Fair – a unique one-year exhibition featuring pavilions from all 50 states – which will be hosted at the legendary Iowa State Fairgrounds. Not only will we be honoring 250 years of American independence, but we will also celebrate the fact that we RESCUED our nation from collapse and MADE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | Thank you, | Donald J. Friends, Yeah. I just sent you a picture of an ostrich with its head in the sand. Why? Because I wanted to show you what I have to look at all day in Congress. You see, the Washington D.C. establishment has killed my bill to enact a Balanced Budget Amendment 9 TIMES now... **I 'm SICK and TIRED of the people who run our government refusing to address one of the greatest threats our republic has ever faced: over $1 trillion dollars of debt owed to our greatest international foe - CHINA!** Friends, that's why I desperately need your help to send a message to the establishment that's so loud and so large that it can't be ignored. All I need is your answer to one simple question: **_Do you believe that Washington D.C. needs a Balanced Budget Amendment?_**

clean_body: This is what Congress really looks like | | | Friends, Yeah. I just sent you a picture of an ostrich with its head in the sand. Why? Because I wanted to show you what I have to look at all day in Congress. You see, the Washington D.C. establishment has killed my bill to enact a Balanced Budget Amendment 9 TIMES now... I 'm SICK and TIRED of the people who run our government refusing to address one of the greatest threats our republic has ever faced: over $1 trillion dollars of debt owed to our greatest international foe - CHINA! Friends, that's why I desperately need your help to send a message to the establishment that's so loud and so large that it can't be ignored. All I need is your answer to one simple question: Do you believe that Washington D.C. needs a Balanced Budget Amendment? Thank you for your response. Sincerely, Vern Buchanan | | Paid for by Vern Buchanan For Congress Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Hanna
subject: ⚠️ Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
bit.ly/FundDrBob [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
,
The campaign is off the a great start. Although we're behind on our fundraising goals, we're so proud of the number of contributors who have signed on to Bob Lorinser's campaign for Congress. Thank you!
-Hanna
Data Team, Lorinser for Michigan
bit.ly/FundDrBob [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
$5 [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
$10 [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
$50 [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
$100 [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
A message from Dr. Bob

Candidates and elected officials are devoting hours on end to raising money, taking away from crucial time that could be dedicated to listening to the voices of their constituents [votedrbob.com/events] and fulfilling their legislative duties.
The people should elect Representatives based on their ideas and values, not the amount of money they can raise through a small number of corporate PACs and uber-wealthy, agenda-prone donors.
We need to end excessive political fundraising and create campaign finance reform. Big money and politics is a corrupt combination.
I truly hate asking, but remember - we don't care about the amount. Whatever you can give. My opponent is asking constituents to "max out" at $3,300. Instead, we want as many small-amount supporters as possible reflected on our financial reports, real people, not just pocketbooks. [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
We must prioritize campaign finance reform, and I am proud to stand in solidarity with anyone on either side of the aisle in a new American promise to create a more democratic future.
I can't do this alone. To get to the stage and fight for reform, I need your help. Support our grassroots, people-powered effort to bring back a government that truly serves its people.
Thank you.
Sincerely,
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Democrat, MI01
SEND A GIFT [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser [https://www.facebook.com/drboblorinser]

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | [ ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/1/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/Xa-vqAjrdWTicozmQWqC9auqU4s=324)
---
* * *

Please read the message below from our sponsor, Liberty Guard.
We encourage you to [**visit their site today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/2/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/74xtfmm5p3bJspifFWOoQVblmFA=324).

* * *
| [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/3/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/AZg7zswnEFHZzghujoD8KPQ0xVM=324)
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/4/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/PfeUQZeUwnw1S9KGsWTQOId3v5U=324)
Dear Patriot,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/5/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/ib_dtZMzJmF6wsYwwaakThWu8vc=324)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/6/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/-xLXsDSkaYbW9BF_sm2xr1VLuZs=324)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/7/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/6gqHs5-eROFttEBzWAgMSO_yosw=324)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Patriot, **[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/8/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/mPRCwqPf9VnNJUoAPZBGgyq4udU=324)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/9/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/6Lrq1rOZwVrdy67KyPS58JDm0dA=324)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Patriot, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FDm763Iftf1AnSiXSyad3EE1g%2FYN4d3rKt2LV8eAoyYdHJzQ/10/010001887cc95ca4-b7a37882-2e6b-4f0e-b06a-26d1a734eeab-000000/hLI9qpvbdeVU5xAb1_mjtv9p3EY=324)**.

body:
Hi, folks, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean _all_ work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**
[**That’s why I’m asking for your support today, folks: Please, will you chip in $25 or more now – split between my campaign and Future Forum PAC – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64220608/409394108/-435693909?refcode=E21630-20230602-SherrodBrown-SL-SurrogateNational-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRkZjlkMjlhLTVkMDEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyo2_uJxz5tQkc2jbdl71tYFJNDMrSKE4j_hk1i3Uf0=)

Sherrod Brown

name: Larry Elder
subject: $1 for 1 Debate
body:
$1 will get me on the debate stage!
| | | **Show Your Support**
---
| [CHIP IN TODAY](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z8nu1nkiio1nebddrskuil3i0v318bm3v92tcpig_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no)

| | [](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zu1tib8l9aigfua3v1dm0irn5nujrpgs69aa41o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no)
---
| | Dear Peter,You deserve to hear ALL the voices in the Republican debates later this summer. Right now, you’re only going to hear from a select few candidates.That is because the RNC is expected to institute both polling and fundraising benchmarks to guarantee candidates an opportunity to be on the debate stage. [**We are hitting our polling numbers but are falling behind in our donation requirements. A donation of even $1 or more will help me get onto the debate state. Please contribute to help me reach that goal.**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zc4pej8npj45qbgiipmg4ej9muklpt4d7jheiqj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no) I’ve spent years commentating on conservative politics, written books about American life and even stood up against Gavin Newsom in California. I want to continue to spread my message on the presidential debate stage later this year.**But I can’t do that if I do not qualify.** [**So please, contribute $1 or more to my campaign TODAY, so I can get on track to hit the requirements necessary to make it to the first Republican debate.**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z65sf2jvhomhnqdh5b1s5d37n4cabqvom33ul5bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no) $1[](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zf9iv5jbasd7ch91ighq9s949r7lci6hofpogc4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no) for one debate, that is all I need today. Thank you,Larry ElderRepublican Candidate for President
---
[DONATE NOW](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z5gt8d5op7qe78527tfin43gf9e42d4m9jaoo3ng_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no)
---
| | |
---
# Meet Larry:
---
| | Larry Elder—the Sage from South Central—is a _New York Times_ best-selling author, award-winning documentary filmmaker, and one of the best-known media figures in America today. His flagship daily radio program, “The Larry Elder Show,” was heard every weekday in all 50 states and on more than 300 stations. Larry’s unique style, personal background, and professional experience combine to inspire, inform, and persuade his listeners, readers, and viewers to embrace the timeless American principles of personal responsibility and public accountability. In his words: _“The question is not which party has my back, but which party can get government off our backs—so that we might all realize our God-given capabilities.”_ Larry was born and raised in South Central Los Angeles, and his family’s story represents every bit of the American Dream. His father was born in Athens, Georgia, served in the U.S. Marine Corps during World War II, and moved to California to open his own restaurant—Elder’s Snack Bar. Larry’s mother, originally from Huntsville, Alabama, was a clerical worker for the U.S. Department of War (now the U.S. Department of Defense) and raised three boys as a stay-at-home mom. After running for Governor of California in 2021 and securing millions of votes, Larry is now ready for the next step in his journey: Winning the Republican nomination for President of the United States in 2024.
---
[**SHOW YOUR SUPPORT**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z7h1tc8klhm8coukptor9fm23k2ebag1j31rs8ro_rp22sh2s8i6eo71chgm8p724no)
---

| Friend,
---
Joe Biden’s Administration continues to STUMBLE — drowning in bad publicity with his abysmal poll ratings and failing policies.

Meanwhile, Tammy Baldwin has been his right-hand man, voting alongside his agenda and helping to enact these failing policies onto YOU.

**Like two peas in a pod, Biden and Baldwin are in complete lockstep with each other.**

Donald J. Trump June 2nd, 2023
**“We welcome all the candidates into the race, but rest assured, South Carolina was, is, and always will be Trump country!” – Governor Henry McMaster **
**“Repeal section 230. Money will not pick the Republican nominee in 2024, it will be the will of the people who yearn for a proven leader to stop the madness in Washington. I am proud to be on the Trump train in South Carolina, which is Trump country!**
****
**When it comes to making America safe, respected by our friends, and feared by our enemies, there is no better choice than President Donald J. Trump. When it comes to President Trump: secure borders, tax cuts, strong economic growth, fair trade agreements, historic peace agreements in the middle east - it’s not rhetoric, it’s a record of accomplishment.” – Senator Lindsey Graham, South Carolina**
Polling shows President Trump leading DeSantis by [21 points](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kL1uwyAUhZ8Gb0SXa8DO4KGp5SVt13Yl_ARaDCgQWXn7ylHV9X5X3zk6ai0xuMdEhhNB9MFUgkj6F4J45qevD3n-PM_UvM3vdJaCbzvFV4LYHsX-v_5ZDnZVIe7XYe7MJNAx6OzE5CgGZKPAzk9DL1EK4E4z5UYUl5FJhmDA6YEfQXZhQsAeJCCTwIEfxgsILbjUxo1WAhAOxtaf7ExOKprvdruv5aDz2sXJt1bqs9NCcGne-hDjzgguPq822a0SXLRaiwrXRHDpj1wMIOnTQlsulRpbVWqh0suDIqMlh9QqDYkmu9Ga781TrW45hqRoyTESXLrbZMoWYgxVDoTDdR9iz_0NAAD__9hCauA) In South Carolina. DeSantis is virtually tied with Nikki Haley in South Carolina for [third place](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jzFvpDAQhX-N6YyGWdtwhYvbQzR7SZu0hhkWZ41BmMTh30dEUbrRvE-f3nPzGvx4WFFfBeLkKQlEcfkrEG_q-vpsbi-3VtL_9km2Rqt8pvhPIO7Hyr_oj6Xk2flwfuu2IKtxrKBgW5lG11g1GovJQs-NHv8AmcGQdrpX4FRVDwYbVeteFd4i4AUMYGVAgSqbHvSglRlobNgACAXE6bGMtEQX6G3f3ue1HJa5CHba9zV9d-oEdjnnMrs0-Xjfl8ifbvaRtxMV2EXOSWA3uHl1_h7PO_rHw8vJBT5kZLeFQxI7kvzBUW5LlMTJxd2nYrO0Zh-CT6YWCu7n7tP7FQAA__8YlGel) .
South Carolina Republicans aren’t buying Establishment Ron’s attempts to hide his radical record. Ron has voted to raise your taxes, supported outsourcing American jobs, and tried to destroy Social Security and Medicare for South Carolina’s seniors.
**DeSantis Tried To Destroy Social Security & Medicare **
DeSantis has voted not to protect Medicare and Social Security for South Carolina’s seniors.
As a congressman, DeSantis voted to raise the eligibility age to 70 to receive full Social Security benefits—in [2013](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8FOwzAQRL9mc2u0Xttr9-ADJcqlwBWuTew0pg6O4rSlf4-CENeZ0dO80zSnODwcmAMQjdEXIAL5BERHdfh44-P7sdn5l-Z117BW962lZyBaH3P4n_5R6jCdYtpS01TeaRoEVsEJttqQsJqq0eF-MLwnIdiw1LZjK70nb6wMRpi-q6IjJImMJBgVqtp2qHutuPeDDYwICn0olzz4_HVK_nNdrtNc93mqkhvXdS6_n1qgtk9hudRjvpZQn_MNqA23AtQSCgnULjkltFx_T6lanJ_vMaVY2IDC8yayMX8CAAD__8gqU0A) , in [2014](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j71OwzAUhZ_meqt1feufZPBAibIEWGFNbKcxdXAUpy19exSEWM85-nS-fl5SHB8WzAmIpugLEMHxCYg6efp409171xz8S_N6aLSS972lZyDaHkv4n_5ReJj7mPbUNMxbRaNAFqzQlTIkKkVsss70pkbpJCpEL0ZDA7mjGXxNTtZhYNES0hE1ktAoUfJqQOWU1M6PVdCIINGHcsmjz1998p_bep0X7vLMkp22bSm_n1qg1qWwXviUryXwc74BteFWgFpCIYHaNackjOLfc2Kr9cs9phSLNiDxvIvszJ8AAAD__y6KU-A) , and in [2015](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8tOwzAURL_mZlfr-savLrygRNkU2MI29aMxdXAUpy39exSE2M6MjuYM05xTfFjQByAak69ABO0TEB3F4eNNHd-P3c6_dK-7Tklx31p6BqL1MYf_6R-FhWlIeUt113grKXJsguXKSE3cSGpGK2KIp9iGvZQnHRwfjHAKhfF71-o9mSZZQmpRIXGFAgUzJ5ROCuV8NEEhgkAf6qVEX76G7D_X5TrNzJWpyXZc17n-fuqBepfDcmFjudbAzuUG1IdbBeoJuQTql5Izbw37nnKzWD_fU86pKg0Cz5vIxvwJAAD__3AkVDE) .
Before DeSantis was even elected to Congress, he said it was “ [necessary to make reforms](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8jz1P8zAUhX-NvTW6uf5KBw9vX6tLCwMLMDr-IAaHWI1D1H-PjBDr89x7dI6dS07xrok6EcQp-ZUgEvaPIF746eVRXp4v5uCv5uFgpOB7s_ifINZ7CX-nvyldmG3KjSpDvRYYe6BB93IQCvtBIJ20hRCZU_EYmT0qNkqpQsDBj8IFe4ycJo2ADCRgL4ED74YRhBNcOh-HIAEIBx_WjyX65dNm_15v21w6t8w066nWsv50OhM87_ve3ZetbmNovhFb3UTY-YswE66GPZWTn7dXetO-7CnntEpFOLy1He3lOwAA__-TFVVb) ” to Social Security.
On DeSantis’ first day in Congress, he called “ [to restructure some of these entitlements](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81OwzAQhJ9mc2u0Wf_EPfjQEvVSQOJQwTWJbWLqNFHtYuXtkRHi-n27o5l-XoN3m4b2CESTNxGIgB2A6MyPH6_y_H7udua5e9l1UvBcLD0BUdpW-3_6l1Lbufeh0LarjBbkGqysbqQSLTVKUDVp4pxU4wQb2r0cXe_UXqCSqnE9OjuwymtCYiiRGokcea0GFKPgcjROWYkIHI2N18WZ5dYH85Xuj3mtx2Wugp5SWuNvpxPQKedcb8sjPQZbfCF9Gidgp29gnbqycMmHt9slAskErKN9G6u7Nmv2IfgoW-D4WSaV758AAAD__4kbVyI) ,” such as Social Security.
In Congress, DeSantis voted twice to cut Medicare benefits in [2015](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j81O6zAUhJ_mZFfr-PgnvgsvbomyCbCFrRvbjamDozht6dujIMR2ZvRpPjcvOcWHhfYIRFPyFYhA_AeiQR7fX_XwNnQH_9y9HDqt5H1v6QmItscS_qa_FBZml_Ketl3jraLIsQmWa6Na4kZRM1nHT1KPrdNBihgjSocklOJOIKl_JjTJEpJAjcQ1SpTMnFCNSurRRxM0Ikj0oV5K9OXTZf-xrdd5YWOZm2ynbVvqz6ceqB9zWC9sKtca2LncgPpwq0A9IVdA_Vpy5kawrzk3q_XLPeWcqm5B4nkX2ZnfAQAA__8Y1lOr) and [2017](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j8FugzAQRL9muQWtl7UhBx-aIi60vbZXjO3gxtQIk6T5-4qq6nVm9DRvmJcY_ENDfQKiKdgMRFA9AVHPp4831b_37cG-tK-HVkm-7y09A9H2WNz_9I9SunkIcU_rtrBakhdYOC1UI2sSjaRi0sZWiq2pnGd3rIRh4ys5MFtlvBi5LoImpAoVklDIyGVjUI6S1Wh94xQiMFqXL8nb9DVE-7mt13kpxzQXUU_btuTfTx1QN0a3XsopXbMrz-kG1LlbBuoIRQ3UrSlG2RzL7zkWq7bLPcQYsqqB8byL7MyfAAAA__-UjlSB) .
A disciple of Paul Ryan, DeSantis [said in one interview,](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j7FS6zAQRb9m3cWzWkkrp1Dx8jRpEihogFK2ZGywsSaW8eTvGTEM7Tm7d-71c5rG_m7BnIBoGMMKRCD_AdFFnV4e-fJ8cYdwdQ8Hx1rtxdJ_IMr3FP9Of1PqOPtxKtS4KlhNvcAqWsGNNiQaTdVgvTBGG-4C-RZbjrH32B-VbIM4dsymGi0hSWQkwahQ1U2LutOKu9A3kRFBYYjrx9KH5dNP4T3ftjnV3TJXkx1yTutPpzPQed_3-r5seWtj8YX43A0gz18gXbw6-ZROYd5egTiDdEIYXKubDWkfp2lc2YDCt7KpvH8HAAD__zk6V8I) “I would embrace proposals like Paul Ryan offered, and other people have offered, that are going to provide some market forces in there, more consumer choice, and make it so that it’s not just basically a system that’s just going to be bankrupt when you have new people coming into it.”
[ ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j7FS6zAQRb9m3cWzWkkrp1Dx8jRpEihogFK2ZGywsSaW8eTvGTEM7Tm7d-71c5rG_m7BnIBoGMMKRCD_AdFFnV4e-fJ8cYdwdQ8Hx1rtxdJ_IMr3FP9Of1PqOPtxKtS4KlhNvcAqWsGNNiQaTdVgvTBGG-4C-RZbjrH32B-VbIM4dsymGi0hSWQkwahQ1U2LutOKu9A3kRFBYYjrx9KH5dNP4T3ftjnV3TJXkx1yTutPpzPQed_3-r5seWtj8YX43A0gz18gXbw6-ZROYd5egTiDdEIYXKubDWkfp2lc2YDCt7KpvH8HAAD__zk6V8I)
[WATCH: Ron DeSantis Calls To Restructure Social Security and Medicare](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8j7FS6zAQRb9m3cWzWkkrp1Dx8jRpEihogFK2ZGywsSaW8eTvGTEM7Tm7d-71c5rG_m7BnIBoGMMKRCD_AdFFnV4e-fJ8cYdwdQ8Hx1rtxdJ_IMr3FP9Of1PqOPtxKtS4KlhNvcAqWsGNNiQaTdVgvTBGG-4C-RZbjrH32B-VbIM4dsymGi0hSWQkwahQ1U2LutOKu9A3kRFBYYjrx9KH5dNP4T3ftjnV3TJXkx1yTutPpzPQed_3-r5seWtj8YX43A0gz18gXbw6-ZROYd5egTiDdEIYXKubDWkfp2lc2YDCt7KpvH8HAAD__zk6V8I) ****
**DeSantis’ Disastrous Trade Record**

body:
Student debt is a crisis in our country. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvPUXzjt45g4yKutCkMn7sqYSr8aaH5AbbqAijCHzJEYyYcc_t6HS0sDlTmDyIVNHHFmM0cwrmcuRHCXmk7WhSIRH_7qnbZl2-PdFtSWa80EWAWSRj9Eej2on388bVYjAbRwRlFzcefDBfr3_NJ7CXhOSRVJxqz1l8mznpLaby7_rt2cbt2fGgJSo7NMd16BNUV29myQJaGs-h0wJFPmyr0gpcFgJRN3zJMZ9KTfUY_LPC-hw1XBRJNF98xNoNa_bm-aj4vg1dCb-h9G5Z0QiyQg/3wp/1IOxzmjLRR2V73RpDPDVuQ/h0/X-e3mZrqgA0EYUEDpqUICYcHencjE_ne8FX6Mxc79FQ)

Friend, Last night, I held a community conversation event in my district where a number of residents expressed concern over the education debt crisis in our country and the impacts on their lives. **As we were holding this event, the Senate, with no public input, passed a measure that would reverse the Biden education debt relief program.** Fortunately, President Biden will veto this attack on the millions of people trapped under crushing education debt. But we know that even if the president’s education debt relief plan finally goes through, this one-time cancellation of federal student loans is not enough. **We need to cancel ALL education debt.** President Biden took action on the education debt crisis because of the continuous pressure from our progressive movement. The plan announced would provide $10,000 in relief for federal education debt for anyone who made less than $125,000 in 2020 or 2021—and to cancel an additional $10,000 for anyone who received Federal Pell Grants. **We can't stop fighting for debt relief. The extremist right-wing Supreme Court has held up the president’s student debt relief plan, and yesterday some Democrats in the Senate joined Republicans in overturning Biden’s plan.** [**Add your name now to demonstrate your support for President Biden’s student debt relief plan as he vetoes terrible student loan legislation. clean_body: Student debt is a crisis in our country. | | | Friend, Last night, I held a community conversation event in my district where a number of residents expressed concern over the education debt crisis in our country and the impacts on their lives. As we were holding this event, the Senate, with no public input, passed a measure that would reverse the Biden education debt relief program. Fortunately, President Biden will veto this attack on the millions of people trapped under crushing education debt. But we know that even if the president’s education debt relief plan finally goes through, this one-time cancellation of federal student loans is not enough. We need to cancel ALL education debt. President Biden took action on the education debt crisis because of the continuous pressure from our progressive movement. The plan announced would provide $10,000 in relief for federal education debt for anyone who made less than $125,000 in 2020 or 2021—and to cancel an additional $10,000 for anyone who received Federal Pell Grants. We can't stop fighting for debt relief. The extremist right-wing Supreme Court has held up the president’s student debt relief plan, and yesterday some Democrats in the Senate joined Republicans in overturning Biden’s plan. | Loans with high interest rates keep people mired in debt their whole lives, simply for seeking higher education. It is important to note that education debt is a racial and social justice issue: Student loans widen the racial wealth gap and disproportionately harm Black women. Right now, 43 million Americans are saddled with education debt, which further entrenches systemic racism and the cycle of poverty. Canceling student debt would relieve a heavy burden from struggling families and get us closer to a world where we can all not only survive, but thrive. In solidarity, Rashida (1) Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . The Left is pushing its agenda into EVERY ASPECT of our lives.****

**_Everything has to be some kind of woke message, and if you don't obey, they will cancel you or as they like to say, “take to the streets”._**

_We’re sick of it._

It’s time for America to get back to our roots and ditch the socialist agenda.

[**Do you agree we should purge woke from our culture and TAKE BACK America?**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2307211577e043648b85117ffdb69856&_e=0ZFDGAHFqO-thOMdrdjXaI01mFCNbKCpXIDfLsrwvrTtoqVk510J557Gu0I4BXZFY-jcBscDZvuqNJ0NkYz3eA2_HKSGMikb14SvUu9zYL91hSC3RDiMZSdsUQvG0GjVwh-EqcE2p7e9dAlOzIObLWVrpWUHgcsqDAa4IxXVLV6Uovb2ktdtg7gQII-pfmC4E2BDzUEnS2I1qA3XN8XwyyFX9pQqdls13D3Y_eNC_wSsuF8Ud7cz9i7EK8qd_2tN3ehgbAw0bty_wWggiKFO1HYIZGoRea3AIWmSrhYgy2LALji4FK4YtcrodcTn5msfh5QsHYZeyCjbZ-PSmAdLiwtExoKCRKCka8MT91IfyGq0MelYumwWQ6P_dS0Z3cyILbgx4q_twWiRf3MfM_m5CBsrrBCjCk6kpOvMQG4lqlc%3D)

For too long, we’ve let the Left erase American culture.

__**That ends today.**__

From our movies to schools, socialist ideology has seeped into almost every aspect of our lives.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: As we mark National Gun Violence Awareness Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I wanted to say thank you. Everyone who contributed to our campaign ahead of our May fundraising deadline was crucial to our team hitting our goal.

As we prepare for another competitive race next year, consistently hitting our fundraising benchmarks is so important. Every bit of support we get will make a difference, so thanks for helping to power our campaign.

Today, we’re marking National Gun Violence Awareness Day. This is an important opportunity for us to remember those we’ve lost to unnecessary gun violence across our country, and to commit to a safer future by passing meaningful, common-sense gun safety legislation.

**[Will you join me in taking a stand against gun violence as we mark National Gun Violence Awareness Day today? Sign on to commit to fighting for our families’ safety.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64222313/409401239/1463495286?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230602_PT_NGVAD.1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_NGVAD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTU2NDVhZS02MDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xt57dNja-2TKtykZAV0GfNiqr-QZxAtPEv6LU2rDemE=&emci=9e69f1ba-4601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f95645ae-6001-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64222316/409401247/1463495286?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230602_PT_NGVAD.1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_NGVAD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTU2NDVhZS02MDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xt57dNja-2TKtykZAV0GfNiqr-QZxAtPEv6LU2rDemE=&emci=9e69f1ba-4601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f95645ae-6001-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

In the last legislative session, I’m proud to have helped pass a bipartisan gun safety law that closes critical loopholes—like the one that allowed convicted domestic violence offenders to purchase weapons. I trust responsible gun owners, but these common-sense measures are something all of us can get behind so that we don't have to be afraid to send our kids to school, go to a concert, or even visit our place of worship.

**[If you agree, use your voice by signing my petition before midnight tonight to commit to fighting for a safer America for everyone→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64222319/409401250/1463495286?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230602_PT_NGVAD.1.1_0_1MO_candidate_NA_NA_NGVAD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTU2NDVhZS02MDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xt57dNja-2TKtykZAV0GfNiqr-QZxAtPEv6LU2rDemE=&emci=9e69f1ba-4601-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f95645ae-6001-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

Thank you,
Sharice

name: NDRC Elections Update
subject: The good news just keeps coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, we’ve had _a lot_ to celebrate lately. | **FIRST:**
Despite GOP megadonors spending millions in an effort to elect their preferred justice, Wisconsin voters made their voices heard in April by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a commanding margin. A.G. Holder called it **“a critical victory for our democracy.”**

**THEN:**
Last month, our grassroots movement helped Democrat Heather Boyd win an important special election in Pennsylvania, ensuring the state House would remain blue and continue to hold the chamber for the first time in years.

**NOW:
_We need to keep this momentum going!_**

**In the coming months, more than 30 states will hold elections for their highest courts, and state-level elections in places like Kentucky, New Jersey, Tennessee, and Virginia will have major impacts on the future of abortion rights, voting, rights, and more.

[_Will you donate now to power the NDRC’s work so we can help secure more victories for democracy in key states across the county?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64222406/409401455/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230602_FR_6B_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTY0NWFlLTYwMDEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bxA3wMVK4g-Sb7LHteRTeenZDZI6eYTI1tR51OX0ICg=)**

clean_body: | Team, we’ve had a lot to celebrate lately. | FIRST: Despite GOP megadonors spending millions in an effort to elect their preferred justice, Wisconsin voters made their voices heard in April by electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a commanding margin. A.G. Holder called it “a critical victory for our democracy.” THEN: Last month, our grassroots movement helped Democrat Heather Boyd win an important special election in Pennsylvania, ensuring the state House would remain blue and continue to hold the chamber for the first time in years. NOW: We need to keep this momentum going! In the coming months, more than 30 states will hold elections for their highest courts, and state-level elections in places like Kentucky, New Jersey, Tennessee, and Virginia will have major impacts on the future of abortion rights, voting, rights, and more. = | = = Successes like these are only possible because of grassroots supporters like you, team. We know not everyone can give every time we ask, but if even just 20% of people reading this email make a donation – of any amount – it will go a long way toward powering our work. Will you pitch in? If you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Republicans just released a new poll **Peter, this is big.** Republican polling firm _Cygnal_ just released a brand new poll claiming this race is TIGHT: **Governor Andy Beshear: 46.8%**
**Daniel Cameron: 46.7%**

[DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64223036/409404453/907170691?refcode=em23_230602_poll_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230602_poll_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=266466c3-6201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY0NjZjMy02MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=03ekBK9qnNMYGCtLLwMrvGafOsmvzq6RyKKqx-Z2L7U=)
And we should treat it that way.

In Kentucky, governor’s races are often very close. Andy won by just 5,136 votes in 2019. That’s why we are building the largest organizing program in the state’s history, and we couldn’t be prouder of our key advantage: YOU.

But they also tipped their hands about their strategy, admitting that “nationalizing the race” is their only way to try to win. You know what that means.

Get ready for every outlandish thing you hear people yelling about on cable news and on Twitter to come to your TV soon. Because our opponent knows that if this campaign is about who can create good jobs, who will protect our public schools and who can lead our state through tough times with compassion and strength, Andy is going to win.

name: Conservative Direct
subject: Thomas Sowell: Trickle Down Theory and Tax Cuts for the Rich
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWZoZUaDN0

I hear from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of
their heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm
thrilled to share ....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWZoZUaDN0

Dear
Friend,

I hear
from people all the time that Thomas Sowell is one of their
heroes. For those people-and you may be among them-I'm thrilled
to share a digital copy of one of his commentaries with you,
absolutely free: "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts for the
Rich."

"Tax cuts
for the rich" is a favorite argument of those who oppose lower
tax rates. But does imposing higher tax rates on wealthy
Americans actually increase the amount of revenue coming into the
federal government?

Hoover
Institution Senior Fellow Thomas Sowell takes an empirical
approach in his commentary, "Trickle Down" Theory and "Tax Cuts
for the Rich."

Sowell
separates fact from fiction when it comes to tax rates and uses
real life data and examples to prove that lower tax rates for all
actually lead to greater revenue for the government.

As a
friend and supporter of the Hoover Institution, we are proud to
offer you this valuable, thought-provoking resource free of
charge. Click here to get your free copy of "Trickle Down" Theory
and "Tax Cuts for the Rich" now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

body:
https://www.crouchforindiana.com/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=2e1519f0c1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share four endorsements I received...
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=2e1519f0c1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I’m proud to endorse Suzanne Crouch. I’ve worked with Suzanne for fifteen years, and she’s a public servant who is direct, motivated, visionary, and experienced. Suzanne runs entire departments of state government and has done an excellent job in so many different ways. Suzanne will deliver results that move Indiana forward!"
Randy Head, Former State Senator, SD-18
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=2e1519f0c1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"We need Suzanne’s experience and leadership to keep the state's investment momentum going strong. I’m proud to support her."
Mayor Bob Courtney, Madison
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=2e1519f0c1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"Suzanne Crouch is a dedicated public servant who understands how local, county government impacts the lives of Hoosiers. She has been a dedicated partner to us, and she will continue to work to ensure that her local partners have the necessary tools to provide the best services available. We are honored to endorse her as Indiana's next Governor."
Commissioners Nelson Peters, Richard Beck, & Therese Brown, Allen County
https://www.facebook.com/CrouchForIndiana?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=2e1519f0c1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_07_19_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2ce86c6d5c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
"I am proud to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. With her extensive experience, effective leadership, and unwavering commitment to supporting regional areas like South Bend, she has consistently demonstrated the ability to drive positive change and uplift communities across our state."
Councilman Eli Wax, South Bend 5th District

clean_body: Throughout my campaign for Governor, I have been blessed to meet and share my vision for Indiana with Hoosiers. We are hitting the ground running with so much support across the state. This week, I am honored to share four endorsements I received... "I’m proud to endorse Suzanne Crouch. I’ve worked with Suzanne for fifteen years, and she’s a public servant who is direct, motivated, visionary, and experienced. Suzanne runs entire departments of state government and has done an excellent job in so many different ways. Suzanne will deliver results that move Indiana forward!" Randy Head, Former State Senator, SD-18 "We need Suzanne’s experience and leadership to keep the state's investment momentum going strong. I’m proud to support her." Mayor Bob Courtney, Madison "Suzanne Crouch is a dedicated public servant who understands how local, county government impacts the lives of Hoosiers. She has been a dedicated partner to us, and she will continue to work to ensure that her local partners have the necessary tools to provide the best services available. We are honored to endorse her as Indiana's next Governor." Commissioners Nelson Peters, Richard Beck, & Therese Brown, Allen County "I am proud to endorse Suzanne Crouch for Governor of Indiana. With her extensive experience, effective leadership, and unwavering commitment to supporting regional areas like South Bend, she has consistently demonstrated the ability to drive positive change and uplift communities across our state." Councilman Eli Wax, South Bend 5th District DONATE () SHOP NOW () THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! STAY TUNED FOR MORE ENDORSEMENTS TO COME! ============================================================ Copyright © 2023 Suzanne Crouch for Indiana, All rights reserved.

Hey team,

I know you’ve heard a lot from us over the past week, but I just wanted to reach out to say thank you. With the support of folks like you – chipping in what you can, when you can – we were able to surpass our May online fundraising goal!

**This has been and always will be a grassroots campaign.** The progress we’re able to make for children and families throughout our community is directly fueled by you.

I hope you know how grateful we are to have you on our team.

Appreciate you!

Greg

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Eric Sorensen is counting on us.
body:
We did an incredible job getting Eric across the finish line in 2022 | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64223675/409406403/-665437442?refcode=em-6.2.23-nopnrs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEzMGJmOC02NDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtTDzQ_uKUSgd7daaqdcCDoChXyAASBNTcVSSkSv0sQ=)

Hi Peter, it’s U.S. Senator Dick Durbin.

I was elated when I got the news that Eric Sorensen had been elected in Illinois’ 17th District. I had the opportunity to meet with him before his election, and it was immediately clear that he had our constituents' best interests at heart.

Now that he’s in Congress, he’s been a reliable ally in our work to deliver for the people of Illinois – on clean water investments, supporting the renewable energy transition, and so much more.

Now here’s the bad news:

**National Republicans are attacking Eric relentlessly, and a new GOP opponent announced a bid to try and flip his seat red. Because Eric was just elected, they see him as a top target to go after in their effort to keep the House in Kevin McCarthy’s control.**

Eric’s been fighting hard for the people of IL-17, and it’d be a big loss for our state if the GOP gets their way. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join me in bolstering his re-election campaign with a donation today.

Here's the truth: The House will be won or lost in Illinois. We did an incredible job getting Eric across the finish line in 2022, but national Republicans are focusing major resources on newly-elected Democrats like Eric.

Early resources are crucial to setting the right tone and building momentum. So I hope you'll chip in to Eric's campaign today.

**[Every dollar given today will go directly to work keeping IL-17 blue and fending off the vicious attacks against Eric.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64223683/409406438/-665437442?refcode=em-6.2.23-nopnrs-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEzMGJmOC02NDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtTDzQ_uKUSgd7daaqdcCDoChXyAASBNTcVSSkSv0sQ=)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: “Woke chicken”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
No American wants to live outraged about something new every day -- even "woke chicken."

Friends -
All across the country, families are hurting and rights are being rolled back by far-right Republican leaders who fan the flames of the culture wars to distract from the fact that on health, wealth and economic outcomes, they are failing.
Today's target: right-wing favorite Chick-Fil-A - for hiring a VP of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-june-23?refcode=em230602-1-E&refcode2=1407_4767699_jK21CQ&akid=1407%2E4767699%2EjK21CQ)
We simply cannot give up on Americans who are being sold anger and outrage about diversity and inclusion, fear and panic about crime, but calm indifference to climate change, health care and income inequalities.
That’s why I started the Campaign for Democracy.
No American wants to live outraged about something new every day -- even "woke chicken."
They just want a better life for their families. That's a message Democrats can deliver.
Gavin Newsom
* * *

🐔 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.

We simply cannot give up on Americans who are being sold anger and outrage about diversity and inclusion, fear and panic about crime, but calm indifference to climate change, health care and income inequalities. That’s why I started the Campaign for Democracy. No American wants to live outraged about something new every day -- even "woke chicken." They just want a better life for their families. That's a message Democrats can deliver. Gavin Newsom 🐔 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸 All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy. If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | **

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Which issues matter most to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
This will inform our policy priorities.
#
Winning this race is about more than defeating George Santos.
**The reason I am running for Congress** is to deliver results for my hometown, my neighbors, and the everyday Americans that Santos and his MAGA cronies have been ignoring.
Unlike them, I am not here to ignore your concerns and waste time and resources pushing an extreme agenda — **I am here to listen and act.** This leads me to an important question...
[**Which issues matter most to you? My team has put together a simple, 30-second survey where you can share what’s on your mind and what you would like to see our campaign to focus on.**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230602&akid=89%2E8507%2EYbSF6x)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230602&akid=89%2E8507%2EYbSF6x)**
_Based on your responses, I will share more on how these issues affect our community and how I plan to address them when I am in Congress._
My hometown, New York’s 3rd congressional district, is not the same as it was when I was growing up.
This district has always been a place where families like mine could put down roots so their kids could grow up and prosper, with both access to the opportunity of the city and the community of the suburbs. However, **it has become too expensive and too hard to make a life here.**

Families who have been here for generations are watching their children move away. Home prices and rents are up. Local businesses are struggling with inflation. Residents aren’t sure what the future holds.
On top of that, our nation is struggling to address climate change, protect abortion rights, and provide crucial funding and support for public teachers and students.
**These are just a few of the issues on my mind and the minds of my neighbors** — both Republicans and Democrats alike. But for me to provide the kind of honest, action-driven representation we all deserve, I need to hear from as many people as possible.
[**Will you take 30 seconds to respond to our Issues Survey?**](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230602&akid=89%2E8507%2EYbSF6x)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.zakforcongress.com/survey/take-our-issues-survey/?source=em20230602&akid=89%2E8507%2EYbSF6x)**
Thanks for taking the time, I really appreciate it.
— Zak
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=89%2E8507%2EYbSF6x)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=89%2E8507%2EYbSF6x)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106e20ece3704145bbe69336bee8a124&_e=ntzqIfwg8xKuv3XB08gC-K0u-C_EkxLWigSn-aGoa-M4-Y0Jj1Kmi4WPu5XqyRyGnW0hZiuUBFHJ_nuZMVXCheMSeUnQwou_29LEBN_QCNChAoOD72ObR1CNKk7rx13CHAaZ3T9D67ttO7qk1GzvnL2NvnfLrSZZCvHenF9DccBCtMsjglomjbki5FdwmVAgc9TAZ2EoeSlnWn4lYjH_PzG7jcEOBJwxWjGcEcbr0hPulkRHOsC_3oogBJqXlS7h) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106e20ece3704145bbe69336bee8a124&_e=ntzqIfwg8xKuv3XB08gC-K0u-C_EkxLWigSn-aGoa-M4-Y0Jj1Kmi4WPu5XqyRyGnW0hZiuUBFHJ_nuZMVXCheMSeUnQwou_29LEBN_QCNDchu-cswc9yiGUMMWvJ-7hA6uEMowvK2IYCNM_g4zUwbOnmLWbruy_1fpTaDWHg5dZLp76A_0VCxYlsVvO4GX1h7Jmg65QdE6mC3YQuEX40-iD77hOJnEJk0hZL_D7MEMuada4AYD4WSyMaKfhwA5e) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=106e20ece3704145bbe69336bee8a124&_e=ntzqIfwg8xKuv3XB08gC-K0u-C_EkxLWigSn-aGoa-M4-Y0Jj1Kmi4WPu5XqyRyGnW0hZiuUBFHJ_nuZMVXCheMSeUnQwou_29LEBN_QCNB3Kw-OVob2wZ5TI6gK46YBGT19HForqwYT2qFp6Eoxox-WxsV_zryP2_exWkkPh2jQeqjizYwgo79rA_iT4tYxFfoBgeNBadY63ogADq5nUmWHWWCQQ4O3dV1ZdxNnA8bybsXszi3RgNYLaZ9Kcy5w)
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=106e20ece3704145bbe69336bee8a124&_t=HPSxx7ecXRi5KL-fKTrx_maWxr5hmRgdw4htBcmXVaKI5k2Xth3Qf8zmTEdnAzdwfZXR7EUzSv_6iainhvMf3Z52hJ644cmYZZD1eEZDrxFWgYPHeCOnY36m18s52gpFd-rgA1Ht5feG8Pww3x4KfNbk0wf3XWUpsHySILb-ccQ%3D)

subject: Join us Saturday June 3 in New Haven 1-6PM!
body:
Join our GNGHP table at QRiver Fest 2023!

** Get your Green on!
------------------------------------------------------------

** GNHGP is tabling!
Join us at QRiver Fest!
Saturday June 3
1-6PM
------------------------------------------------------------

Engage the Public! Talk Green Politics! Gather recruits to our chapter! Get email signups, donations, goodwill!

HOPE TO SEE YOU THERE!

More Info Here (https://www.qriverfestct.com)
reply to this email w/any questions

** Past Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** Guilford 1st Annual PRIDE Festival and Parade!
------------------------------------------------------------
(was May 20th)

This event was a big success, lots of vendors, lots of attendees, very positive vibe, great to see!

** Upcoming Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** JUNE 14 GNGHP MEETING - 7PM
Please join us by Zoom for this important meeting - approving bylaws, officer elections and more!
------------------------------------------------------------

** REGISTER HERE (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcscuigqjkrGdGl9Vf0x0Godup8SoJcb8eq)
------------------------------------------------------------

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!

Find our chapterBylaws
HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .

clean_body: We've been hard at work fighting for conservative causes in Congress, and we couldn't have achieved the victories we did without your support.| | | | | Hi Peter, Jessica Anderson here from Heritage Action with our End-of-Month May progress report. We've been hard at work fighting for conservative causes in Congress, and we couldn't have achieved the victories we did without your support. As we measure our success by the conservative victories we achieve, your generous support plays a vital role in fueling our fight. With your donation, we can stay on track to reach our June goal and continue championing the conservative fights. We are now in the final hours; every contribution makes a difference. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to Heritage Action in these critical fights. Let's seize this opportunity to start June strong and set the stage for even more conservative victories ahead. Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action | Heritage Action is proud to be the most effective grassroots conservative organization around. We turn conservative rhetoric into meaningful action and campaigns. Check out some of our leading initiatives below. | | | | | | | | Go that extra mile to support Heritage Action with a or at our . | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. This past week Nikki spent time on the campaign trail in Connecticut and New York. I was able to make the tail end of these swings as she made her pitch as a two-term governor and UN ambassador. By the way – she's the only candidate on the stage that has both executive and foreign policy experience. Nikki’s working non-stop to get her message out to every voter. That’s because it’s so important that every person gets a chance to hear from Nikki. In 2005, when Nikki was running for the South Carolina House of Representatives, it was a very tough race. We went to dinner one evening at a local Thai restaurant and Nikki’s fortune cookie read, “Winners do what losers don’t want to.” This is a motto we both still use today. As a matter of fact, you can get your Nikki Haley t-shirt https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80de874a62243c7fbc164766a1873d6f28cea6dc662420975601c9000e74efaa2c736012771866aca0f4a4e43d36d13e6191402a731173c951f0ed9230c0a3e3 here with this cool slogan. But it’s a reminder for us that every vote matters, and Nikki will outwork every person to get her message out. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80de874a62243c7fbc164766a1873d6f28cea6dc662420975601c9000e74efaa2c736012771866aca0f4a4e43d36d13e6191402a731173c951f0ed9230c0a3e3 If you chip in $5 or more on today’s $5 Friday, we’ll send you a “Winners do what losers don’t want to” t-shirt. In a few hours we are heading to Iowa for a packed weekend! And don’t forget Nikki will be doing the CNN town hall Sunday evening. Spread the word to tune in! https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=80de874a62243c7fbc164766a1873d6f28cea6dc662420975601c9000e74efaa2c736012771866aca0f4a4e43d36d13e6191402a731173c951f0ed9230c0a3e3 Oh, and don’t forget to get your t-shirt by chipping in on this $5 Friday!! The answer is, unequivocally, YES! Grassroots support is what Nikki’s fight to save America is built on. In fact, grassroots conservatives like YOU are the reason Nikki has never lost an election before – from her run for the state legislature to governor.
