body:
As Pride Month begins, we wanted to share with you today some fantastic national organizations that help LGBTQ+ folks secure resources they may need. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64224772/409410885/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNmZTc2Mi02NzAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOuiHrZH4ZJW3VXh528RLOE_Qiov-OLRTAlALwTA_yM=&emci=7e6f51d5-5f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=973fe762-6701-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Happy Pride Month, friends! 🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️ As we kick off the celebration this June, from all of us here at the Fairness Project, I wanted to send a note to all of our LGBTQ+ supporters: Please know that _we see you, we support you, and we will _always_ fight for you._ **We know that our work would not be possible without you!** And we are beyond grateful for your continued support. Here at the Fairness Project, **we believe direct democracy is a vital tool to exercise our collective power.** All of our fights are connected, whether that’s codifying abortion rights, raising wages, protecting access to the ballot box, or advancing LGBTQ+ justice. _When we uplift the most marginalized voices, especially those of queer and trans folks, we _all_ rise. _ [**As Pride Month begins, we wanted to share with you today some fantastic national organizations that help LGBTQ+ folks secure resources they may need.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64224773/409410886/-1790204528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzNmZTc2Mi02NzAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kOuiHrZH4ZJW3VXh528RLOE_Qiov-OLRTAlALwTA_yM=&emci=7e6f51d5-5f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=973fe762-6701-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) We’re in this fight for social and economic justice together, and we couldn’t be more grateful to our supporters who have shown up to support our efforts to win ballot initiatives and improve lives across the country. From our team at the Fairness Project, Happy Pride Month, friends! Kelly Hall
_Executive Director
Fairness Project_
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b193448bb97141e2861874483757ab8a&_e=FMs3W09g3-RZnnaYC4EZuoPC46lo12A0oUMaIjFEzx9QVYHbH9Ndghpbn85lbDLaRbs0Ri-Oa6S3b_2n7L3TcQ9Dzp3I2bjtLQIh1g1yey5mu15ySVPYQF3LrACxrrH7dCGt4VLJxfDQLKp-T3kdGlM6Ryo_xNGjfbcDIuvjoaO2TnJB9UZ8WMycVe7cZHwueziiUAKbFo6oChY0FpfjwIWARnN7yOlDn-kOJ5X6Ha2HV5y8HSe68fbqYtn44lyWHwcX_PubBwK0SeR_S3dBNsz-k3peyddQgAuc_di0sV7kjWFM8IR-JbnHKpFM8isz2nxpDcDEDpyN1bHyzxJeEaXtnBku0Dmk6WA3lhbLtPChkKngqixodd5RHRo0zqSfZb7ULYUv3Z4STh3dBoFGaA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b193448bb97141e2861874483757ab8a&_e=FMs3W09g3-RZnnaYC4EZuoPC46lo12A0oUMaIjFEzx9QVYHbH9Ndghpbn85lbDLaRbs0Ri-Oa6S3b_2n7L3TcQ9Dzp3I2bjtLQIh1g1yey5mu15ySVPYQF3LrACxrrH7dCGt4VLJxfDQLKp-T3kdGlM6Ryo_xNGjfbcDIuvjoaO2TnJB9UZ8WMycVe7cZHwueziiUAKbFo6oChY0FpfjwIWARnN7yOlDn-kOJ5X6Ha2HV5y8HSe68fbqYtn44lyWLgPIdf2Rv9A9xvsVEqdjc0SQObbvgs9fPtOsgBxSb48a8yyPbP0SucqLUkTEH5blmHheTWAt_6RJiTApoUY3fxV71J49jmVNvPteP0GnKPF3LVtJs9aOmYPvGTqLiv4JddXv4KLi7cbOlUAq4295TQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b193448bb97141e2861874483757ab8a&_e=FMs3W09g3-RZnnaYC4EZuoPC46lo12A0oUMaIjFEzx9QVYHbH9Ndghpbn85lbDLaRbs0Ri-Oa6S3b_2n7L3TcQ9Dzp3I2bjtLQIh1g1yey5mu15ySVPYQF3LrACxrrH7dCGt4VLJxfDQLKp-T3kdGlM6Ryo_xNGjfbcDIuvjoaO2TnJB9UZ8WMycVe7cZHwueziiUAKbFo6oChY0FpfjwIWARnN7yOlDn-kOJ5X6Ha2HV5y8HSe68fbqYtn44lyWyofM1YUHZlDoy699JvdosioZrwHBgkXyZk1rfsVyxzA0q8mTsjB9LWdx9Q5owi0fSIQxkNTgNPortZD-uqRsz4SkMPALoMNZwMB-O75BBB6K2bdTLLKZGCmfpe5gDYB7Aj8hfdHEQ8rpESyIxHSvSQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| Freedom Nation Today
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b193448bb97141e2861874483757ab8a&_t=6CSlLFzS4VC8aTJeYhE8lLiraJnebmj2UJGpFXmQ92OnmtA2Y_mqyoZb_boIR-ojDTKItDF79E9w5C6HE-XAg662rfApATk12J9Kqy4NoxR_sFsVB_aHawoAG9nZRuFaFVGVIl5VkuSmKN3FcSgR85awGfBIpae6bwI0891qNqE%3D)

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: I can't explain everything in this email but…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
As the founder of a polling firm and campaign advisor, I prepped lots of urgent memos.

| |
---
| | | Hi, it's Kellyanne...

As the founder of a top polling firm and political advisor, I prepped lots of urgent memos. I drafted them for clients, candidates, and yes... even a president or two.

**So believe me when I say the memo I'm sending you now is especially important.** I can't explain everything in this email, but I'm including a _**[link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764285:JSVF1mIyN:m:1:3299561967:7F39BE557BDC4BFAB05850B388D47F98:r "link")**_ to your full briefing materials:
---
| | | [ACCESS YOUR MEMO HERE >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764285:JSVF1mIyN:m:1:3299561967:7F39BE557BDC4BFAB05850B388D47F98:r "BUTTON")
---
Get your eyes on this ASAP!

Thanks for all you do.
- Kellyanne Conway
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62764285:JSVF1mIyN:m:1:3299561967:7F39BE557BDC4BFAB05850B388D47F98:r "Kellyanne Conway")
---
* * *

| | | In a [stunning admission](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tef2b9f12-1f30-4d66-b5b7-6bbc4b2dbaf2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), Kevin McCarthy revealed that Republicans pushed for cuts to Social Security and Medicare during the debt limit negotiations – but President Biden flat-out refused to even consider it. [Add your name, and join us in thanking President Biden.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1557a88c-de8f-4366-a7b5-3dad8e73580f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And the attacks on Social Security and Medicare continue. Now, McCarthy wants to create a commission to look into future cuts to these programs that millions of Americans rely on every day. We want to thank President Biden for standing his ground – and continuing to do so – and protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican cuts. [Add your name: Thank President Biden for protecting Social Security and Medicare during debt limit negotiations >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62df739c-b787-4c04-9dc7-fe8db3340daa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | **BREAKING NEWS**
**A new poll shows Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked GOP Senate candidate just _one point_ behind Tammy Baldwin.** **[Rush in $10 or any amount to help us win our toss-up race and protect Tammy’s seat >>](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2533?c0=tbe-em-jun23.WrkckF&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230602_PM1_V2_S1&t=4&akid=358%2E35263%2ED9qhTB)** | [DONATE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230602_PM1_V2_S1&t=5&akid=358%2E35263%2ED9qhTB)

Tammy is leading by a _single point_ against Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate for Wisconsin’s Senate race, anti-abortion extremist Representative Mike Gallagher.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6504ac5c349347d4a8cda616dc93ab3c&_e=4TgKL7voD7FS9QV2zwcmKhafx9C4WrAq88G3c0DUxEuJI0z0jT-Se4vHyfShmb37XD54gGw8cBhnvKhmfn5W6FZBpJkMQtZa2uDxJ3kMtZyQbRLHkYseSFfpglckQ6GF49-pyA9ChPcGTK1b9CmraVkckqd45vf7XH7vYPGcN1_-zq_nniv3xjZYk8hfrEEsuY-elH1_LVqFw4e3d-DBPfZtauaZ7sserSbbflchYgMSAMwtvcxQmL5Ay4K9cyYYT_36xWzLYO1jLZmkBG-cdNO6UNtdciFEtchyGvDdjWTYf4TExAcUrxCyu45tV6wsRlNgAIm-GJ8fuRP0VcBfDogftMKyafpi2x9KwyIUaFw7N538Q-lUMmGCKfkXSe5KL_Sa3rGXqhFMZu_Mt02XJg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6504ac5c349347d4a8cda616dc93ab3c&_e=4TgKL7voD7FS9QV2zwcmKhafx9C4WrAq88G3c0DUxEuJI0z0jT-Se4vHyfShmb37XD54gGw8cBhnvKhmfn5W6FZBpJkMQtZa2uDxJ3kMtZyQbRLHkYseSFfpglckQ6GF49-pyA9ChPcGTK1b9CmraVkckqd45vf7XH7vYPGcN1_-zq_nniv3xjZYk8hfrEEsuY-elH1_LVqFw4e3d-DBPfZtauaZ7sserSbbflchYgMSAMwtvcxQmL5Ay4K9cyYY_SaI8bsN39bYDDP08jAbCv4C501qPYw7bJzcJtmJZVyh9rTKQpRmTHnYLG0Un3r1De0-lMdI0OvJEdNbV-7qCyoNHek0O-D4wyJkQfMJYm03B7LKDuaLnrj0eRgRAfegcDr7tEQPJ1ETg3GzpAIKdA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6504ac5c349347d4a8cda616dc93ab3c&_e=4TgKL7voD7FS9QV2zwcmKhafx9C4WrAq88G3c0DUxEuJI0z0jT-Se4vHyfShmb37XD54gGw8cBhnvKhmfn5W6FZBpJkMQtZa2uDxJ3kMtZyQbRLHkYseSFfpglckQ6GF49-pyA9ChPcGTK1b9CmraVkckqd45vf7XH7vYPGcN1_-zq_nniv3xjZYk8hfrEEsuY-elH1_LVqFw4e3d-DBPfZtauaZ7sserSbbflchYgMSAMwtvcxQmL5Ay4K9cyYYaGhTgXpF8DLpLOW91M9clxtwekSx0MFUWzL9QhBjsU31HrFAWQM0WVxIADuzR01M1eJ5UZOCJp4HTQJ73p0ZRBjgzrVRVgWbpfHBZzs_wtS9LcNhskzc2xh4GzxvZA4LAz4qUVYwXHDwLU19khn32g%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=6504ac5c349347d4a8cda616dc93ab3c&_t=f02diNW9KmemK_kltiUaVgi7mmFKpZJpWKZsWav5OdZb64b4GYuCKW8yA2FlH55NOlmJICLO5eeFKt9VxJt2zBgShAbXhu7t7cbt3OjZkfRJYMMOgkn1nJQc0gVCzHMrjVEwfXUjG_Wl14zo6wAwZX4Jm1g9V5SPZNsoxcLh5Cs%3D)

Friend –

This is urgent! I'm reaching out to you personally because I need your help.

I built a group of 5,000 of our top supporters to participate in our critical focus group, **but I still need** _YOUR_**response.**[**Will you take my survey right now?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64226042/409415389/-1657212254?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2665-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzNzg4OGM4LTY4MDEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NhNlWEQiotz5xk-_OeHzjK6relrVUo_FHZsE3FQf_GM=&emci=52e3cfbe-efff-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b37888c8-6801-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=23124236)

1\. We're five months into the new Congress, and the GOP is working to enact their dangerous, destructive agenda – **like cutting Social Security and Medicare and stripping away our fundamental rights.**

As we plan our strategy for the months ahead, we're relying on YOUR input to help us hold Republicans accountable and defeat them at the ballot box.

# No Substitute for Victory
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **I’m making a prediction.**

If Joe Biden wins next year, he will step down a year or two into his second term and hand over the White House to President Kamala Harris, who would finish out Biden’s term and could serve two full terms as president.

Scared yet?

In politics, there is no substitute for victory. Until we win, we don’t govern. Until November 5, 2024, “Winning isn’t everything; it’s the only thing.”

And as I told Trey Gowdy on Fox News, Republicans must focus on nominating the presidential candidate who can defeat Joe Biden. This is all that matters.

---
| [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=4828829194&e=0be619cbaa)
---
| Did 45 accomplish great things as president? Hell yes.

Will swing voters and suburban women acknowledge that or pull the lever for him next year? Hell no.

If the man could walk on water, they’d say he can’t swim.

It’s not fair, but it matters.

Republicans’ mission in these primaries is to select the candidate who has the best chance of victory in the general. I believe that candidate is me, and I intend to prove that in this summer’s debates with the other Republican candidates.

But to qualify for the debates, I need 40,000 individual donors to contribute at least $1.

So I’m asking you to **[throw something in the tip jar](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=519c7f7cce&e=0be619cbaa)** if you want to see the ‘Sage from South Central’ on that debate stage.

Because when that happens, well, hold my beer.

**I’m Larry Elder, and we’ve got a country to save.**
---
|
---

subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.
| | | | [](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)
[](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/james-okeefe-attack-mb-om?utm_source=james-okeefe-attack&utm_medium=om&utm_campaign=mb&utm_term=ftd&amount=25)**.

---

[View this email in your browser](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/v/xZNhzpT4jC?hids=bZJiO67V)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300 Alexandria, VA 22314

[**Unsubscribe**](https://odb.nucleusemail.com/amplify/subscriptions/unsubscribe?hids=bZJiO67V)

name: George Whitesides
subject: [Photos] Our month in review.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226566/409417126/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=)
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your generous support for my campaign. With your help, we met our fundraising goal for the month of May and are headed into the summer months with momentum.

I also wanted to quickly show you what we’ve been up to over the last few weeks. It’s been an eventful month meeting with grassroots and community leaders, and sharing ideas about how we can improve lives in CA-27.

I hope you enjoy the updates below, and thanks again for standing with us.

– George
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226567/409417127/1224595648?refcode=em-6.2.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=)****
---

* * *

On Memorial Day weekend, we honored those who have sacrificed their lives for our country. After a tribute event in Santa Clarita, we stopped by the Veteran Peer Access Network BBQ at the Lancaster Elks Lodge with Assembly Member Juan Carillo.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226568/409417128/1224595648?refcode=em-6.2.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=)
We hosted a jam-packed luncheon at the California Democratic Convention this past weekend. Community leaders from CA-27 showed up in force, and it’s clear there’s a ton of grassroots energy to flip this seat!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226569/409417129/1224595648?refcode=em-6.2.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226570/409417130/1224595648?refcode=em-6.2.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=)
We had a great time celebrating Democratic leaders at the Obama Awards, hosted by the Santa Clarita Valley Democrats. We’re lucky to have these great leaders doing such powerful work.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226571/409417131/1224595648?refcode=em-6.2.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64226572/409417132/1224595648?refcode=em-6.2.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2JhMGY3Ni02YTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WfGb7rcUzT5jX4eODwKKSiRH8VsIlb3MWoT9UWjk44o=)

[I’m more determined than ever to kick this campaign into high gear and build more momentum toward flipping this seat blue. clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your generous support for my campaign. With your help, we met our fundraising goal for the month of May and are headed into the summer months with momentum. I also wanted to quickly show you what we’ve been up to over the last few weeks. It’s been an eventful month meeting with grassroots and community leaders, and sharing ideas about how we can improve lives in CA-27. I hope you enjoy the updates below, and thanks again for standing with us. – George | **= On Memorial Day weekend, we honored those who have sacrificed their lives for our country. After a tribute event in Santa Clarita, we stopped by the Veteran Peer Access Network BBQ at the Lancaster Elks Lodge with Assembly Member Juan Carillo. = We hosted a jam-packed luncheon at the California Democratic Convention this past weekend. Community leaders from CA-27 showed up in force, and it’s clear there’s a ton of grassroots energy to flip this seat! = = We had a great time celebrating Democratic leaders at the Obama Awards, hosted by the Santa Clarita Valley Democrats. We’re lucky to have these great leaders doing such powerful work. = Earlier in the month, we honored leaders in government, labor and non-profits at the LA County Democratic Party's John F. Kennedy Awards. These inspiring honorees are making our communities better places to live. = Events like these give us an opportunity to bring more voices to the table in our shared effort to flip this seat. It’s been a gift to meet so many people across California and learn how I can best represent CA-27 in Congress. = **=** I appreciate your support, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

|

Peter — We fell short of our founding goal. We have the energy we need to win this summer’s special elections and support Democrats across all 95 counties this year and beyond, but we have to have the resources to match it. **We're 13 days away from our first two primary elections of the summer, so we can't afford to fall behind this early. Peter, will you pitch in $13 right now to help us catch up?** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64227009/409418335/1802594825?amount=13&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2M0NjAyNC02YjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZd1rPZQZAYqvEhSIYX8-M1L088HKWB75jy0CKCAJfw=)

**Can we count on your contribution to help us close the gap tonight? **
[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64227011/409418337/1802594825?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2M0NjAyNC02YjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NZd1rPZQZAYqvEhSIYX8-M1L088HKWB75jy0CKCAJfw=)

Monica De La Cruz is already attacking Michelle, claiming that she’s part of some extremist “radical left.” That was fast, Peter. **[We need to respond just as quickly to any attacks that Monica and her team put out against Michelle to make sure Texas voters know who the REAL extremist is. Will you chip in now to our campaign’s Defense Fund to make sure we have the resources to respond to attacks?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_hyAscw898U7hBaCpczLhuhm5IbMsGBgyDxZeiWfcyJW7r0MEWMb5WupzvxAb_ap9e-lprs8mPVMICwkxERnLx0rFMr69iq-CEUY_4p6-WYW2UEH-wumNty_aHg4aWz1E0QTQsJ6pp5ygMEXb086Bli6bq6TsxcjpPDIkKTR8qs4oAeCFCRtvPWM6VBYqK-YPXao76tvbfuq8-TmqFWUySwQZfaYUwBp4PpOvWKnsWhTKoffJPoLjvUOXeSdzk6g4QblLTxPEv7H3kQ0XoRkd0hsBjelid0rbP12eFSjbetO_xnzchxIFasCJ0E7s-Wty-w8H0wtMcs5tA67fTVCbhA/3wp/5iHZ_LnOTLeeGWVSWc8flA/h1/s3h9rq63zfC6tBf2mFzLfBXfrNkVSkdRZ5Yqd8QH0iI)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_hyAscw898U7hBaCpczLhuhm5IbMsGBgyDxZeiWfcyJXGAwUsic8KkZL_vQ5iPV5UW_BPB0bpX2xUWD2oEyl5GvFjKVAn0PTOwrmE0Zfp-6I1Bvnmz59_dwYNTBwKI-n61mkxOXzI8uPMHqEGksKqSMnDCIlVckkBvaIbSm-XtZlwhlyPxkOldii3fPgBncik_klzd8du2KIakDAeszkj7dcC1LCT7cnXvn1Ur6RTl9_nP_Bkj1LqMDhNtp58Dg9E9Mi9Xos77AqE9csWyyoBsOoLytkn2Cn-P1Xf67kDuwEy-s0w8aoeNjj2Cx7KvoTd0pgJcXzEycvAIiVl37R4-g/3wp/5iHZ_LnOTLeeGWVSWc8flA/h2/TpLN6tCRf5M0fcrSaFrFEXBn5wHl0iF8yPXy8VdPhn0)** Monica is trying to brand Michelle as some kind of extreme leftist but we know the truth. The truth is that the issues Michelle stands for — affordable, quality healthcare for all, good-paying jobs, reproductive rights, and common-sense gun reforms are all HUGELY popular among Texans and Americans at large. Meanwhile, Monica has promised to serve the district and represent the needs of TX-15 while her voting record of protecting an indicted fraudster, slashing veterans’ health care, taking away millions from our schools, and even jeopardizing Medicare and Social Security represents the exact opposite. But here’s the other truth, Peter — these attacks are only going to ramp up from here. Monica and her Republican cronies are going to throw everything they’ve got at Michelle and we need to be ready for it. **[We can see Monica’s attacks for what they are — a cheap attempt to distract from her own voting record and the shady, corporate, dark money interests she represents. Now we need to make sure Texan voters know the truth too. Will you chip in to Michelle’s Defense Fund now so that we can make sure we have the funds to respond to any and all attacks against Michelle?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_hyAscw898U7hBaCpczLhuhm5IbMsGBgyDxZeiWfcyJXfdTQ1ryAnsRecCnBC3NX8bqRC06gRcze63SGCN829TirGCl79FMXKATDnGOWeAaWwr0RbjPhFlekQnMof_vnUjqLQD8mSdlxvwpYJ2xzhzzIgNc3GL5z2iy38l7835tERhBfP2eNQYD-85jWxnmFBy4Ja8b8x2KatTgCCf8zYao5dnw7uDL_j1tpHJbuEvXpTk55ZFIwKx9ojXpTlPqJ-lDwiBjR3XfJFssLNpizdMlQ-gluhdzaGzCrqbtXL9swcEXv_LzKB-aG1FBI_O58OaSdFY4DU5cw_LLbPFSgX-A/3wp/5iHZ_LnOTLeeGWVSWc8flA/h3/4ga03FB15ens-L6k0tus8Kc9XuT_8JW6QSqcpvap2WY)** ¡Vamos por Quince! | Team – it's Morgan Dick. As the Executive Director of the Arizona Democratic Party, it’s important that I reach out to you as we enter the halfway mark of 2023.

As the weeks and months pass, we are getting closer to crucial elections that will impact the future of our great state and country. The stakes couldn’t be higher for us to win as many races as we can. These upcoming elections have the power to shape the direction of Arizona for years to come.

**_Your support of the Arizona Democratic Party has been invaluable in our mission to create a better Arizona for all._**

We have made significant progress together in the elections of 2020 and 2022 – _but there is still so much work to be done._ By rallying behind our Democratic candidates right now in June, you can help us mobilize voters, build up our grassroots movement, and win these races.

**[I'm asking for your support in this critical mission by making a contribution of $10 right now. body:
We’ve seen that no one in this country is immune to gun violence – tragedies strike in all forms and all places, even in our schools and movie theaters.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64227601/409420226/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230602-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmFhODdjMWMtNmQwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yle6fbWoue1zZ1RIP5giHxmfHIzi-cAQMNs1U3hAU_M=)

| Peter,

It’s Brian, activist and founder of Stop Gun Violence PAC. I’m emailing you today on National Gun Violence Awareness Day and the start of Gun Violence Awareness Month.

Today also marks the start of Wear Orange Weekend (June 2 - June 4), where we wear the color orange in honor of the many lives lost to gun violence and all those affected by the continued threat of gun violence in our communities.

**We’ve seen that no one in this country is immune to gun violence – tragedies strike in all forms and all places, even in our schools and movie theaters, Peter.**

_Every day in the United States, 120 Americans die from gun violence._

This continued epidemic is hitting our children the hardest, Peter. Firearms recently became one of the number one causes of death for children and teens in the United States.

We must do better for our generation and the next. I’m wearing orange today for all those impacted by gun violence.

[_**I hope you’ll join me and consider donating to Stop Gun Violence PAC to help us elect gun violence prevention champions at all levels of government to stop this vicious cycle:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64227602/409420227/2040588333?refcode=BLU-SGVP-20230602-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmFhODdjMWMtNmQwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Yle6fbWoue1zZ1RIP5giHxmfHIzi-cAQMNs1U3hAU_M=)

subject: Our movement is strong because of people like you

This May, hundreds of people gave what they could when they could. Every ounce of support matters in this fight.

In the last three elections, Republicans have worked hard and spent millions to buy this seat, but our movement proved more powerful each time.

name: Bob Casey
subject: Show your support for LGBTQ+ rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pennsylvania has so much pride in our LGBTQ+ community — but the fight for equality is far from over.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=114%2E552475%2EE0XHSL)
Hi Peter,
Fifty-four years ago this month, police raided the Stonewall Inn, a refuge for the LGBTQ+ community in Manhattan. It wasn't the first time but, that night, led by Black and Latino patrons, they said, "Enough!"
Despite the threat of losing their jobs or homes because of who they were and whom they loved, they protested and sparked the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement. Millions of Americans have continued to fight to not only live authentically and love whom they love -- but to simply exist.
We've seen incredible progress in the years since Stonewall, but constant efforts to turn back the clock continue. Extreme Republicans in states across the nation have passed new laws to further restrict the rights of LGBTQ+ people, while others are attempting to erase their existence entirely.
So this month, I want to encourage you to celebrate Pride with our LGBTQ+ community and show care and compassion for yourselves.
I also want to ask you to take action. We stand at a critical moment where the rights that LGBTQ+ people have won in the courts could easily be erased. And today, too many still face the threat of being evicted or denied services for who they are.
**[It's time for federal legislation to end discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans. If you agree, will you stand with me and demand action this Pride Month?](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-equality-act/?source=em20230602-1&akid=114%2E552475%2EE0XHSL)**
**[Add Your Name ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-equality-act/?source=em20230602-1&akid=114%2E552475%2EE0XHSL)**
We must celebrate Pride, and we must act. I promise to keep fighting for more legislation to protect the civil rights of every American, and I'm glad to have you with me in this fight.
Thank you,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=114%2E552475%2EE0XHSL)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=114%2E552475%2EE0XHSL)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

Millions of Americans have continued to fight to not only live authentically and love whom they love -- but to simply exist. We've seen incredible progress in the years since Stonewall, but constant efforts to turn back the clock continue. Extreme Republicans in states across the nation have passed new laws to further restrict the rights of LGBTQ+ people, while others are attempting to erase their existence entirely. So this month, I want to encourage you to celebrate Pride with our LGBTQ+ community and show care and compassion for yourselves. I also want to ask you to take action. We stand at a critical moment where the rights that LGBTQ+ people have won in the courts could easily be erased. And today, too many still face the threat of being evicted or denied services for who they are. We must celebrate Pride, and we must act. I promise to keep fighting for more legislation to protect the civil rights of every American, and I'm glad to have you with me in this fight. Thank you, Bob Casey

name: Chrissy
subject: re: gun violence awareness day
body:
This past month, I met with Patricia Oliver, mom of Joaquin Oliver, who was murdered in the Parkland shooting.
| | |
---
Derek, this past month, I met with Patricia Oliver, mom of Joaquin Oliver, who was murdered in the Parkland shooting. I read her book, "Joaquin's First School Shooting," and was inspired by her turning grief into action – but **it doesn't have to be this way.**

**This Gun Violence Awareness Day, I am calling on my colleagues in Congress to enact stronger gun violence prevention laws.**
Last year, I helped pass the first bipartisan gun safety legislation in three decades. This piece of legislation was a historic first step, and I commend President Biden's subsequent executive actions expanding background checks, too. But I know these steps aren’t enough. In 2023 alone, we've had more than 260 mass shootings – and we're not even halfway through the year.
With today's Republican Party dead set against commonsense gun reform, I need your support to make sure I can continue to push legislation that will literally save lives. With the gun violence epidemic only worsening, will you consider donating $5 or $25 to this campaign so that I can continue to fight for laws that will save lives and protect our children from gun violence?

clean_body: This past month, I met with Patricia Oliver, mom of Joaquin Oliver, who was murdered in the Parkland shooting. | | | Derek, this past month, I met with Patricia Oliver, mom of Joaquin Oliver, who was murdered in the Parkland shooting. I read her book, "Joaquin's First School Shooting," and was inspired by her turning grief into action – but it doesn't have to be this way. This Gun Violence Awareness Day, I am calling on my colleagues in Congress to enact stronger gun violence prevention laws. Last year, I helped pass the first bipartisan gun safety legislation in three decades. This piece of legislation was a historic first step, and I commend President Biden's subsequent executive actions expanding background checks, too. But I know these steps aren’t enough. In 2023 alone, we've had more than 260 mass shootings – and we're not even halfway through the year. With today's Republican Party dead set against commonsense gun reform, I need your support to make sure I can continue to push legislation that will literally save lives. With the gun violence epidemic only worsening, will you consider donating $5 or $25 to this campaign so that I can continue to fight for laws that will save lives and protect our children from gun violence? | | Here's how we fight back → [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64229216/409425421/-1524463920?sourceid=1050148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmMyZWRjMC02ZjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEgbbfbuZ7Dm6PfdFtSq8mcmDz9wzrtbScKx9-5F3p0=&emci=5557f839-6f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cbc2edc0-6f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) I wish I were writing to you about almost anything else, Peter, but we've got to talk about Ron DeSantis.

The Florida governor, who recently threw his hat in the ring for the Republican presidential nomination, has a dangerous and disturbing political record. His tenure as governor has been an assault on our most basic rights, including (but not limited to!) education, voting, abortion, and, for LGBTQ+ people, simply _existing_. **[Let's show DeSantis that the EMILYs List community is ready to fight back. Donate now to help elect Democratic pro-choice women ready to beat extremists like him everywhere.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64229224/409425429/-1524463920?sourceid=1050148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmMyZWRjMC02ZjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEgbbfbuZ7Dm6PfdFtSq8mcmDz9wzrtbScKx9-5F3p0=&emci=5557f839-6f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cbc2edc0-6f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Ron DeSantis banned critical race theory, restricted discussions on sexual orientation and gender identity, and banned transgender girls and women from sports in Florida's public schools.

He proposed restrictions on mail-in voting and endorsed measures that make it more difficult to launch ballot initiatives.

He signed a bill into law, under the cover of night, that severely restricts abortion access. A few weeks later, he signed bills banning gender-affirming care for minors, targeting drag shows, and forcing Floridians to use bathrooms associated with the sex they were assigned at birth.

This brand of right-wing extremism isn't unique to DeSantis or to Florida — sadly and terrifyingly, I'm watching it creep slowly into my home state of North Carolina as we speak. But Ron DeSantis seems _determined_ to position himself as the figurehead of an increasingly oppressive and bigoted Republican Party, and that should alarm us all.

So, how do we fight back? We elect Democratic pro-choice women in Florida, North Carolina, and every other state attempting to roll back our rights. We support candidates who will protect abortion access, defend voting rights, stand up for LGBTQ+ citizens, and**speak out** against dangerous political leaders. ****If you're as horrified and angry as I am, donate now to help elect women who will fight like hell against Ron DeSantis and everything he stands for:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-June](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64229225/409425431/-1524463920?sourceid=1050148&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmMyZWRjMC02ZjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vEgbbfbuZ7Dm6PfdFtSq8mcmDz9wzrtbScKx9-5F3p0=&emci=5557f839-6f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=cbc2edc0-6f01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers)
Senior Vice President of Communications and Content, EMILYs List

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: STOP THE PRO-ABORTION AGENDA NOW!
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbb16c2abfa44e7952eab7ca2a82ae4&_e=Zy8CxwwrFo3hd9sSv9YKczBQgfJrQ-gDNqUcOxH1KtUgSTm3CyGDB4O-OlLxApIXgzc3FbLNGksGZhnvYM5KkrMyN96ZA_fjNKGrMbqPM1JBUb7aby-5c8eaFHx_F_20yPjX2tYAgtvWKKNAiGJIknTPM38voEFBaOeXil6q5gDVj4dWrmOQxr6VPT905BYLLJwNB8h4tLsd7MSnP7hgSL5_7A9a56-CVXvzZiV0IdYYRfw4dJEsDN5hSVafmw2Kcn3I1Cs34gllNsytA7EFuG11LLCEW7UtEyek0EdTpyGofgwGeAZ_hl0WKPPJZkWQt0RGj5h1jYkLnj2dAssoQ1pQTAhBlsNPbm5SrRB3Tefsy-QSgpWC8l79TNLR_NwBq1rQgaA3dwEhte8FcZkdh-DqsLQI21716HVuu_JMZP8%3D)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbb16c2abfa44e7952eab7ca2a82ae4&_e=Zy8CxwwrFo3hd9sSv9YKczBQgfJrQ-gDNqUcOxH1KtUgSTm3CyGDB4O-OlLxApIXgzc3FbLNGksGZhnvYM5KkrMyN96ZA_fjNKGrMbqPM1JBUb7aby-5c8eaFHx_F_20yPjX2tYAgtvWKKNAiGJIknTPM38voEFBaOeXil6q5gDVj4dWrmOQxr6VPT905BYLLJwNB8h4tLsd7MSnP7hgSL5_7A9a56-CVXvzZiV0IdYYRfw4dJEsDN5hSVafmw2Kcn3I1Cs34gllNsytA7EFuAS1HSc7Q6tibGUFW4YmA3sGBFwBuyQtt0J7UXXyyQG-pYV3HQ0OV31WwenCbcKeeQt5YEZiAxEkBtGn5RJERh6DfgYcxMe7UbMhZKmEZkomCmQJjtqELm50Ho6S5feXbcgL-K2Mgc6dgcFAzv6Wj3U%3D) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbb16c2abfa44e7952eab7ca2a82ae4&_e=Zy8CxwwrFo3hd9sSv9YKczBQgfJrQ-gDNqUcOxH1KtUgSTm3CyGDB4O-OlLxApIXgzc3FbLNGksGZhnvYM5KkrMyN96ZA_fjNKGrMbqPM1JBUb7aby-5c8eaFHx_F_20yPjX2tYAgtvWKKNAiGJIknTPM38voEFBaOeXil6q5gDVj4dWrmOQxr6VPT905BYLLJwNB8h4tLsd7MSnP7hgSL5_7A9a56-CVXvzZiV0IdYYRfw4dJEsDN5hSVafmw2Kcn3I1Cs34gllNsytA7EFuFpwMc24jd8lGop29zUoJGq2-ibwk3Jo-jybFxHDvU0VwPusMmaIKbwatVZqo8DlHcDOyZ6_r36g4LOO1z6K-SuHPHQbB9r7lYLMhTDERV6F8ItvyOCIUFr6KG0XC5SWeVveuOwlRGIyw4PgpMGx43s%3D)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=edbb16c2abfa44e7952eab7ca2a82ae4&_e=Zy8CxwwrFo3hd9sSv9YKczBQgfJrQ-gDNqUcOxH1KtUgSTm3CyGDB4O-OlLxApIXgzc3FbLNGksGZhnvYM5KkrMyN96ZA_fjNKGrMbqPM1JBUb7aby-5c8eaFHx_F_20yPjX2tYAgtvWKKNAiGJIknTPM38voEFBaOeXil6q5gDVj4dWrmOQxr6VPT905BYLLJwNB8h4tLsd7MSnP7hgSL5_7A9a56-CVXvzZiV0IdYYRfw4dJEsDN5hSVafmw2Kcn3I1Cs34gllNsytA7EFuMv1Yp_2ltrInk36P8zqUY-RGf5HEf6jfz4DcRlIimCsPNN5mSut2dsI-8mc2u6T3hOHRkfnxprwg47RLrGWHm1IRWnFfsLJ7cTovlG6tgqWHjqeyiCW92qLUuy1L47ImtX2qYz5TNjwp7kWDAkW4AE%3D)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

clean_body: The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. | Friend, The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law. This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion. The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth! The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life. But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn. The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand. Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts! For LIFE , Marjorie Dannenfelser President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206 Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Team Engel
subject: Showing our appreciation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Friend, we wanted to reach out and say thank you.
Because of your generous support, we exceeded our May fundraising goal.
This is one of the most competitive House seats in this country. Every day, every dollar, and every person makes a difference. With your support, we're that much closer to flipping this seat blue in November and taking back control of the House.
Kirsten Engel is the leader that we deserve in AZ-06 — someone who will always fight for us, not for partisan interests or corporate donors.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060223_ThankYou_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_060223_ThankYou_act]
Together, we'll win this race.

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: An exciting campaign update

body:
Thanks to the generosity of folks like you, we surpassed our May end-of-month fundraising goal! I truly can’t thank you enough. The outpour of support over the last few days proves that, with this grassroots team by our side, our campaign will have what it takes to bring home another historic win for the Birthplace of Champions next fall.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64229730/409427714/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.06.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzlhOGMyNi03MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IY6o40-8yl8rxLPUot4x9HzlTktz7ns8Vk4RU0oADHA=)
Peter,

I know you’ve been hearing from our team a lot this week, but I wanted to share an exciting campaign update with you.

Thanks to the generosity of folks like you, we surpassed our May end-of-month fundraising goal! I truly can’t thank you enough.

The outpour of support over the last few days proves that, with this grassroots team by our side, our campaign will have what it takes to bring home another historic win for the Birthplace of Champions next fall.

**It certainly won’t be easy, but we know Northeast Ohio is worth fighting for.** And with that unending commitment to our community, I know we will get the job done.

Thank you for being a part of this team,

Emilia

[**_P.S. In just four short weeks, our campaign will have to publicly report all of our internal fundraising numbers for only the second time in our re-election campaign. Showcasing the power of our campaign and finishing the quarter off strong is absolutely critical, so is there any amount you can chip in today to help us prepare for our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64229731/409427715/-1747924743?refcode=em_eng_2023.06.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzlhOGMyNi03MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IY6o40-8yl8rxLPUot4x9HzlTktz7ns8Vk4RU0oADHA=)

body:
# [#]Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support this past month. Having you on the team has meant the world to me — truly.

Early investments and grassroots support allow me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 — we’re only just beginning!

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

Josh

| Peter,

We hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to express our gratitude for your incredible support of Fight for Progress.

Thanks to donors like you, we have fueled the campaigns of dedicated Democrats in key battleground states across the nation. Your generosity makes a tangible difference in our mission to reclaim the House from Kevin McCarthy's control and safeguard our Democratic majority in the Senate.

What's truly remarkable is that we are achieving all of this with an average donation of just $13. This is a testament to the power of grassroots movements and the unwavering dedication of individuals like you.

Your commitment to our cause inspires us every day, and we are immensely grateful to have you on our team. Together, we drive positive change and shape a future that reflects our shared values.

**Finally, I want to remind you that June marks the last month before our crucial FEC public fundraising deadline.[_Even a small contribution of $5 can help us send a strong message to Republicans and demonstrate our unwavering determination. Will you join us once again and donate $5 today?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64229848/409428216/-316521012?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230602-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjMjRmYjc4LTcxMDEtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oDKI57SqMCIC_-NOzom6Mgg695uujuEQ4VKkubUP5mU=)**

Your continued support will help us maintain our momentum and ensure a successful path forward. Click the button below to make your contribution securely.

body:
But first things first: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64229837/409428204/17860314?refcode=ea.12d9a86c-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.12d9a86c-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTJkOWE4NmMtNzEwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LylZqmrDaQTThxm3OjKEYtW6xcRJGYD5t7cNKDO9FzE=)

We made it, Peter!

I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you who stood by my side through our crucial fundraising push last month.

I genuinely mean it when I say that without dedicated supporters like you, our movement wouldn’t stand a chance against Tate Reeves and his ultra-rich pals.

Now, it's time to shift into high gear.

**We are nearly _five months_ away from one of the most competitive Election Days in recent Mississippi history and just a few weeks from another make-or-break quarterly deadline.

[Every dollar we raise helps us talk to voters and get our message out all across the state. Can I count on your contribution (no matter the size) to kick off our end-of-quarter push with a bang?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64229838/409428206/1418908854?refcode=ea.12d9a86c-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.12d9a86c-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTJkOWE4NmMtNzEwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LylZqmrDaQTThxm3OjKEYtW6xcRJGYD5t7cNKDO9FzE=)**

Believe me, Peter. I know we ask often. But this fight is worth every penny. And while I don't expect you to give every single time you hear from me or my team, I really hope you'll consider chipping in for this one.

This is our opportunity to rise above corruption and send Tate Reeves packing. It’s our chance to show the special interests and lobbyists in Mississippi that they no longer run the show. And it’s our moment to restore transparency and trust in government.

But I can’t do this without you. So what do you say, Peter? [Can I count on you to chip in today? clean_body: But first things first: | = We made it, Peter! I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you who stood by my side through our crucial fundraising push last month. I genuinely mean it when I say that without dedicated supporters like you, our movement wouldn’t stand a chance against Tate Reeves and his ultra-rich pals. Now, it's time to shift into high gear. We are nearly five months away from one of the most competitive Election Days in recent Mississippi history and just a few weeks from another make-or-break quarterly deadline. = Believe me, Peter. I know we ask often. But this fight is worth every penny. And while I don't expect you to give every single time you hear from me or my team, I really hope you'll consider chipping in for this one. This is our opportunity to rise above corruption and send Tate Reeves packing. It’s our chance to show the special interests and lobbyists in Mississippi that they no longer run the show. And it’s our moment to restore transparency and trust in government. But I can’t do this without you. So what do you say, Peter? = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks again! Brandon Presley = | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to

body:
We need to build on this momentum going into 2024...
| [](https://links.fitzgeraldforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=04bf7ac33c6c4229b3100eaf78fbffae&_e=ORFlBCwhJYZ84Cg5goY91fw1yCeY5C7QmD3Q6latYfIZTlGTLcCcawwBZ_o8Yzw5OVGe9nK4W_m29T01LS35-4qJedr_cKi5qEsGfSdiMJUDkVr7KASZioQznrkwK_XzaicyGMciNwRex23uITXX0Hp1ErgUNpbQfNdPl7QWCrqOmkVeh_CVzUeX7ixsWb4lqpVBKcWXkFQ7jP05F1JdTn5QNAHPh3QT7k1QG5iGT5mKKUfIvUGocY2uZNI74RclJkcGqkmPZ7Yo4w5fysfFzFZ9eyWRCUkalZgsgeHTBT7DAdIxWV8rCqGlD0q7HL7XcOHm_hsWcII6titqyYvc8f-_Ni0HJma-dM5OcR6GSlA%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Since I was re-elected last November, I have voted in favor of:
---
* **RESTORING** our energy independence to lower costs for American families.
* **REDUCING** out of control government spending that fuels inflation
* **SECURING** the southern border and stopping the flow of fentanyl into the U.S.
* **SUPPORTING** police while condemning any efforts to defund law enforcement.
* **PROTECTING** parents' rights and demanding transparency in youth education.
* **PROHIBITING** biological men from competing in women's sports.

---
[** << Help Scott secure more legislative wins for the American people >> **](https://links.fitzgeraldforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=8c29a4b3774d487f965b24fccbcd0566&_m=04bf7ac33c6c4229b3100eaf78fbffae&_e=ORFlBCwhJYZ84Cg5goY91fw1yCeY5C7QmD3Q6latYfIZTlGTLcCcawwBZ_o8Yzw5OVGe9nK4W_m29T01LS35-4qJedr_cKi5qEsGfSdiMJUDkVr7KASZioQznrkwK_XzaicyGMciNwRex23uITXX0Hp1ErgUNpbQfNdPl7QWCrqOmkVeh_CVzUeX7ixsWb4lqpVBKcWXkFQ7jP05F1JdTphAxsDavZWmh7ocYCJTJ8WAvs3APLpGt5brv7kub8o9toWMxx8WYppFZja3oGxz82Dw8-zA-paKBCSqn-uuIcU5Ke30iS7V57qgiGuY4-FTs727BUPKOuPPd0SWp9wVJjd23uHjp5K_c-aRFyYPDdw%3D)

subject: 3 new supermajorities
body:
With a supermajority, Republicans don’t have to worry about compromise – they have almost unlimited power and can override the Governor’s veto on almost any issue... | | |
---
| | Republicans have gained _three_ new supermajorities in states with Democratic Governors. When the GOP has full supermajorities, it means that they can pass whatever legislation they want – banning books, disenfranchising voters, and outlawing abortion – _and Democratic Governors don’t have the veto power to stop them._ With supermajorities, Republicans don’t have to worry about compromise – they have almost unlimited power. **These GOP supermajorities are dangerous, and will lead to harmful laws and an erosion of our democracy.** [This cycle, we have a chance to reverse the GOP’s gains and end their stranglehold on power in states like Wisconsin and North Carolina. But to do it, we need your help. Can you donate $7 right now to help the DLCC defeat GOP candidates in the states? >> ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXouaceaQ51xM8nzCHACgbuUATTGKyIK5xK48_IlxO4kCQq-PlO4F-BjPl218F2qBgHnM2l2XgTpVKoFV0RReGIdBNnuPmKnELQBzfVN7UYjLDW_V6UrZJO5ycpZ5ntN272VR2xY6ZgPNw4jpRQzDa326ojDlrt4MJbux2n43C9rGjz4eEuTrsf0EPp0Xzmspr9lUrVyvz-RbozlayJMkispbGvsvfMzAcoufgsCR0ay5fkcZN6DQX5d85PssijWDusRQV0qNdvs7yH74VOccFGaeghHHXle3ByNeW8X2PMrsQ2wB1SVQhcGvvIRB7rg5Ay5iMlyhvs0ALb-2nGE4Asrh0/3wp/ILKeRNV_Q12yP0IjO1HSeQ/h0/gryQYPTuid9D8i5hTURUeJs96VosCXx8mPhPV3f_cNc) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Winning won’t be easy. In April, Democrats were narrowly defeated in a state Senate special election in Wisconsin.
Wisconsin and North Carolina’s legislatures have been swamped by Republicans in power for years, and we need to give Democratic Governors Tony Evers and Roy Cooper allies to help them deliver for their communities.
State Democrats are our best line of defense against the MAGA agenda, and investments to dismantle the GOP’s supermajorities will help build back power, protect the path to the presidency, and ensure Democratic governors can veto extreme Republican legislation.
**Our strategic plan relies on a strong team of grassroots supporters that includes you. Without you and tens of thousands of advocates joining in, our party can’t accomplish any of our goals.**
****

Wisconsin and North Carolina’s legislatures have been swamped by Republicans in power for years, and we need to give Democratic Governors Tony Evers and Roy Cooper allies to help them deliver for their communities. State Democrats are our best line of defense against the MAGA agenda, and investments to dismantle the GOP’s supermajorities will help build back power, protect the path to the presidency, and ensure Democratic governors can veto extreme Republican legislation. Our strategic plan relies on a strong team of grassroots supporters that includes you. Without you and tens of thousands of advocates joining in, our party can’t accomplish any of our goals. ** Thanks, Team DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates. We're fighting to elect Democrats and advance a progressive vision in the states. Our success depends on grassroots donors like you. Ninety-eight percent of our donors give less than $200, and two-thirds give less than $20. To make a contribution, please . name: Dr. Shawn Wilson
subject: Peter, we aren't stopping
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
Peter,
This week has been busy! We have been all across the state talking with voters, stakeholders, and more about our vision for Louisiana.
Take a look at some highlights from this past week:
I had a wonderful visit with the Central South Carpenters . We talked about workforce training, conditions, wages, and safety and interacted with a class of apprentices. If elected Governor, I will work to ensure all our workers are paid and treated fairly. Thank you to Gary Warren and Jason Engels for the welcome!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%281%29.png]
Colby Hebert and I have a lot in common. We both were SGA Vice Presidents and Presidents at the University of Louisiana at Lafayette and both came out of the College of Liberal Arts.
For me it was Arts, Humanities, & Behavioral Sciences . Leadership matters!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%282%29.png]
The Zydeco Extravaganza in Lafayette did not disappoint. What a night!
Keith Frank and The Soileau Zydeco Band shut the party down and #TeamWilson got a chance to show off our dance moves.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%283%29.png]
I joined Sunday services with Bishop J. Douglas Wiley , Pastor of Life Center Cathe dra l , the New Orleans home church of the Wilson family for over two decades. I additionally saw my Alpha brother and friend, Reverend Brandon Boutin , Pastor of the United Fellowship FGBC-Nola , present an amazing, moving sermon. We also attended the Second Good Hope Baptist Church , where the O. Perry Walker Class of 1987 was there to worship with our classmate, Pastor Brian Richardson , as we celebrated 36 years.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%284%29.png]
My family and I learned a new dance, enjoyed some top notch Greek food, and had a baklava sundae at the annual New Orleans Greek Festival in Bayou St. John.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%285%29.png]
I joined my friend Gary Chambers Jr. at his Civics For The People event to encourage residents to get educated about our elections and local government. An informed voter base is essential to this election.
I also had a chance to visit with Bishop Darryl Brister , of the Beacon Light International Baptist Cathedral .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%289%29.png]
I love hearing what seniors want from their leadership. They’ve seen it all and know what works. So I was glad to lend a hand at the New Orleans Council on Aging Senior Day at Joe Brown Park in the New Orleans East.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%288%29.png]
65 years ago this week , the streetcars and buses of New Orleans were desegregated, and the “race screens” that relegated Black residents and tourists to the back were removed. As a result, people who were determined to divide us and segregationist legislators quickly passed laws to overturn the integration of public transit. But Gov. Earl K. Long vetoed them. Leadership matters, and in a time of hate and division, we need leaders who will bring people together.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%287%29.png]
I had the chance to visit with an amazing treasure of our state: General Russel Honoré , the namesake of the Southern University at New Orleans's Honoré Center for Undergraduate Student Achievement.
I also got to meet with an impressive cohort of students.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/image%20%286%29.png]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [http://wilsonforla.com] .
With hope,
Dr. Shawn Wilson
HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Hosting%20Shawn%20at%20an%20event]
DONATE [https://secure.numero.ai/contribute/Wilson-for-Louisiana?ref=519]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Happy Pride, Derek 🌈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Pride is a preeeeetty huge deal to our campaign
#
Hey Derek!!
From John, Gisele, + all of Team Fetterman: **Happy Pride Month!** 🌈 ✨
Pride is a preeeeetty huge deal to our campaign. Never one to be on the wrong side of history, John was the first elected official in western PA to officiate a same-sex wedding. **But we know there's so much more we have to do in the fight for equality, Derek.**
Expanding rights and freedoms for LGBTQIA+ Americans is essential, and John has pledged to fight to codify these rights in the form of the Equality Act.
**[If you're with us, will you add your name to our petition in support of the Equality Act today?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230602&t=1&akid=8396%2E434096%2EeT8XmF)**
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230602&t=2&akid=8396%2E434096%2EeT8XmF)**
Right now, in 2023, there are concerted efforts on the far right to attack corporations, government officials, and everyday folks who are celebrating Pride.
It's also still perfectly legal in many instances to discriminate against the LGBTQIA+ community in PA and around the country.
**The fight isn't over, and we must *never* stop pushing for equal protection under the law for every American. Thanks to this movement, John is in the Senate to fight boldly, relentlessly, and proudly for LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms.**
**[Derek, so we have as much support as possible, add your name to our petition supporting the Equality Act today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-equality-act-email?refcode=em20230602&t=3&akid=8396%2E434096%2EeT8XmF)**
And one more time from John, Gisele, the family + our whole team: **Happy Pride!** 🏳️⚧️ 🏳️🌈
Thank you,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230602-8396-footer&t=4&refcode2=8396_434096_eT8XmF&akid=8396%2E434096%2EeT8XmF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=8396%2E434096%2EeT8XmF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8396%2E434096%2EeT8XmF)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: Not for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie is only able to compete because of supporters like you.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24058%2E3422442%2E3KNqZ_)
This shouldn’t be a controversial statement:
**Our government shouldn’t be for sale.**
But according to reports released this year by Open Secrets—a nonprofit that tracks campaign finance and data—federal lobbying spending reached $4.1 billion in 2022, and business interests spent $3.5 billion in political contributions during the same cycle.
Billionaire CEOs and the most powerful corporations write these hefty checks to political candidates, on both sides, for a reason: _to gain outsized power in our political system._
**For Katie, corporate PAC and federal lobbyist contributions are a hard no.** Instead, we rely on grassroots contributions to power our campaign—our average contribution is around $30, and we’re proud of that.
But in what’s shaping up to be one of the most competitive and expensive primary races in 2024, we still need to raise serious resources to run ads and reach voters. Katie is only able to compete because of supporters like you.
[**Can you make a donation to help send Katie to the U.S. Senate today—where she’ll be a voice for working people, not corporations? Whether you can afford $5, $10, or $50 today, it all adds up in a powerful way and really does make a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230602-1?refcode=EMAI02_1_LOB_20230602_V2_F&refcode2=24058_3422442_3KNqZ_&akid=24058%2E3422442%2E3KNqZ_)
**[Yes, I'll donate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230602-1?refcode=EMAI02_1_LOB_20230602_V2_F&refcode2=24058_3422442_3KNqZ_&akid=24058%2E3422442%2E3KNqZ_)**
Thank you!
Katie Porter for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI02_1_LOB_20230602_V2_F&t=5&refcode2=24058_3422442_3KNqZ_&akid=24058%2E3422442%2E3KNqZ_)**
---
