name: Brian Burch
subject: Dodgers re-invite fake “sisters”, so we're fighting back.
body:
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_t=dNoir3vG170CoQ_ZanhVvYg-V5PyoGqlVPlBQerfEeL6qQ5rFhtgKRCP_kBg3sv7DOEEae2Cya40izXh4JdDxe_XNCtlOTHl-LyyUJ0-sRk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_t=dNoir3vG170CoQ_ZanhVvYg-V5PyoGqlVPlBQerfEeL6qQ5rFhtgKRCP_kBg3sv7DOEEae2Cya40izXh4JdDxe_XNCtlOTHl-LyyUJ0-sRk%3D)

I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group. | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_e=fQWTjH3Sxb9g_MRw3XZxtodxOvI7OB0c5I-trcIO4_K-SgzOyznNMCZWyTo8hM3XQ4kmqtz0ew06bhGYbet7vbYNt8hQHZNrcSld-myuG6htTERLdNEc6awjauIVVSQtwUYY9P_Hxy-laZo5vE8gkn1r-mfyvnxTijQXUgfhb0uF4eIHEgX7Vatw2yejWiJhz3eTKfjtEKHjNdNb7p4gzjBCb8XKxhObFxqr0NdEIkOsfB-gZTmmqWxlHLtt5edwD7gvm4l2HZ4xxXgsE3pynhakAuwidb8GjatAdUB89qUnKAuIejlK5rqZpFNsvHhr)
---
| | **I need your urgent help to expose the LA Dodgers baseball team for blatantly supporting an anti-Christian hate group.** The group calls itself the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” And their motto is “go forth and sin some more.” **The “sisters” are a bunch of men who dress up in sexually explicit and rainbow-colored “nun” clothing with one purpose: ** _To mock Christians. _ Then they perform stunts designed to be as shocking and offensive as possible.
* A “condom savior mass”
* An annual “Jesus in drag” competition
* Pole dancing on a cross
* And much more.

_They even tricked an archbishop into giving them communion, then defiled the Eucharist._ **And the Dodgers are choosing to honor this anti-Christian hate group with their “Community Hero Award” during so-called “Pride month.”**
---
[FIGHT BACK](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_e=fQWTjH3Sxb9g_MRw3XZxtodxOvI7OB0c5I-trcIO4_K-SgzOyznNMCZWyTo8hM3XQ4kmqtz0ew06bhGYbet7vbYNt8hQHZNrcSld-myuG6htTERLdNEc6awjauIVVSQtwUYY9P_Hxy-laZo5vE8gkiR6XyM_yRUV_njlg-0yRpzxa882bnJPMznLO9BxbPY93GzQKg4hwAJ3m0je7weX5NbIdsSokh-tGctGdU5iytPhYT2uw2z-aEwkc0waGQ7K1-a9QTXyucDsn5huz3xKfQur-IfvjmJVeMgtHW0sYAxcQ5ExvTGcwgAHlw4yMsUK)
---
It’s vile. It’s disgusting. It’s a blatant attack by a major American corporation on our Lord. _And faithful Christians like you and I must not tolerate this kind of hatred._ ** ****That’s why CatholicVote is raising $1 million to run ads on every Dodgers-linked radio station and TV channel to send a clear message:**** ****Any business that promotes anti-Catholic bigotry WILL suffer the consequences.**
---
[FLOOD THE AIRWAYS!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_e=fQWTjH3Sxb9g_MRw3XZxtodxOvI7OB0c5I-trcIO4_K-SgzOyznNMCZWyTo8hM3XQ4kmqtz0ew06bhGYbet7vbYNt8hQHZNrcSld-myuG6htTERLdNEc6awjauIVVSQtwUYY9P_Hxy-laZo5vE8gkjzo_F7R0zlcksDVziw7hAiF2L8tg8BmHVtFHenAMkm7uXPh1VeaBsNCWyYc4nuK3qXUnqWgOlGVCj8sW3Ul4tdpw86zD2LJfAcQLRfTAj0khAjOX5mdHi_rb9gej5oHBBUKsFaeI4ET9POlHf8XcQWCIbTGspkTo6bO3Rfzij93)
---
If you’ve been following the news closely, you may have read about CatholicVote’s campaign to ask the Dodgers to remove this anti-Catholic group of fake “sisters” from their celebration. Thanks to our public pressure campaign, thousands of CatholicVote supporters FLOODED Dodger stadium with phone calls. _Within minutes, we filled up their voicemail inboxes._ The Dodgers almost immediately disinvited the “sisters.” A HUGE thank-you to everyone who made those calls! I’m incredibly proud of our CatholicVote family for taking action right away. **But unfortunately****Patriot,****the story doesn’t end there.** As soon as the Dodgers disinvited the “sisters,” the leftwing LGBT movement went crazy. Other gay and transgender groups began to pressure and threaten the Dodgers for daring to cross the LGBT agenda. **Then, the Dodgers**** _re-invited_****the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence back and decided to honor them with the baseball team’s “Community Hero Award.”** They also offered their “sincerest apologies to the Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence, members of the LGBTQ+ community and their friends and families.” And they made the decision without even consulting any faithful Christians – people like you and me. _The Christians who the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence” target with their hatred in the first place._ It’s shocking, but not surprising. Patriot, this is the state of American culture today. If anyone dares to call a “transgender” person by their biological name or pronoun, they risk being fired by woke corporations. **_But those same woke businesses heap honor on bigots who insult Christians, hate our biblical values, and mock our Lord and Savior._**
---
[DEFEND CHRIST!](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_e=fQWTjH3Sxb9g_MRw3XZxtodxOvI7OB0c5I-trcIO4_K-SgzOyznNMCZWyTo8hM3XQ4kmqtz0ew06bhGYbet7vbYNt8hQHZNrcSld-myuG6htTERLdNEc6awjauIVVSQtwUYY9P_Hxy-laZo5vE8gkrZ2z7Nq5JGsKRf_pBwiYDIDjnYNDZjdT4HOnDIKCEXlulhJkk0JPifmNA5WSnEtNN2i6rLPGOdoy9ZwaiikTEQ9BkXu320fkWy8v5rfyseaRQXcIQLkPLrUOqUFQ2fQZJffCWuI7Cx8dmR8nRdHGwIMvIAap2n4ulqyT5BdcwZ5)
---
As Senator Marco Rubio said last night after the news broke, “Today our great country is controlled by socio-political ruling elites who don’t just tolerate anti-Christian bigotry, they encourage & celebrate it.” He’s spot on, Patriot. One thing is absolutely clear today: **_Hate has a home at Dodger stadium._** **And it’s our job to stand up for the majesty of our Lord and our Church.** For God and for country, Brian BurchPresident, CatholicVote

\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ P.S. Like I mentioned earlier, we’ve set a goal to raise $1 million to run ads exposing the anti-Christian bigotry of the LA Dodgers and the “Sisters of Perpetual Indulgence.” [**Please click here to donate anything you can spare today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=37695291305c49cc8c1c055048e44d67&_e=fQWTjH3Sxb9g_MRw3XZxtodxOvI7OB0c5I-trcIO4_K-SgzOyznNMCZWyTo8hM3XQ4kmqtz0ew06bhGYbet7vbYNt8hQHZNrcSld-myuG6htTERLdNEc6awjauIVVSQtwUYY9P_Hxy-laZo5vE8gkqJeGX1QNF4SBM-twWUenKrizpSs0_DQ6Wf1KzMcYaMYWzpTD0bTsc4Ybl-WUK31u9EVrPRbHxv2eaQACQSMpeDy6QKIOA3lHwNEsjk5YXaPUvBhfDB2GxOITYKuRHa8BE-jloi8n9LzpvHRKlmaWzUgmHBAcDjXKAZlppAXe4rh) We didn’t have this in our budget, and we need to raise the money in the next few days. So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers.
---
| |
---

So no matter what you can afford to chip in – please don’t hesitate. The most important thing is time. Thank you in advance, and please keep our work in your prayers. | |

body:
It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son. When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64238493/409449188/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdkYjU4OC04MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3d4XkOLGvsZbfv0GaWc-0QZT2Srag5c3cLsQfWC3iA=&emci=005f6046-8001-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e37db588-8101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64238494/409449195/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdkYjU4OC04MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3d4XkOLGvsZbfv0GaWc-0QZT2Srag5c3cLsQfWC3iA=&emci=005f6046-8001-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e37db588-8101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hey there. It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son.
When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.
Technically, I went “online” for school – and yes, I definitely missed all my friends. But I wouldn’t go back and change it for the world.
My dad and I hitched a trailer to our red pickup truck and crisscrossed the entire district, taking turns at the wheel. He shook hands with voters, while I organized 130 interns virtually to make 700,000 phone calls for the campaign.
It felt like a 24,000-mile father-son road trip; just my dad, me... and the thousands of people we met at every stop along the way.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64238495/409449202/1610638071?refcode=em20230602pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e37db588-8101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdkYjU4OC04MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3d4XkOLGvsZbfv0GaWc-0QZT2Srag5c3cLsQfWC3iA=)
The campaign was hard. My sister and I knew they’d probably make up and say a lot of false things about our dad. But hearing and seeing the lies all over TV and social media is another thing entirely.
It was all worth it, though. We made hundreds of stops, met so many people, ate so much good food... And dad came _so close_ to winning and defeating Boebert! It was an experience I’ll never forget.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64238496/409449209/1610638071?refcode=em20230602pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e37db588-8101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdkYjU4OC04MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3d4XkOLGvsZbfv0GaWc-0QZT2Srag5c3cLsQfWC3iA=)
Now, dad’s running again, and I know that, with your help, he _will_ defeat Lauren Boebert this time.
**[It means a lot that people like you have got his back. So if you can, please make a donation now to my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64238497/409449211/1610638071?refcode=em20230602pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e37db588-8101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdkYjU4OC04MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3d4XkOLGvsZbfv0GaWc-0QZT2Srag5c3cLsQfWC3iA=)**
Thanks for everything you can afford to do for my dad and his campaign. It means a lot to him – and to our entire family.
Felix

| **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64238498/409449212/1610638071?refcode=em20230602pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=e37db588-8101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzdkYjU4OC04MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3d4XkOLGvsZbfv0GaWc-0QZT2Srag5c3cLsQfWC3iA=)**

clean_body: It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son. When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign. Hey there. It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son. When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign. Technically, I went “online” for school – and yes, I definitely missed all my friends. But I wouldn’t go back and change it for the world. My dad and I hitched a trailer to our red pickup truck and crisscrossed the entire district, taking turns at the wheel. He shook hands with voters, while I organized 130 interns virtually to make 700,000 phone calls for the campaign. It felt like a 24,000-mile father-son road trip; just my dad, me... and the thousands of people we met at every stop along the way. = The campaign was hard. My sister and I knew they’d probably make up and say a lot of false things about our dad. But hearing and seeing the lies all over TV and social media is another thing entirely. It was all worth it, though. We made hundreds of stops, met so many people, ate so much good food... And dad came so close to winning and defeating Boebert! It was an experience I’ll never forget. = Now, dad’s running again, and I know that, with your help, he will defeat Lauren Boebert this time. = Thanks for everything you can afford to do for my dad and his campaign. It means a lot to him – and to our entire family. Felix | = ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

With your generous investment, we were able to surpass our May fundraising goal, strengthening the power of our movement. Month after month, reaching our fundraising goals is crucial as we make tough decisions about which climate champions we can support. And I’m grateful for your continued support.

This month, we will be announcing more endorsements for climate champions from Virginia and I hope I can continue to count on your support!

Gratefully,

I’m reaching out to say thank you for your ongoing support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. I’m truly overwhelmed by your support of the crucial work we’re doing to elect climate champions. With your generous investment, we were able to surpass our May fundraising goal, strengthening the power of our movement. Month after month, reaching our fundraising goals is crucial as we make tough decisions about which climate champions we can support. And I’m grateful for your continued support. This month, we will be announcing more endorsements for climate champions from Virginia and I hope I can continue to count on your support! Over the past two decades, the Democratic Party has lost significant support among voters in rural areas because we just stopped trying. We’ve been paying the price ever since.
From winning about **_1,100_** rural counties in the 1996 presidential election to **_just 455_** in 2008 and **_under 200_** rural counties in the 2020 presidential election, the scale of this problem just keeps growing.
**It’s time for our political strategy and dollars to match that scale.**
With this $10,000,000 investment, we plan to make major strides toward contesting every otherwise uncontested Republican incumbent. Whether it’s how cities tackle climate change, what books our kids read in school, or local laws preventing gun violence, local lawmakers have a massive impact on our everyday lives.
By finally challenging the GOP in these races, we’ll meaningfully improve the lives of millions of Americans as we start to win back everything from school boards and city councils to governors’ mansions and Congress.
**[Tonight is our deadline to fund the first tier of this program and kickstart our work in the six key battleground states of 2024. Big Tech election interference has begun:

LinkedIn locked my account and censored me for posting videos where I expressed fact-based views as a presidential candidate about climate policy and Biden's relationships with China.

They said it violated their policies relating to "misinformation, hate speech, and violence."

Two years ago, Big Tech censored people who argued that we shouldn't close schools for COVID. Now they're censoring presidential candidates for arguing that fossil fuels are required for prosperity.

**They didn't censor me because it's false. They censored me because it's true...**

This latest Big Tech censor is sad but not surprising.

If we want to win elections in 2024, we must take a stand.

I refuse to stand idly by as our fundamental rights are eroded. That is why I have decided to take a stand and fight back against this pervasive censorship. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: They didn’t censor me because it's false. They censored me because it's true... | | Peter, Big Tech election interference has begun: LinkedIn locked my account and censored me for posting videos where I expressed fact-based views as a presidential candidate about climate policy and Biden's relationships with China. They said it violated their policies relating to "misinformation, hate speech, and violence." Watch my reaction here: | Two years ago, Big Tech censored people who argued that we shouldn't close schools for COVID. Now they're censoring presidential candidates for arguing that fossil fuels are required for prosperity. They didn't censor me because it's false. They censored me because it's true... This latest Big Tech censor is sad but not surprising. If we want to win elections in 2024, we must take a stand. I refuse to stand idly by as our fundamental rights are eroded. That is why I have decided to take a stand and fight back against this pervasive censorship. But I cannot do it alone. They are censoring conservative messages because they know what we have to say resonates with voters. Before the end of the day, I am asking for your help. I wanted to reach out and express my gratitude for your support for our National Gun Violence Awareness Day fundraising drive.

I started Their Future PAC in large part because I knew I couldn’t see another kid turn up in the hospital with gunshot wounds because of bad policy choices being made in Washington without doing something big about it.

_Now, we need your help to continue our advocacy efforts for Their Future’s FIRST weekend of action._

**This National Gun Violence Awareness Day, there are multiple ways to join us in using our voices to demand a better future for our children:**

**First:** This #WearOrange gun violence awareness weekend, join me & gun violence prevention advocates all across the country on social media as we unite & share why gun violence prevention matters to us.

🧡 Wear orange
🧡 Post a brief video on Twitter sharing your why
🧡 Use #WearOrange #ThisIsOurLane

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnniTcSX4bgWnR-FeoHhYSK8kcJT4BDDHrzhmUcjOpiZDu5dPz42g-AN6qZycyMR1Xam_ciRCpeKyekPTN-FUxyk3FKIkUVwW7ATBXfnmsln2q9en-I7PTWnrtKcvFNKlwWM3CrhrA6K2Ft9VGajvnh6JymsnXlX6sIGkyXiIDMYCGQPD6AX3eliPI6UMLZ_QDeV-2kNwNHGnCMdBYqxKWblTQkZagnY7bWakA7ddJ2W8c_0X2DuN9xq1OMNSOFo31qQHB0eNOZHkIXLllF63KZB9uz4T7KFWX94dMhChA-0qKrHB7iNF3kwPDR1UcMEHrhSTSNA_yuGTr0POpKnc5xIYI_1MxRDhVLtb-Q7UovRno4dpojOxrZKJ3OYXV1kyE/3wp/ATviSYqmTVauUsKX1s8-dQ/h2/pZzbCho-qS7dsY8IE_cK-umpPmgZw0eJRfYcNPGJFl8)
**Next:** Stand up for gun safety legislation by **[_using our tool to write to your state reps and ask them to take real, concrete action against gun violence._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnniTcSX4bgWnR-FeoHhYSK8kcJT4BDDHrzhmUcjOpiZDu5dPz42g-AN6qZycyMR1Xam_ciRCpeKyekPTN-FUxyk3FKIkUVwW7ATBXfnmsln2q9en-I7PTWnrtKcvFNKlwWM3CrhrA6K2Ft9VGajvnh6JymsnXlX6sIGkyXiIDMYBfZtAS7wCMix1WKzLaLjPB6Qibb2ge9zPRyaH3yyoGGDSGngZ6J8Y-4RUZ_xHWymEgn3kO3xb2VnMozT-bYYETEfGxXqGA2Hs0b_QhsTXJjIGb93s84EAwInQspKm1UziBPsy4rZCqBRwp3nBvFBhXbGfoHQeChIhoTyoCjTdturmG48zkZNfh_hBWI0SKZPZETci3sqvyMN8wx2ERmGD4/3wp/ATviSYqmTVauUsKX1s8-dQ/h3/Vnr0heu3Dk9AW8DSFoFKBwOKSehd1kcZYQFJR6eOCVE)** With your help, we can make tangible progress in giving our kids a voice.
| | [STAND WITH US](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnniTcSX4bgWnR-FeoHhYSK8kcJT4BDDHrzhmUcjOpiZDu5dPz42g-AN6qZycyMR1Xam_ciRCpeKyekPTN-FUxyk3FKIkUVwW7ATBXfnmsln2q9en-I7PTWnrtKcvFNKlwWM3CrhrA6K2Ft9VGajvnh6JymsnXlX6sIGkyXiIDMYGmZcPI-JR7w-WhY9yaeGFKWOqCvHYDT8Aspi_EIivlOAMjctGCn3ZbIh4PMuW1VIlmwmWliu16RdHhV19GmJE9vtzvl_lWC8dZH-7lSF36sS68hRLRsonr1YtK-pJBz8qN6DkqmsCY2H8_OKm-nOEcZBBVYYgI6yDTCtrP8BJwVmVtiBDXrMFwa9HjitGql9vCvq5AyL_1d8ND4Yr9m1Cw/3wp/ATviSYqmTVauUsKX1s8-dQ/h4/1TzSTguX9cS9eEapJPGsbMm44qFKO0qWR7fAev5iL4k)

America’s children don't have lawyers or lobbyists or million-dollar super PACs standing up for them. But our incredible team of supporters makes it possible for us to change that, advocating for our kids and electing lawmakers who will do the same.

Thank you so much for your support this National Gun Violence Awareness Day.

— Annie

subject: Before you log off for the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
A quick update about our May fundraising goal.
#
Hey Peter,
I know you’re probably about to log off for the weekend, but I wanted to send you a quick note to let you know that we crushed our May fundraising goal.
Time and time again, real people like you step up to support our movement in the moments it matters most — whether it’s chipping in a few dollars or sharing our ads with your family and friends — and Lucas + our whole team are so grateful for it.
But we still have so much work ahead of us. And with our next major FEC fundraising deadline coming up on June 30, we _really_ can’t afford to take our foot off the gas.
>From staffing up to opening offices to getting our message in front of voters across the state, your support is the only thing that will make that possible for our campaign over the coming months. **So Peter:**
**[Will you add your first donation of absolutely any amount to our campaign today so we can keep up the pace this month, elect Lucas Kunce, and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so you know we mean it when we say any amount makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33652?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33653?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33653?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33653?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33653?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33653?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33653?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33652?refcode=em20230602-3210&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=3210%2E614464%2EN-_iKs)

Emma Dillon
Team Kunce

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: It’s payday! 🥳💸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter,
Happy Friday (a.k.a. payday)!
Team Heidi is currently leading the polls for the Nashville mayor’s race, but thanks to self-funded millionaire opponents, we’re not the money leaders of this race.
Money (or a lack thereof) has never stopped me from serving my community, Peter.
I want to give you all the details, but if you don’t have time to deep-dive now - can you chip in any amount to our campaign for Nashville mayor today to help us close the money gap? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Peter, when I was Mayor of Oak Hill, the city's cash reserves had been cut in half after previous leadership spent a substantial amount of money on lawsuits.
When the budget needed to be tightened and measures needed to be cost-cut further, I cut my own pay so that critical municipal services could continue.
Just like I "put my money where my mouth was" as Mayor of Oak Hill, I will do the same for Nashville.
But I can’t start moving Nashville forward without your help. Peter, will you join our winning team with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
JOIN OUR TEAM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
With gratitude,
Heidi
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230602_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor

clean_body: [] Peter, Happy Friday (a.k.a. payday)! Team Heidi is currently leading the polls for the Nashville mayor’s race, but thanks to self-funded millionaire opponents, we’re not the money leaders of this race. Money (or a lack thereof) has never stopped me from serving my community, Peter. I want to give you all the details, but if you don’t have time to deep-dive now - can you chip in any amount to our campaign for Nashville mayor today to help us close the money gap? >> [] CHIP IN TODAY [] Peter, when I was Mayor of Oak Hill, the city's cash reserves had been cut in half after previous leadership spent a substantial amount of money on lawsuits. When the budget needed to be tightened and measures needed to be cost-cut further, I cut my own pay so that critical municipal services could continue. Just like I "put my money where my mouth was" as Mayor of Oak Hill, I will do the same for Nashville. But I can’t start moving Nashville forward without your help. Peter, will you join our winning team with a contribution today? [] JOIN OUR TEAM [] With gratitude, Heidi Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill. [] As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves. Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment. Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote. Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream. Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to: Campbell for Mayor P.O. Box 330302 Nashville, Tennessee 37203 SUPPORT HEIDI [] Paid for by Campbell for Mayor Chip Forrester, Treasurer Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer Campbell for Mayor PO Box 330302 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

[**June 2, 1886:** President Grover Cleveland became the first President to get married at the White House when he married Frances Folsom. His bride was only 21 years old at the time and became the youngest First Lady. Before his marriage, the bachelor president’s sister served in the role of First Lady.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e99d2e6f4b334d2e9557bbff07dc8f26&_e=pZG7o3qowX6zA_mjh9SiDuQpOcIxZX-kkqKjiSTsHtRAjgFfH4mXNXYo0C46eY26mtI8c8zN3DKFe_b7AKkc3HAiAcO-LOhVB2Jw5UotH66xzVdU6NPLh3zzjS0hxIPnzdlzBnCb8Z7-Nnry8X5Mn4bOZUr4PTI0WItwWVOrRJbiAJf6L1hGJTbcZxyci5dKH7dQCjzrNNfiTao4mQVTUiu_xdnA4IezWcnnlb4VwjVYPM06CUXL_QG2qWw3Opk6zopttAGQ9EBaA8D6BEPa9A%3D%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e99d2e6f4b334d2e9557bbff07dc8f26&_e=pZG7o3qowX6zA_mjh9SiDuQpOcIxZX-kkqKjiSTsHtRAjgFfH4mXNXYo0C46eY26mtI8c8zN3DKFe_b7AKkc3HAiAcO-LOhVB2Jw5UotH66xzVdU6NPLh3zzjS0hxIPn5nrOPfHlU5K7IK8CmBLPOVgmnHO4j7RPQU2v80POJvGNp1U3NB1KrMRveYVbS7UuAE7O1Rubv6zKcneLTt2-EMLNHeqTCAlX4bhHAHwOURO0AFmRPyCGY6Yt67-5KhEWASmJJimRGGUjMPcGtzU6pg%3D%3D)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: How are we doing, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This movement would be nothing without our collective vision pushing us towards a stronger, more compassionate democracy.
#
Peter,
June marks the final month of Q2, Peter. So before we kick our movement into high-gear on our campaign plans and efforts, we want to check in to hear how you think our movement is doing.
We want to hear your thoughts on our movement's priority, focus, and trajectory when fighting for our progressive values. And we'll be sure to review and implement the results so we're on track with your vision.
**[Can you spare a few minutes to take our Team Pramila Supporter Survey for Q2? You can begin by answering our first question right here:](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=1&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
_1\. On a scale of 1 to 5, how would you rate our movement's progress in respect to our progressive values?_
**[1 (disapprove)](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=2&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
**[2](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=3&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
**[3 (neutral)](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=4&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
**[4](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=5&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
**[5 (strongly approve)](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=6&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
**Pramila knows that in order to stay on par with the needs and priorities of the people, we need to be consistently checking in and taking stock of our supporter base and what changes are occurring.**
****This movement would be nothing without our collective vision pushing us towards a stronger, more compassionate democracy.** By filling out our survey, we'll make sure that your input is thoughtfully and intentionally integrated into our campaign's plans for the future.**
**[Peter, please take a moment to complete our Q2 Team Pramila Supporter Survey to help us take stock of what you find most important and how we're measuring up to the fight for our values.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/em-team-pramila-q2-supporter-survey/?source=em20230602-2555&t=7&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
**In solidarity,**
**Team Pramila**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230602-2555-footer&t=8&refcode2=2555_420207_FWmXJK&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=9&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2555%2E420207%2EFWmXJK)

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: This bill sets a horrifying precedent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64247260/409456569/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZThjYWM3ZS04ODAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apc0dKKAMU7olW5IP57p_mwykMjTxV_tJq9MwCRvS7c=&emci=c44f8215-7d01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=be8cac7e-8801-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Last night I voted "No" on the debt ceiling bill. Here's why: **This bill has three big problems.** First, it sets up a cycle in which Republicans continuously hold Democratic presidents hostage over the debt ceiling. This is enormously destructive for the issues we care about. In addition, I've held more than two dozen town halls across the state since January, and this bill will undermine the programs that address citizens' top concerns: affordable housing; mental health; stopping fentanyl; and expanding child care opportunities. **I will not throw Oregonians under the bus.** This bill is also a climate catastrophe. **It makes the Mountain Valley Pipeline exempt from all environmental laws.** And it sets the massively corrupt precedent of moving any court challenges to the Mountain Valley Pipeline from one court jurisdiction to a more favorable jurisdiction at the request of the powerful pipeline company. And the bill rewrites our bedrock environmental laws, serving the fossil fuel barons**** by allowing corporations to write their own environmental impact statements and make other changes designed to thwart oversight. **We've never done anything like this before, and we shouldn't do it now.** It is critical that we don't default on treasury bonds, but the president has the executive power to stop that from happening. He should have used that power. **Virtually nothing in this bill reflects Oregon values or priorities, and it contains a whole lot of stuff that will hurt families.** I was elected to represent the great state of Oregon, and to strive to make life better for Oregonians – not worse. That is why I could not in good conscience support this bill. _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | This week, **a poll was released showing me as the clear favorite in the 2024 U.S. Senate race in West Virginia. Head-to-head, I beat Democrat Joe Manchin – no questions asked**.

However, the same poll found **my Republican primary opponent and Sen. Joe Manchin TIED in a 1:1 matchup**. You read that right. Should I become the nominee, Republicans win. If my Republican primary opponent becomes the nominee, **Democrats have a better than 50% shot at keeping this Senate seat.**

_First, the Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee sued my office, seeking access to my records._

_**Biden’s Department of Justice is now SUING my family-owned businesses to tarnish my standing in West Virginia**_.

The poll released this week proves that. Democrats know that I am the only Republican who can beat Joe Manchin, so they’re going to extreme lengths to ruin my good name and prop up my opponent at the same time.

**Less than 24 hours after the poll's release showing that I’m the only Republican in West Virginia who can beat Joe Manchin, I’m being sued by the crooked Biden Justice Department.**

**WILD STUFF.**

This lawsuit is politically motivated and intended to promote my primary opponent at the expense of my reputation because Democrats think they can beat him in a 1:1 matchup.

**Donald Trump Jr.** was one of the first to comment on the pending lawsuit, writing, “ _**Did anyone really think that Biden’s weaponization of the DOJ to target his political opponents was going to stop with Trump?**_ ”

And **Ted Cruz** followed suit soon thereafter, writing, “ _**Utterly brazen. When I said the Biden DOJ is the most political and partisan DOJ in history, I wasn’t kidding ...**_ ”

We can’t let Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Senate Democrats get away with this.

I need your help. **[Will you answer the call?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f9f6009c51d4420b959085ed9492298b&_e=fah_fdyuibE-eBtafEJenrncIOmf0j4X9n0VyvfO3TAnP5sgHQv8wojTwFegSG8Sg28JN_dNWb7XXDmFfwuaMYYtOC8GWyqFDC0PMA9rF-_MKPsu6SNKbdke8pwsc3duYOfZfbDKgaaPPFyE36ahgU0gb__-Eslu3Hg-mnVRRTHTgaG5LKAJPgvyBhk_xrI5_yWrf8jP0OnbkoNOXsW6eOsmUObtiRHM6hTZIBVqxYpclsyJjAYZ43sDpptqFyKCn0TaT02ttCfOiciNLAztaJ_J80nLOxkEYYdGuMUp9ubStVQMzUkzK3GK-aLym4ffp8MxU5h91lgVUatnBNtmD--L2UcMc8wBKzdnU6vW3iYOrUP7WJvKW-CwCkUnFnYJP1mLsC-ZHDkX_SKDbJnQFA%3D%3D)**

Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

| | **Biden’s Cognitive Conundrum 🧠 **
---
| |
---
President Biden [took a tumble](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZsSf_bzY1zKuiM8DGEDW1UxeuDRbyEwwcj9zBS7GS0kERFjVkD1Ydra0exOYiaTy79YnWnwcXUCzGcjkIyVZtrCuect4tQF2GfwBO4U3zVh1wtszvOYjN-zqK2AgFekNYHWydnQK3lLF-bq41W_Nk-5SYh82hRGhwoenIXMk_61-2RmZQc8YpW79WkaewTbFEVmkmy_WYaDPDMsWgJHFxuZjwSX03gFM8KpreMxJKXSjLcSqcehuGe3H5UhTO3x3bCA%3D%3D) while passing out diplomas at the Air Force Academy yesterday. His communications director says it was due to a sandbag on stage, but this isn’t the first time we’ve seen him fall. From [tripping on the stairs](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZsXYO7HJgkGpdc9KcU728fS4xi5XZS_v2P7jiskLjEsj1ld2p2rdZSAmG_8qQb2w1rGh2Z76bVq3fmvs99VwTUqw4Q5UBxGM2uTSxAdtkbNg6Om0gohbizygYdI7W8yXGfAQXgcmlebGOQJHaairEU6a7DpPhzapjc8YHyPw0BU_lNE_h-v3U_0bMz_KJ4FgIiEUFDWUSiBC4wwEV4hmGCpkzMGhGEYkpz-rC1kl8nrVzbHI_u19zL5iUP9VSYTv2nw%3D%3D) of Air Force One to [falling off his bike](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZsSf_bzY1zKuiM8DGEDW1UxdJFMQpzfE_no3_OIHPqEqdqi7JuWzZixWkd43fuP7dMOW0-1-kibbE7AXiN_DT99awGDa3LiW4D7c9sA6Y9gqJ0hdIRxEZysTYwJW-otu5OnYvnkemyKmuu7J4etAM4o27KeHUBpkVKs_jvt9RB2Z6tmjaqrPxXIgAwCFrZWZU7NMI5OwCCgUDt46QzFecmCNN2imiPFY6ukbtANCmPYemX-adDspPsoI1r9AjXs86hg%3D%3D) while approaching the press, we’ve seen these instances over and over, which is why it’s so concerning. Biden is 80 years old, which makes him the oldest president in U.S. history. It’s a serious topic that deserves a discussion. Americans deserve to know our president is mentally capable of doing the job they elected him to do. If he's not, he shouldn't be in the Oval Office, and he certainly shouldn't run for reelection. To address these concerns, I, along with many others, have signed onto a letter by Rep. Ronny Jackson that asks the president to [take a cognitive test](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZsSf_bzY1zKuiM8DGEDW1UxfbjVBsBxwWiQS9T3oPir12qvPakqrtsyUNkdbqYut_6nNy3vgLVD3IymnZyX4pu2X9gEFbypeLDBa7DnjIwmcHTlAypm7cpKexOzJd2PJZSU5Nspdo5N51qigG8qz2ZOa7hzdt2LIgCxOj6h8w7iXfH7wUkBX2T1fdfQbJ5iqNWBSXppOyq2izxOBAPsyPwPLTrQDAWB9uG0sdbJ6cLYxKsGw3Kyk6vipAH9IDXS6EEl_OKsBP2oBSaUaaaRB8oLZlOakYmVHJQH8QAKKYUhef). This isn’t a gimmick or a way to poke fun; it’s a legitimate concern rooted in wanting what’s best for our country. There is no doubt that being president is demanding. It requires a leader who is all in and all there, especially at this critical point in our history. The American people deserve transparency and confidence. Let’s ensure we have a leader who is mentally present, capable, and fit to guide our nation forward.

| | **A Miraculous Recovery ✝️**
---
[](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZscCxQRvXa3IghOIAmsLr6NKnFV0xNBz8e0coIlZeUHDWkrfh6FlOpHewaiA2d8Wd3PzwCEJiQ0BYJmra3iJGVBr-VZZjpoHOt6yyNb-p_XIMSpVwzgwhdWbumAWGOjmgoJz87_UxnI_b72nA8l9kpF3Bf3HvmkzXkTRH-M5ZJleh1ZRFwYY5ThhnMmuC4dITaG81SeccrOO4PR5WAbm33NC9OqiZhRDPdJdR29WoU7USWdBiYfwHznK5I2vGA5SxxkfXBBodSUu29ZOiKixrobs%3D)

# Photo Credit: Calvary Episcopal Church

---
| | This is a Tennessee praise report that is bound to put a smile on your face. The folks at Calvary Episcopal Church in downtown Memphis were devastated when they lost nearly [2,000 organ pipes](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZscCxQRvXa3IghOIAmsLr6NKnFV0xNBz8e0coIlZeUHDWkrfh6FlOpHewaiA2d8Wd3PzwCEJiQ0BYJmra3iJGVBr-VZZjpoHOt6yyNb-p_XIMSpVwzgwhdWbumAWGOjmgoDGH38UYpno7Fmp_y5PL2mHlQirV9zk1w4jiBruDPrYc5F_rvcfPhvBVHcPyI30lax235FBALdUvzpIq7IrfWxacqfSxP-7KcV08yqLjEkP7ZzuLwp2A4fVPtBW43hzOP33E5f249XoVXGj_Ijp8Ae0%3D) last month after a Penske truck they were packed into was stolen.
As the oldest building in continuous use in Memphis, the historic organ dates back to the 1930s.
Thanks to the hard work of police officers, the truck was found just a few days later with most of the 90-year-old pipes inside. Soon after, [a tip led them to a van](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=f0f0238afc44411684ff7a565b404895&_e=w6oyGqZ58JbnaZoQSUcZsaBXqmNPJACa95SOXDoZSL22-GHTJu-Is5vye5P4ki_-AJb_6PnH5g5BPdA5ePX3tsbyCRjA_t7H6w2Dgm8-NTURDgowypo5AyK_uimv-ZqYbBJqjAxKUOg-5lv1yRH7y5PxXXM5bf8e_lof7VC39ykduG-BFWn8Y2TsCqlQ13Ds2-fz8gYml7wnEgIx9e9gwhyVxBcqCF4Hhre59KDKevJQi3OFZ1PZ1KqKpb6ZnhW4uFKX4f8LLzCRoadOyQlsdA%3D%3D) holding the rest of them.
The pipes are now safely headed to an organ company in Boston for restoration to preserve their historical and spiritual significance. They hope to have them completely restored by November 2024. An answered prayer for a Tennessee house of worship is something we can all be happy about.

Growing up in the Bronx, I had no family, no friends, and no neighbors who were openly gay. I was blinded by fear to see my own value and equality – _and terrified to come out of the closet._

Since making the brave decision to come out, not a day goes by that I take for granted being able to live proudly as an out gay man and serve my community as an elected official.

**It’s impossible to overstate the power of representation.** My experience as an LGBTQ person has made me far more authentic as an elected official than I otherwise would be.

I believe in normalizing the power of my own visibility, so that young people can grow up without shame, _but with pride in who they are._

**So with attacks on the LGBTQ community at an all time high, it’s more important than ever to have LGBTQ people of color in the room where decisions are being made.**

[This always has been – _and will always continue to be_ – one of my top priorities as a member of Congress. So Peter, I’m personally asking you to join my fight for equality by chipping in $3 today. My campaign needs to raise $875 by midnight to continue this important work »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64250757/409458893/-922949292?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20230602_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmFkZmZhZC04YzAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3L8qFvBFsTydRBvQXhwa8HP4JhiNlxkusLbrJv_JRdo=)

clean_body: I believe in normalizing the power of my own visibility | = Hi Peter, With Pride month upon us, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on my experience as the Bronx’s first openly gay elected official, and share why representation matters so much to me.= | = Growing up in the Bronx, I had no family, no friends, and no neighbors who were openly gay. I was blinded by fear to see my own value and equality – and terrified to come out of the closet. Since making the brave decision to come out, not a day goes by that I take for granted being able to live proudly as an out gay man and serve my community as an elected official. It’s impossible to overstate the power of representation. My experience as an LGBTQ person has made me far more authentic as an elected official than I otherwise would be. I believe in normalizing the power of my own visibility, so that young people can grow up without shame, but with pride in who they are. So with attacks on the LGBTQ community at an all time high, it’s more important than ever to have LGBTQ people of color in the room where decisions are being made. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse.** Not just that –

clean_body: Special elections are critical for chipping away at Republican power and flipping chambers nationwide – and you're a key part of how we win. | | | | | Here's why we're so focused on the upcoming special elections in Tennessee right now: Earlier this year, Representatives Justin Jones and Justin Pearson of the Tennessee Three stood firmly against Republican inaction in the face of gun violence in the state – and in response, Republicans expelled them from the House. Now, Reps. Pearson and Jones are running for their old seats, and they need our help to ensure Republicans don't stop them from rejoining the statehouse. Not just that – Losing these races would show Republicans they can simply expel anyone who dares to speak out against them – a dangerous precedent some Republicans are already embracing! In states like New Hampshire, we've seen how Democrats in Republican-controlled states are stopping the worst of the GOP’s agenda, like abortion bans, anti-LGBTQ+ legislation, and more. We've won 18 special elections this year alone – and we can win these, too! But these victories only happened because people like you chipped in $7, $25, or more at a time.That's why it's so critical we have you on this team now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We'll only do this together – so thank you so much for all you do. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ohioans must turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab by Republican zealots.
body:
Republicans cheating again
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8e29532-ae21-4526-8020-8217f378f3bc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[We Must Stop Them From Stealing Abortion Rights in The Dark Of NIght](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabfd524f-95d8-441b-930f-b6d40a15ace4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). ** _Last year, as you may recall, many states supported ballot measures to protect choice. Blue states like California, Michigan & Vermont. But also red states, where extremists produced ballot measures to ban abortion. They lost them all and the right to choose was affirmed in Kentucky, Kansas & Montana. Oops._ **_Now Ohio's set to vote on a November ballot measure to decide the fates of 11,800,000 residents, of which 6 million are women. So, GOP state legislators, knowing they'll lose, are doing what they do best: Cheating._** **The gerrymandered jackals passed legislation creating a special August election--wasting millions in taxpayer dollars--to get ahead of the choice vote with their own measure to fix the vote--changing necessary support for an amendment in Ohio from 50% to 60%**_. _**Outrageous** _._ **_We must get the word out to Ohioans NOW that they must turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab by Republican zealots._** _Ohioans for Reproductive Choice, who got this measure on the ballot, is out there educating people about the GOP's treachery. Per their recent email:_ Join the _Vote Not In August_ campaign to educate Ohioans about the extreme proposal to make it harder to amend our state constitution. Together we will defeat this extreme measure on August 8, then secure abortion rights on the November ballot. The next several months are make-or-break for the future of our great state. _We stop them now, or we may never be able to, and believe me when I say they'll export this 60% threshold to other states if it works in Ohio._ [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ohioans for Reproductive Justice, to stop Republican cheating and enshrine abortion rights in Ohio's Constitution?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td610efa3-88bc-4581-9c6a-0dcad4b82535/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for decency and humanity wherever it's needed._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8453ed3d-b396-4a2d-8e00-523e9cfb79e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Our communities, our families, our children... they are all in danger by their inaction. The best way to protect our safety is by electing more Democrats in 2024, period!

name: Team AOC
subject: We have something to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
$3.
It may not seem like a lot of money compared to what Republican corporate mega-donors and super PAC's can raise, but **when we put all of our grassroots donations together, it amounts to a really powerful movement.** So far this year, we've received 117,400 donations of $50 or less.
That adds up to $1,549,677.14 for the fight for social, racial, and economic justice for all.
[Please, will you make a donation today to power our campaign to make Alexandria the representative for NY-14 in the next Congress? $3 goes a long way when everyone is chipping in.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230602.MEVreB&refcode=em20230602-4425-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4425%2E2526796%2EUxOwip)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230602.MEVreB&refcode=em20230602-4425-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4425%2E2526796%2EUxOwip)**
For years, we’ve been the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. And those small dollars add up to a lot of power and influence.
$3 donations let us beat a Republican who raised $10 million against us.
$3 donations allowed us to deliver 80,000 meals to our neighbors in the depths of the pandemic, and provide 100,000 masks to teachers, small businesses, and essential workers.
$3 donations have helped us bring 6,000 hours (and counting) of free, virtual tutoring to under-resourced families with our Homework Helpers program.
$3 donations have let us raise thousands of dollars — this year alone — for trans and LGBTQ+ advocacy, emergency relief efforts in East Palestine, OH, support for migrants, and so much more.
[What do you say? Your donation today will go directly toward re-electing Alexandria and defeating right-wing fascists in NY-14 once and for all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230602.MEVreB&refcode=em20230602-4425-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4425%2E2526796%2EUxOwip)
**[Contribute $3 today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230602.MEVreB&refcode=em20230602-4425-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4425%2E2526796%2EUxOwip)**
Thank you in advance,
Team AOC

name: Darcy Draeger, Executive Director
subject: Districts for Democracy Weekly Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Hi Friends, Welcome to Districts for Democracy’s first weekly newsletter! Here we’ll share stories about what’s going on in the fight to protect our schools from book bans, both in New Jersey and nationally; highlight actions you can take to support issues, races, and candidates; and connect you with resources and training to fight censorship. We’ll also provide updates on what we're doing and how you can help. I’d like to start by briefly recapping what Districts is, and what we’re planning to do. **Schools and Students Under Siege** Over the past three years, an influx of dark money and coordinated messaging from national organizations like The Heritage Foundation and Moms For Liberty have made Board of Education races expensive and increasingly acrimonious. It's scaring off good candidates, demoralizing teachers, and placing our schools under siege. Sensible, consensus-building candidates and existing boards that respect their independent fiduciary duties, need help. That’s why Tom Malinowski founded Districts for Democracy. We will:
* Directly fund candidates.

* Advise on field, communications, and strategy.

* Spend independently in highly charged races where community members need to know what’s at stake.

* Work with grassroots organizations to build issue awareness and ensure our schools serve not one or some, but all kids who attend.

**Wait–This Is Happening in...New Jersey? My New Jersey?** Sadly, yes. Living in a “blue state” doesn’t protect us from extremists trying to ban books, censor teachers, and create hostile environments in our schools for teachers and students alike. Indeed, extremist school boards here are causing local headaches and making national headlines. As we recently highlighted, in Bernards Township (Somerset) MAGA candidates won a majority on the school board in 2021. This year, they’ve rejected not one, but two high school sociology textbooks that are widely used across the country because they disagree with their accurate portrayal of current events. **[Check out Greg Sargent’s article about it here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251082/409459457/-1188739303?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** Oh, by the way? This is in a town that voted for Joe Biden in 2020 and Tom Malinowski in 2022. It’s clear not enough people are aware of the growing attacks on New Jersey’s excellent public schools, and we’ve seen that too many ballots are returned without votes for school board candidates being cast. (Do you know who ran for school board in your town last year?) We’re looking forward to amplifying great candidates and making sure voters know what’s at stake all over the state. And we’re grateful you’re coming along to help. **News You Should Know ** June is Pride month, so we’d be remiss not to emphasize that the majority of school book challenges target LGBTQIA+ stories and protagonists. School boards that have elected Moms-for-Liberty-endorsed candidates are now welcoming these types of challenges–including at schools in **[Mendham](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251083/409459458/-1559711708?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** , **[Roxbury](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251084/409459459/661700447?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** , **[Hamilton Township](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251085/409459460/-1267360900?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** , and **[Washington Township](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251086/409459461/-1267360900?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)**. Some extremist boards are also introducing policies that require teachers to out students to parents, like in **[Hanover](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251087/409459462/2012331623?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** and **[Colts Neck](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251088/409459463/505149648?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294#:~:text=On%20Wednesday%20night%2C%20the%20Colts,board%20meeting%20on%20June%2014.)** ; in response, NJ Attorney General Matt Platkin has filed a civil rights complaint against the Hanover Township School District, requesting an emergency court order to **[stop the policy’s implementation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251089/409459464/374962486?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)**. Even rainbow stickers are being peeled away, like at **[Long Valley Middle School](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251090/409459465/818054941?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** in Morris County, where rainbow-colored Safe Zone stickers were removed from classrooms because of parent complaints. And all over the country, culture wars in the classroom are driving teachers to quit. **[But parents, students, and legislators are fighting back–and winning](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251091/409459466/-272974207?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)**. Here in New Jersey, our friend **Senator Andrew Zwicker (D-Hunterdon)** , together with **Senate Majority Leader M. Teresa Ruiz (D-Essex)** , has **[introduced legislation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251092/409459467/1575269651?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** that would protect against banning books in New Jersey’s public libraries and schools. Proposed Bill 3907, or the New Jersey Right To Read Act, requires public libraries and public school libraries to adopt the Library School of Rights and prohibits banning or restricting access to certain books. **[Check out their discussion](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251093/409459468/-718702714?s=20&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** of the bill during their appearance on CNN This Morning. **How Can You Help?** Are there candidates who reflect your values running for school in your town? If not, can you help recruit some? Would you consider running for school board yourself? The **[New Jersey School Board Association has great candidate resources](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251094/409459469/870687251?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)** you can check out to learn more about it. _**I’d like to learn more:**_ Unite Against Book Bans offers great advice on messaging and actions you can take to fight against book bans in your community. Check them out **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251095/409459470/-1022323984?refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)**. _**I have five minutes:**_ Support Senator Zwicker and Senator Ruiz and their anti-book ban legislation by calling or emailing your Assembly and Senate representatives (contact information **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251096/409459471/411105894?fbclid=IwAR1Umo4v147BsJf2opLeqgZ6khalRW8dp6G-iVSGFOymsNRyx7D8-TYLXkA&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230602_NL_news_0_CST_Darcy_na_na_na&refcode2=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJmMGM5Yy04ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0_D6sBxQw2sRokqjQuDEQTSyyMrav7im6Mqtbg20yw=&emci=c3204c61-5501-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=35bf0c9c-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=19214294)**) and say: _I live in [your town], and I'm a constituent of [elected’s name]. clean_body: | | Hi Friends, Welcome to Districts for Democracy’s first weekly newsletter! Here we’ll share stories about what’s going on in the fight to protect our schools from book bans, both in New Jersey and nationally; highlight actions you can take to support issues, races, and candidates; and connect you with resources and training to fight censorship. We’ll also provide updates on what we're doing and how you can help. I’d like to start by briefly recapping what Districts is, and what we’re planning to do. Schools and Students Under Siege Over the past three years, an influx of dark money and coordinated messaging from national organizations like The Heritage Foundation and Moms For Liberty have made Board of Education races expensive and increasingly acrimonious. It's scaring off good candidates, demoralizing teachers, and placing our schools under siege. Sensible, consensus-building candidates and existing boards that respect their independent fiduciary duties, need help. That’s why Tom Malinowski founded Districts for Democracy. We will: Directly fund candidates. Advise on field, communications, and strategy. Spend independently in highly charged races where community members need to know what’s at stake. Work with grassroots organizations to build issue awareness and ensure our schools serve not one or some, but all kids who attend. Wait–This Is Happening in...New Jersey? My New Jersey? Sadly, yes. Living in a “blue state” doesn’t protect us from extremists trying to ban books, censor teachers, and create hostile environments in our schools for teachers and students alike. Indeed, extremist school boards here are causing local headaches and making national headlines. As we recently highlighted, in Bernards Township (Somerset) MAGA candidates won a majority on the school board in 2021. This year, they’ve rejected not one, but two high school sociology textbooks that are widely used across the country because they disagree with their accurate portrayal of current events. Oh, by the way? This is in a town that voted for Joe Biden in 2020 and Tom Malinowski in 2022. It’s clear not enough people are aware of the growing attacks on New Jersey’s excellent public schools, and we’ve seen that too many ballots are returned without votes for school board candidates being cast. (Do you know who ran for school board in your town last year?) We’re looking forward to amplifying great candidates and making sure voters know what’s at stake all over the state. And we’re grateful you’re coming along to help. News You Should Know June is Pride month, so we’d be remiss not to emphasize that the majority of school book challenges target LGBTQIA+ stories and protagonists. School boards that have elected Moms-for-Liberty-endorsed candidates are now welcoming these types of challenges–including at schools in , , , and . Some extremist boards are also introducing policies that require teachers to out students to parents, like in and . ; in response, NJ Attorney General Matt Platkin has filed a civil rights complaint against the Hanover Township School District, requesting an emergency court order to . Even rainbow stickers are being peeled away, like at in Morris County, where rainbow-colored Safe Zone stickers were removed from classrooms because of parent complaints. And all over the country, culture wars in the classroom are driving teachers to quit. . Here in New Jersey, our friend Senator Andrew Zwicker (D-Hunterdon) , together with Senate Majority Leader M. Teresa Ruiz (D-Essex) , has that would protect against banning books in New Jersey’s public libraries and schools. Proposed Bill 3907, or the New Jersey Right To Read Act, requires public libraries and public school libraries to adopt the Library School of Rights and prohibits banning or restricting access to certain books. of the bill during their appearance on CNN This Morning. How Can You Help? Are there candidates who reflect your values running for school in your town? If not, can you help recruit some? Would you consider running for school board yourself? The you can check out to learn more about it. I’d like to learn more: Unite Against Book Bans offers great advice on messaging and actions you can take to fight against book bans in your community. Check them out . I have five minutes: Support Senator Zwicker and Senator Ruiz and their anti-book ban legislation by calling or emailing your Assembly and Senate representatives (contact information ) and say: I live in [your town], and I'm a constituent of [elected’s name]. I’m reaching out in support of S3893/A5499 (just introduced in the Senate by Senator Andrew Zwicker), which prohibits public libraries and public schools from banning or restricting access to certain books. Please support this bill when it comes up for a vote. Thank you all again for your attention, and your time. Together we’re going to keep New Jersey public schools number one in the nation. name: Dan Kildee
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Friend,

I just wanted to reach out and personally thank you for your ongoing support of our campaign! Thanks to our incredible team of supporters like you, we were able to reach our May fundraising goal.

Because of redistricting, our district is one of the most competitive races again in 2024. Already labeled a top target of National Republicans, we’re already contending with dark money fueled attack ads against my record.

We have a tough fight in the months ahead, but your grassroots support signals to potential opponents that we have the resources to prepare for anything that comes our way.

The road to regaining the House majority goes right through MI-08 and your support is what will make all the difference in whether we win or not.

Thank you again for your support,

Dan

| Peter,

My team and I spoke a lot last month about the importance of reaching our May fundraising goal. Hitting our monthly marks sets our campaign up for success, and I’m proud to announce that because of your commitment, **_we reached ours!_**

Hitting our goals is even more important in the face of intense outside Republican spending. The GOP is already investing tens of thousands to unseat me, but if we keep up the impressive momentum we’ve already built, I know we will defend this seat.

I’m eager to see what the following months hold for our campaign, and I’m so grateful for your support along the way.

With sincere appreciation,
Abigail
