name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: not what I was hoping for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1007&amount=25&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Angela looking down

I’m just going to come right out and say it, Peter:

We came up short of our first monthly fundraising goal.

Not by a lot, but in a hotly contested race like this, every single dollar
we don’t raise could be one more voter we don’t reach with our
Maryland-first message.

After such a strong start to our campaign, falling even a little bit short
isn’t the start we were hoping for — but I’m a solution-oriented person,
so I’m already laser-focused on figuring out how we make up ground.

The simple solution is to absolutely blow the doors off our June
fundraising goal, so I’m hoping you’ll help me get started.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1008&amount=25&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Can I count on you to help us begin June with a big boost by chipping
in $25 right away? A huge show of support today would help us recapture
the momentum we need to win, Peter.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1009&amount=25&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1010&amount=50&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1011&amount=100&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Chip in $100 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1012&amount=200&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1013&amount=250&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1772?t=1014&amount=30&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]Other Amount

If we can pick ourselves up and refocus, I’m confident that we can
overcome this and any other challenge we face.

Thank you,

Angela Alsobrooks

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=115%2E52803%2ErpEbXJ ]click here.

**By living authentically and speaking out for some of our most marginalized communities, our Emerge LGBTQ+ alums are transforming politics to protect our fundamental rights and advance the fight for real equality for all. **

Keturah Herron **(Emerge KY), Kentucky's first LGBTQ+ state representative. name: Sherrod (personal)
subject: re: Succession finale
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Did you watch the "Succession" finale, friend? Connie and I watched the final episode the other night, and I think it's time I share my thoughts on the Roy family. I promise not to reveal any spoilers (🤫)...

In truth, there are _far too many_ people like the Roys out there who use their wealth and power to lobby for weaker rules and push the Wall Street business model at the expense of workers and families.
Kendall, Shiv, and Roman might make for entertaining TV, but they highlight some of the biggest issues we’re facing:

**No matter how appalling their behavior, the Roy family – like the actual wealthiest Americans – never face consequences for their actions.** They've got lawyers, accountants, right-wing politicians, and lobbyists in their pockets, helping them get out of trouble every. Damn. Time.
As I look at our country today, I'm sick and tired of watching people like the Roys profit at the expense of workers and families. We're seeing the wealthiest few get richer and richer. We're seeing profits go up, stock prices go up, executive salaries and bonuses go up – all while workers' wages stay stagnant.
**That's why I'm fighting every day to make our country a better, fairer place – but I need your help. I'm facing my toughest reelection yet, and experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot._Plus, _this race could decide Senate control.**
**[So please, friend, will you chip in now to help me hold the real-life Roys of the world accountable? Every grassroots dollar fuels our fight to win in Ohio, defend the Senate, and continue making our government work for ordinary people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251867/409462749/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk240-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGFlZWI5MC05MTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vNZM7-OM5J3_roR56yXEAaJCd-Do_nMCZUp6TqCbUEk=)**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Can I share something with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251913/409462994/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM3ZmNlNGMtOTIwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CxnXpcFG_5DbcpjUHEHB9pW4OPrMvzi3pIM3iQ-gaRw=)
---
Peter, can I share something with you? When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251915/409462996/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM3ZmNlNGMtOTIwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CxnXpcFG_5DbcpjUHEHB9pW4OPrMvzi3pIM3iQ-gaRw=) Seeing others in the LGBTQ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love — I came to realize that I could do both. **I could run for office and be honest about who I am. And that’s exactly what I did.** When I became the first openly gay Senator in our nation's history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the _Respect for Marriage Act,_ I’ve worked hard every day since to do just that. That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you to keep going: [_**Will you help me continue to make a difference by splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and HER Time today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251917/409463000/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM3ZmNlNGMtOTIwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CxnXpcFG_5DbcpjUHEHB9pW4OPrMvzi3pIM3iQ-gaRw=) Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for equality. But Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ youth. And when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Justice Clarence Thomas called for _Obergefell v. Hodges_ — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.” [_**For all of the progress we have made, there is still a LOT more to be done. I’ll keep up the fight as long as I can, and I’m hoping you’ll support our important work by splitting a donation between my reelection campaign and HER Time today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251919/409463008/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM3ZmNlNGMtOTIwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CxnXpcFG_5DbcpjUHEHB9pW4OPrMvzi3pIM3iQ-gaRw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251922/409463016/-523917261?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230602_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTM3ZmNlNGMtOTIwMS1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CxnXpcFG_5DbcpjUHEHB9pW4OPrMvzi3pIM3iQ-gaRw=)

That's why I ran for office in the first place — not to make history, but to make a difference. And folks like you supported me because you wanted to make a difference, too. Now, I'm asking you to keep going: = Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for equality. But Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory. Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ youth. And when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Justice Clarence Thomas called for Obergefell v. Hodges — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be “reconsidered.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your ongoing support. Let’s recommit ourselves to work towards the day when all LGBTQ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved. — Tammy HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

🌈 Happy PRIDE Month, Hoosier Democrats! 🌈 Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party’s weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **__** _Minnesota Governor Tim Walz to Headline Hoosier Hospitality Dinner_ We couldn’t be more excited to have Minnesota Governor Tim Walz as our Keynote Speaker for the 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner! Gov. Walz has shown what’s possible in the Midwest by protecting abortion access, investing in public education, fighting child hunger, and legalizing cannabis. You won’t want to miss this opportunity to hear directly from Governor Walz and other amazing leaders across our state, and country. We’ve saved you a seat — [grab your tickets today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251908/409462989/132778211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=) _President Biden, Reps. Mrvan and Carson Help Raise Debt Ceiling, Protect Hoosiers_ With default looming, and Republicans threatening cuts to veterans’ healthcare benefits, Medicare and Social Security, and more, Democratic Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson found a compromise for Hoosiers. This deal may not be perfect, but it protects essential services from Republican cuts, and avoids default. [Read INDems’ release.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251909/409462990/406311885?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251910/409462991/-1917756580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251911/409462992/-1917756580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) In addition, it protects the progress of the last two years, and ensures that the investments in green energy and climate change made by the Inflation Reduction Act remain in law. This will help protect [thousands of Hoosier jobs and billions of dollars worth of investment](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251912/409462993/-1536175135?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) in Indiana. **** _Jim Banks Doesn’t Even Show Up to Vote on Debt Package_ Rep. Jim Banks wants a promotion to the United States Senate, yet he didn’t [even show up to vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251914/409462995/211912876?s=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) on the bipartisan debt ceiling agreement. Why should Hoosiers entrust a Senate seat to someone who can’t do the main task as an elected official? [__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251916/409462997/-107907798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535)[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251918/409463005/622928814?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Throughout the day leading up to the vote, Banks was on a number of conservative outlets telling them that he would [vote against the proposal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251920/409463013/211912876?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535), and preferred to send America spiraling toward default. Despite this, he still couldn’t show up on time and do his job. Hoosiers deserve better. [Read INDems’ release.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251921/409463022/1178983467?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) Sen. Mike Braun [voted for a devastating default](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251923/409463029/306896176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) late Thursday, rejecting compromise to further his gubernatorial ambitions. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251925/409463033/1208426701?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251927/409463035/1208426701?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) [Legislation from Sen. Shelli Yoder (Bloomington)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251940/409463037/117596949?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) expands long-acting contraceptive access for Hoosiers. Hoosier Democrats are standing up in the Statehouse to protect and expand access to reproductive healthcare from Republican attacks, such as the near-total abortion ban passed last summer. Sen. Yoder’s bill has been signed and will become law. [Sen. Yoder wrote on Twitter:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251942/409463052/507776277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) “A HUGE THANK YOU to the folks in this picture and to Hoosiers for making this happen. Thanks to you, more women across IN can access contraception and plan families on their own time. I’m working for families, future, FREEDOM.” **__** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64251944/409463054/817206620?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTdmY2U0Yy05MjAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZMWWgZnn9fNp_vSkEURn6vvo1r3RfTnKa2UAzgMXon8=&emci=1a11523e-8e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=557fce4c-9201-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535) The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. Minnesota Governor Tim Walz to Headline Hoosier Hospitality Dinner We couldn’t be more excited to have Minnesota Governor Tim Walz as our Keynote Speaker for the 2023 Hoosier Hospitality Dinner! Gov. Walz has shown what’s possible in the Midwest by protecting abortion access, investing in public education, fighting child hunger, and legalizing cannabis. You won’t want to miss this opportunity to hear directly from Governor Walz and other amazing leaders across our state, and country. We’ve saved you a seat — = President Biden, Reps. Mrvan and Carson Help Raise Debt Ceiling, Protect Hoosiers With default looming, and Republicans threatening cuts to veterans’ healthcare benefits, Medicare and Social Security, and more, Democratic Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson found a compromise for Hoosiers. This deal may not be perfect, but it protects essential services from Republican cuts, and avoids default. In addition, it protects the progress of the last two years, and ensures that the investments in green energy and climate change made by the Inflation Reduction Act remain in law. This will help protect in Indiana. ** Jim Banks Doesn’t Even Show Up to Vote on Debt Package Rep. Jim Banks wants a promotion to the United States Senate, yet he didn’t on the bipartisan debt ceiling agreement. Why should Hoosiers entrust a Senate seat to someone who can’t do the main task as an elected official? Throughout the day leading up to the vote, Banks was on a number of conservative outlets telling them that he would , and preferred to send America spiraling toward default. Despite this, he still couldn’t show up on time and do his job. Hoosiers deserve better. Sen. Mike Braun late Thursday, rejecting compromise to further his gubernatorial ambitions. Learn how to prioritize precincts and reach your voters in the most effective way. Register by Monday, June 5, 12-1 p.m. ET: “Running in a Red District”: This is a great opportunity to learn skills about building the Democratic base in your community, and reaching out to voters in a more conservative area. You won’t want to miss this training! Register by Leadership Opportunities: Hoosier Women Forward and Emerging Leaders Project Applications are open for Hoosier Women Forward’s sixth class of leaders! Democratic women with a demonstrated ability to take initiative in their communities or places of work are encouraged to apply. Women selected for HWF must demonstrate an interest in public policy, political advocacy, and advancing Indiana forward with progressive policies and ideas. You can now apply to join the 2023-24 class of the Emerging Leaders Project! Founded in 2011 by party activists Jeff Harris and Carmen Darland, the Emerging Leaders Project was created to bring more young people into the Democratic Party and into public service. This program is open to Hoosier Democrats between the ages of 21-40 looking to get more involved! 2023 IDEA Convention: Book Your Room Today! INDems IN the News WTHR: WANE: INDYstar: WANE: Indiana Capital Chronicle: FOX 59: WRTV: WFYI: Indiana Public Media: IBJ: Opportunities with INDems** To apply for a job with the Indiana Democratic Party, please visit or send a note to mailto:jobs@indems.org. Thank you! [content goes here] Indiana Democratic Party 115 W Washington INDLPS, IN 46202 United States Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. | |
June 2, 2023

Good afternoon, Friend, it's Michael Maher.

**It's been an eventful week.** President Biden stumbled and fell during the Air Force Academy graduation (I genuinely hope he is okay), Congress passed a compromise bill to pay the country's debts with some spending reductions, and Republican presidential candidates have hit the campaign trail—all demonstrating how they will be head and shoulders better than the current administration.

The good news is that we got great coverage about my campaign's endorsement by the Fresno County GOP—read it [here](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=6dfc0e52ec&e=1722d05e10).

However, the bad news is that we missed our end-of-May fundraising goal by just $276. Although the month of May is over, the last end-of-month week is not. [So, if I can ask for your help to get our campaign to $276 OVER THE NEXT 24 HOURS, OUR CAMPAIGN WILL HIT ITS MARK!](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=7e98e197e9&e=1722d05e10)

Just click the button to donate [$5 on $5 Friday](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=c7e235281b&e=1722d05e10) (or whatever you can do).
---
| [DONATE $5 ON $5 FRIDAY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=cd7d21ea24&e=1722d05e10 "DONATE $5 ON $5 FRIDAY")
---
| Just 56 contributors at $5 over the next 24 hours, and we will hit our goal mark for this past month.

Thank you again for your help and support, and I hope you have a great weekend. Let's do this!

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
The Republican supermajority in our state legislature continues to demonstrate that it is unfit to lead. While an overwhelming majority of Tennesseans support common sense gun safety legislation, Speaker Cameron Sexton is now echoing the out-of-touch, do-nothing attitude of his Republican House Caucus on this public safety issue.
Following the tragedy at The Covenant School, we all held out hope for a true, bipartisan effort to end the proliferation of gun violence across our state. Governor Lee has even said he will call a special session on this topic. Unfortunately, the GOP supermajority is proving itself to be more radical than Bill Lee and remains more committed to kowtowing to extremist special interests than protecting our children. Even the smallest legislative step towards safer communities is a bridge too far for this Republican supermajority.
WATCH HERE:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tn2024victoryfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tn2024victoryfund]
Speaker Sexton’s words emphasize the vital importance of breaking the Republican supermajority in our state. Our House Democratic Caucus is hard at work laying the groundwork for success in 2024 from one end of the state to the other. Our tireless efforts can only continue with your generous support.
A supermajority benefits no one. If you are ready to stand up for safer communities and put an end to the Republican supermajority once and for all, please make a contribution to our House Democratic Caucus TODAY and join our fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tn2024victoryfund]
Our next fundraising event will be in Chattanooga on June 12th! Event details are included below. RSVP and join our host committee here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davisjune12]
Thank you for your consideration and continued support of Tennessee House Democrats. When our odds seem insurmountable, please remember there are Democratic legislators, communities, and individuals fighting every day for a brighter (and safer) future for Tennessee families.
John Ray Clemmons
State Representative
Caucus Chairman

| | Peter, we wanted to bump this invitation to the Rock the Ride event, a benefit ride and walk for gun violence prevention, on Saturday, June 24th. See details below and please join us if you're able!
* * *
**_Forwarded Message:_**

Mike is a huge advocate for Gun Violence Prevention. As a lifelong hunter and gun owner himself, he knows firsthand the obligation to ensure firearms are used responsibly. That’s why he’s introduced a bipartisan bill to expand background checks and close any loopholes that might lead to devastating shootings.

While Mike is working with his colleagues to enact common-sense gun reform into law, there’s a way you can get involved! Join Mike in the sixth annual Rock the Ride Napa Valley which will be held on Saturday, June 24!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64252421/409464250/313167857?source=EM_NBI_MT_20230602_INV_RTR_0_ID_TeamThompson_NA_NA_RocktheRidebump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE2YTMzMS05NDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pAQrmFrGIyYTUdJ1BZ0OLIw2CPrYksaaRgM5yPAFr7M=&emci=50be5484-7e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5416a331-9401-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2678920)

We will see a lot more of this as the Democrats work to help Alex Mooney because they know they can easily beat him**." - Roman Stauffer, Campaign Manager, Jim Justice for U.S. Senate_”
Fellow Conservative:

This week, **a poll was released showing me as the clear favorite in the 2024 U.S. Senate race in West Virginia. Head-to-head, I beat Democrat Joe Manchin – no questions asked**.

However, the same poll found **my Republican primary opponent and Sen. Joe Manchin TIED in a 1:1 matchup**. You read that right. Should I become the nominee, Republicans win. If my Republican primary opponent becomes the nominee, **Democrats have a better than 50% shot at keeping this Senate seat.**

_First, the Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee sued my office, seeking access to my records._

_**Biden’s Department of Justice is now SUING my family-owned businesses to tarnish my standing in West Virginia**_.

**None of this is a coincidence.**

**[I need YOUR help to fight back.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=15a25f77cb81443899a9957ee6e220a6&_e=M0XglvWeqGeP421kFqbj1FQhMiFpTOtQEPyjKBmkawteU_x4iDZCjLIpfZPoSadlKPmCQk2E28HfgImF8qGP3hqLj-TI_7FOlq1ttsvoSeelDMOFJYUiuvWjliQeGtJQ12evqjYcPv7ZftCrkffvJr94jWvHSYt0JdGpOIPaxdo_2O-1JTpHkCMfgOPj9efbb0CI_kqVBVFCNuWe42aEkUHLKVdXQJnKqKFP1PFeNjfyiGsFw4RpqhhMyfYg237qDKbXrsCgNvs2qk8KrlzPze_1GTJ1I2rKy13RHgPW9C4dhSRp3uV4pJJRlI6vhyrPm-gXXRtk8ZSvNxLks3XazTvdklcmKYyt5RIARq5JNfk9yW1t2PlLfpank2p2i-Nvpcakl40oXeLWWDt8ep0WQA%3D%3D)** If Democrats in D.C. are allowed to get away with this stunt, the chances of Republicans flipping this critical Senate seat _**evaporate**_.

[** chip in $5 **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=15a25f77cb81443899a9957ee6e220a6&_e=M0XglvWeqGeP421kFqbj1FQhMiFpTOtQEPyjKBmkawteU_x4iDZCjLIpfZPoSadlKPmCQk2E28HfgImF8qGP3hqLj-TI_7FOlq1ttsvoSeelDMOFJYUiuvWjliQeGtJQ12evqjYcPv7ZftCrkffvJr94jWvHSYt0JdGpOIPaxdo_2O-1JTpHkCMfgOPj9efbb0CI_kqVBVFCNuWe42aEkUHLKVdXQJnKqKFP1PFeNjfyiGsFw4RpqhhMyfYg237q-xXVrFOo9e64ZwC6EuQjwQ_-g2ObtiMHInY8HsgbmXZMsA_aCTqzmNRviUeP0Cl5Cf47_mVKbMCE0dnt7UEvp0i2gkZMikXBzbpmmICXdttKJkdQ5eMZU7B1-T2EmMqnV7INWPv0EPVHVZXcyTdd_w%3D%3D)

The poll released this week proves that. Democrats know that I am the only Republican who can beat Joe Manchin, so they’re going to extreme lengths to ruin my good name and prop up my opponent at the same time.

**Less than 24 hours after the poll's release showing that I’m the only Republican in West Virginia who can beat Joe Manchin, I’m being sued by the crooked Biden Justice Department.**

**WILD STUFF.**

| By having our back today, you are supporting the groundwork needed to fight back tomorrow.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=363%2E35263%2EM0ZaY2)
Peter, I wanted you to hear this from me: **The first poll of the cycle shows Mike Gallagher — a potential GOP candidate — just one point behind me in the race for the U.S. Senate.** Gallagher is an anti-choice extremist with a track record of supporting dangerous anti-abortion policies during his time in Congress. He’s a top-tier candidate for Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans, but he could not be further apart from what Wisconsinites want in their senator. The truth is, this is not the first time political pundits have shared how challenging our race will be — _CNN_ and _the Hill_ have already named Wisconsin one of the most competitive in the country. Since day one, we’ve known Republicans are ready to spend millions to try to unseat me. They know our state’s track record of close-margin elections and will try to use that to their advantage every step of the way. **We can’t afford to let them take the lead.** That’s why I am personally reaching out today asking for your support to make sure our team can come up with the resources we need to fight back. **[Peter, will you add an urgent contribution of any amount to our campaign? Team, Wednesday was our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and you really showed up. I can’t thank you enough. **Pundits are saying this will be one of, if not _the_ , most competitive race of 2024.** Every dollar we raise goes towards keeping this seat from falling back into the hands of far-right extremist Yvette Herrell who is already running against me in a rematch of last year’s tight race. Last year, Herrell spent over $4 million against me, but thanks to the support of this team, we kept up on fundraising and had a bigger base of volunteers to get us across the finish line. **We ousted Herrell just 8 months ago, and she wasted no time — she’s already fundraising for our rematch.** Now that I’m in Congress, I’m extremely busy working to deliver on my promises: real climate action, protecting reproductive rights, and bringing more jobs to New Mexico. I’m loving doing this work, but it does mean Herrell has more time than me to fundraise. That’s where you come in. Your grassroots donations are powering this campaign, and giving me the time I need to get into the weeds on policy, block extremist legislation, and deliver for New Mexico. _I can’t thank you enough._ Talk soon, Gabe Vasquez [**P.S. If you didn’t have the chance to give before our fundraising deadline yesterday, we could still use your support! Even $5 helps. clean_body: | = Team, Wednesday was our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and you really showed up. I can’t thank you enough. Pundits are saying this will be one of, if not the , most competitive race of 2024. Every dollar we raise goes towards keeping this seat from falling back into the hands of far-right extremist Yvette Herrell who is already running against me in a rematch of last year’s tight race. Last year, Herrell spent over $4 million against me, but thanks to the support of this team, we kept up on fundraising and had a bigger base of volunteers to get us across the finish line. We ousted Herrell just 8 months ago, and she wasted no time — she’s already fundraising for our rematch. Now that I’m in Congress, I’m extremely busy working to deliver on my promises: real climate action, protecting reproductive rights, and bringing more jobs to New Mexico. I’m loving doing this work, but it does mean Herrell has more time than me to fundraise. That’s where you come in. Your grassroots donations are powering this campaign, and giving me the time I need to get into the weeds on policy, block extremist legislation, and deliver for New Mexico. I can’t thank you enough. Talk soon, Gabe Vasquez = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. body:

| | | | [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcFunEAMhp_G3FixNgzsgUNaRKVGitpDDzlFZsa7OwlmyDBou29fgdIeqlw_f_Zv2azz6M_3FuovgHj1bgFEoAdAfH--aVxf9fFbfnz6nb-bJ622In4FxHSf5Z_5MeQgyn7caN1lrmXDZ3GZtEfTVHVZkTll15aNYGUHezLN2TUojasLGhgdNZaFbOZbLJAKUyAilYgHQ1SdSlMSCVeGjlAWe9CBjzeOMQQ92KDZ2F5Tmpd9ox6wX8SuUQ48iQtpMwD70Q8S0z2_rBwdYP_KKkse3kTOknNKbN9yHfKgQP2a9GUJa7QC1H0iAppNUXF-VaBuC9iJZZ3ZXyagTocPliRuzi0CGtawTgmow-pvR5iS7GiyY948f39cfy5ziYDmZRq9A-r-g_ujqHuY6dePenZZbN188-PoF1NDWVz2-9igfwIAAP__RdiXxg)
[](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDBDmE4cNgW0UPVVaWqh55WGWJmsosJE0Kn8_YVaNtD1evnz_4t28oy-fHRQv0BEK_erYAI9ASItx93idurfP6Ul8-_8pt5lmov4kdATI-F_5rvQwoW66ed1l3mWmvsyC7jtjSnqtYVmSa7tqo-65MqR1PWJ42kR2bHSnPTNOVASme-RYWkjEJE0oiFIaoabTQR28pQCVodQYUt7zbGEKQYgmRTe01pWY-NesB-5WGLXNiZXUi7AdhP_swxPfLLZqMD7F-t8JqHN-aRc5uSHd5yOedBgPotycsatjgwUPcfEdDsirDzmwB1e8BBBiuL9ZcZqJPzO0scd-ceAY2VsM0JqMPqT0eYEx9oHqZ85Nuqf3a3L98Azcs8eQfU_QOPR1H3tND3r_Xisti65e6nya-mBq0ux32GIL8DAAD__7f9l2s)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcGOnDAMhp_G3EDgkLAcOGyL6KHSqmpVVe1lZRLPTHYxYUPQdN6-Ak17qPb6-bN_yyZZJn-6ddB8AMSLdysggnoExLefV4nbi3z-lFdPv_M38yR6L-JHQEy3hf-Z9yEFC_lpp02fuY4Mndhl3FXmQTe1VqbNLl2tsSStja6Y6pFaQ9hiY5TD0VZ2fMh8hyWq0pSIqGrEwiil29rUSjFpoyqoyyOooOpKMYYghQ2STd0lpWU9NhoAh5XtFrmgmV1IuwE4TH7kmG75eaPoAIcXEl7z8Mp84pxSIvuay5gHATVsSZ7XsEXLoPp3RECzK8LObwKq3wMOYkkW8ucZVC_jnSWOu3ONgIYkbHMC1aP-2xHmxAea7ZS34zcjJ_zx9RegeZ4n70D1_8HjUap_XNT3L83isti55eqnya-mgbo8H_exQf4EAAD__94FlrU)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcFunEAMhp_G3ECMDUP3wCENoodKUVW1qnqKzIzZnYRhyDBos29fgbY9VLl-_uzfstkvkxtvLTSfAfHi7AqIQA-A-Pb76uP24r9-ydXTe_6mn3y9F_ERENNtkX_mfUghnt2006bLbMuaR7GZtEp_qpuqJn3KLm3JqjGKVGlQuBRkO6JqtKKxGhTJKXMtlkilLhGRKsRCE9WnSldEwrUmBVV5BBWsrhxjCL4wwWdTe0lpWY-NesB-FbNFKXgWG9JuAPaTGySmW37eOFrA_oW9rHl4FRkl55TYvOZ-yIMH6rfkn9ewRSNA3QcioN4VL9ZtHqjbAw5i2C_szjNQ54c7SxJ35xoBNfuwzQmow_pvR5iTHGg2U_7IA_96x-_ND0D9PE_OAnX_weNR1D0s9PNbs9gstna5umlyq26gKs_HfUzwfwIAAP__FuyXAg)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcFunEAMhp_G3EBgw7AcOCRF9FApSqXm0FNkZszuJAxDhkHb7dNXoG0PVa6fP_u3bHbLZMdbC_UjIF6sWQER6AEQP35eXdje3LevafH0K_1QT67ai_gFEONtkX_mfUgmju2007pLTMuKRzGJtIU6VXVZkWqSS6u4qaTRUpUNDzIWhdEj1SdhXbAqmzKxLeZIucoRkUrETBFVTalKIuFKUQFlfgRlXFw5BO9dpr1LpvYS47IeG_WA_Sp6C5LxLMbH3QDsJztIiLf0vHEwgP0bO1lT_y4ySsoxsn5P3ZB6B9Rv0b2ufgtagLpPREC1K06M3RxQtwccRLNb2J5noM4NdxYl7M41ACp2fpsjUIfV3w4_RznQrKf0NPz4Pjy__H7c5dd5sgao-w8ej6LuYaGX53oxSWjNcrXTZFdVQ5mfj_to7_4EAAD__zGVmB4)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskbGOnEAMhp_GdCCwmQEKisshUpx0SpMi1Wl2xrs7d5hhh0GbffsIdEkRXfv5s3_LNrJM_vzoofkGiFfvVkAEegLE26-7xO1dXr7n1evv_KZfRe1FfAbE9Fj4n_k5pGAxftppM2SuN9qc2WXcV7pVTa1Id9m1Nwo1nqlRXWkrTVi3rXKtZtXYrnTGZr7HEqnUJSJSjVhoItXVuiZiozRVUJdHUGGqu4kxBClskGzqrykt67HRCDiubLfIhZnZhbQbgOPkTxzTI79sJjrA8d0Ir3n4YD5zblIy9iOXUx4EaNySvK1hi5aBhi9EQL0rws5vAjTsAQexRhbjLzPQIKdPljjuzj0CaiNhmxPQgOpvR5gTH2i2U94-3zb1Mt-6K6B-myfvgIb_4PEoGp4W-vmjWVwWe7fc_TT5VTdQl5fjPjbInwAAAP__k8aW1w)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskcFunEAMhp_G3EBgM8Ny4JAW0UPVqKrUQ07R7IzZnQQzZBi63bevQGkPVa6fP_u3bCPL5Md7B80nQLx6twIi0AMgvj3dJG4v8vVLXj3-zt_0o6i9iJ8BMd0X_me-DylYjJ922vSZ64w2I7uMu0qfVFMr0m127dpRuVPFXOmzdnXZNkpVdjzZuj2Z1lY68x2WSKUuEZFqxEITqbbWNREbpamCujyCClPdTIwhSGGDZFN3TWlZj40GwGFlu0UuzMwupN0AHCZ_5pju-WUz0QEOL0Z4zcMr88i5ScnY11zOeRCgYUvyvIYtWgbqPxAB9a4IO78JUL8HHMQaWYy_zEC9nN9Z4rg7twiojYRtTkA9qr8dYU58oNlOed38evqh78PlG6B-nifvgPr_4PEo6h8W-vm9WVwWO7fc_DT5VTdQl5fjPjbInwAAAP__HR2W7A)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxskbGOnEAMhp_GdCCwYdgtKC6HuCLSKkVSpDp5Z7y7c4cZbhi02bePQJcUUdrPn_1bNus8-sujg_YLIN68WwAR6AkQP37eNa5v-vUlr06_8g9z0mYr4jMgpscsf83PIYUo-3GjbZ-5jg1fxGXSVebQtHVD5pjduoocScmO6wse6Ei1PVdkmsaaA7K0ZeY7LJFKUyIi1YiFIWqOtamJhBtDFdTlHlRwdecYQ9DCBs3G7pbSvOwbDYDDInaNUvAkLqTNABxGf5aYHvl15egAhzdWWfLwLnKRnFNi-57rOQ8KNKxJX5ewRitA_X9EQLMpKs6vCtRvATuxrDP76wTU6_mTJYmbc4-AhjWsUwLqsfnTEaYkO5rsmH-vT4_p5Ur2GdC8TqN3QP0_cH8U9U8z_fjWzi6LnZvvfhz9Ylqoy-t-Hxv0dwAAAP__9SyW5g)**.

clean_body: 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. 14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. | | | | Dear Friend, Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt. You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have. In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me. It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and no one to stop me. Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned. Those 14 years were formative. When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle. I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership. Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. And leadership has a price.” I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded. In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me. And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up that will quickly pile up. As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that the cost will exceed $500,000. Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep. No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me. That’s where you come in. ? When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting! A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced. Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer. But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming. Friend, . And I’ll commit to you that I will NOT let you down. So please, . We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can. Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . and we cannot stop now! Respectfully, James O’Keefe P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, .

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Let’s put the rumors to rest once and for all.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2a503177f66a4a6a8e5cd1fd6646786a&_e=BV1C2rAJDV5IFZBJt6RUB-ZXa2Zn6A-7nQREJadWwspNoWqMgUb7X08rn5u_OgUM2KFFmf9bk7CpF93vXviCMf_wMRAYbg8iJ0C_wHLOD3JDbTnxMJjS25LM6IAeHf3ItrdOzSqL9Al88VrKHt7yqzvyFdHZcXR_OniRD3t3EzCo3h9Ry_aksq-W7XzifUVV73a_eNKI8c843MG2aGz0y4Wry8yAfT5HXDQ9rU06dXGOEnaLIj1Dex9Ls_WLTYcZo-sGbl5rQJbS2QXoUGimAJAoWCQhuzcDkIVtZ37hf0Z8tgmF2UmRoO7ZodSAmsmWUSihqKAV9MMcBKkPVZuDYEdUFzlz9KcdIozM125w_oiTCy0eD4288vwv6mgGtWMxJQnbS1waUJK5aaJKtFNb0Gnoodqf48eV5ppnTs-3Vd8%3D)
---

Friend,

Let me be blunt: we're facing a system that is increasingly antagonistic to Western values.

Joe Biden is taking the country in the wrong direction.

You know it, I know it, and the American people know it. They are already voting with their feet! It's why our population is booming in the free state of Florida.

_But I believe conservatives should refuse to retreat to Florida._

**Far from it: It 's time to play offense and take back our country from the woke ideology that threatens our nation's freedom. **

---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2a503177f66a4a6a8e5cd1fd6646786a&_e=BV1C2rAJDV5IFZBJt6RUB-ZXa2Zn6A-7nQREJadWwspNoWqMgUb7X08rn5u_OgUM2KFFmf9bk7CpF93vXviCMf_wMRAYbg8iJ0C_wHLOD3JDbTnxMJjS25LM6IAeHf3ItrdOzSqL9Al88VrKHt7yqzvyFdHZcXR_OniRD3t3EzCo3h9Ry_aksq-W7XzifUVV73a_eNKI8c843MG2aGz0y4Wry8yAfT5HXDQ9rU06dXGOEnaLIj1Dex9Ls_WLTYcZo-sGbl5rQJbS2QXoUGimAI-BlBon34tHoPzfEtwDv-jwDb_4TEUWs0Ryxoi6qpUKRHn5OMnG720HCfWywQ4FPyKvcCtqdrQyEUJ6PoUkLYvN6u5fL9peFcir343I62dS5n6JfKgCtyzsVZvYVriXAlYKFgznieP_Zf7ovAGzeFc%3D)
---

We need leadership in the executive branch--someone who can set a course and mobilize our country to get there.

That's exactly what I did in Florida. We've fought for freedom against the bureaucratic COVID regime and dangerous woke ideology...

And not only did that fight get us victory after victory on the policy front, it yielded a 20-point re-election at the ballot box.

Now, we need the courage to lead and the strength to win our whole country.

I'm running for President to lead our great American comeback because I believe freedom is worth fighting for. **[Will you fight alongside me?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2a503177f66a4a6a8e5cd1fd6646786a&_e=BV1C2rAJDV5IFZBJt6RUB-ZXa2Zn6A-7nQREJadWwspNoWqMgUb7X08rn5u_OgUM2KFFmf9bk7CpF93vXviCMf_wMRAYbg8iJ0C_wHLOD3JDbTnxMJjS25LM6IAeHf3ItrdOzSqL9Al88VrKHt7yqzvyFdHZcXR_OniRD3t3EzCo3h9Ry_aksq-W7XzifUVV73a_eNKI8c843MG2aGz0y4Wry8yAfT5HXDQ9rU06dXGOEnaLIj1Dex9Ls_WLTYcZo-sGbl5rQJbS2QXoUGimALSdFfoqFH1ZrNoBhSqZru6NLiuHFRGyA8mriIXFD3TF8EqQaWyCVoV-ZvJ1NHUlWK7wCtCHuD0ePBuYdWpwZbkmsC9E85dJduPOEE-Il8yCBL1IUCFi2_w5y2Pe0jcC-A936BjkLSpp0rUXCfgZdsk%3D "Will you fight alongside me?")**

---
| | [YES, I'M READY TO WIN](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2a503177f66a4a6a8e5cd1fd6646786a&_e=BV1C2rAJDV5IFZBJt6RUB-ZXa2Zn6A-7nQREJadWwspNoWqMgUb7X08rn5u_OgUM2KFFmf9bk7CpF93vXviCMf_wMRAYbg8iJ0C_wHLOD3JDbTnxMJjS25LM6IAeHf3ItrdOzSqL9Al88VrKHt7yqzvyFdHZcXR_OniRD3t3EzCo3h9Ry_aksq-W7XzifUVV73a_eNKI8c843MG2aGz0y4Wry8yAfT5HXDQ9rU06dXGOEnaLIj1Dex9Ls_WLTYcZo-sGbl5rQJbS2QXoUGimAGhcmpHvENf5ChQPk7sFKI8Dnwk5bz-XeywG0R2FR5eqKZvNoBmmk7T_rVNgrrie_lwEtc0lamXyrjijvhLbqFIPwPLPQeCjCH5Nhv9qc_zrMUi18-VbCshRiLv9Lre6u5lo-UR5YoMAZW8ZiLpkwAU%3D)
---

And we can win, Friend.

We can have an economy that works for working families, a secure border that works for our nation, and so much more. I'm excited to share my agenda for America with you throughout this campaign.

**But here 's why I'm writing you today, friend: [I want to ask you to become a Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2a503177f66a4a6a8e5cd1fd6646786a&_e=BV1C2rAJDV5IFZBJt6RUB-ZXa2Zn6A-7nQREJadWwspNoWqMgUb7X08rn5u_OgUM2KFFmf9bk7CpF93vXviCMf_wMRAYbg8iJ0C_wHLOD3JDbTnxMJjS25LM6IAeHf3ItrdOzSqL9Al88VrKHt7yqzvyFdHZcXR_OniRD3t3EzCo3h9Ry_aksq-W7XzifUVV73a_eNKI8c843MG2aGz0y4Wry8yAfT5HXDQ9rU06dXGOEnaLIj1Dex9Ls_WLTYcZo-sGbl5rQJbS2QXoUGimAErlpIzObU-edRDfvSpM93xM-KMyDjDSU0WHlTG2A18rYGnV6xGBgLQTnXIyQXakBjs94AibsnYi4xvHByeXbbMLVzftHAqM2bd4Zr3YGoRQikpPdi16M_r5IBgP20KsNjUw5pt_TMIJT0ZpgVno2Nw%3D "I want to ask you to become a Donor to my presidential campaign and join our first Team Teletownhall.")**

I promise you, unlike other campaigns, our grassroots fundraising program is built on the principle that our donors are a part of our team, not our personal piggybank.

_I vow to treat you with respect: No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies._

Can I count on you?
---

In Freedom,
Ron DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2a503177f66a4a6a8e5cd1fd6646786a&_e=BV1C2rAJDV5IFZBJt6RUB2f_qfTV6KdVMSe-uFnRbe-CybNCA2PAwmeBzm4t6xGLrR5Il9J24E5kUiOcQyhJ-6A9X5sxW73IeYWrDg1BUYixYBDhhB3aa3mGy1CKldwnOicfULu1T5i86Iew8Eb8UBO6UM4T-aVG20KffWgw29kMnMLckl8dY-LFzdECf7Op1wpx6TKHpNik8-quFnyxOA%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| I just wanted to share my thoughts with you regarding my “yes” vote on the bill to avoid a default on the nation’s debt.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=2396%2E5257348%2EkvYWkQ)
Hi, it’s Adam.
I just wanted to share my thoughts with you regarding my “yes” vote on the bill to avoid a default on the nation’s debt.
I voted to raise the U.S. government’s debt ceiling ahead of next week’s deadline. After that deadline, the Treasury Department would have run out of funding to pay our bills, and our government would be forced to default on its debt for the first time in history — likely triggering a global recession, millions of job losses, lost paychecks and Social Security payments.
Kevin McCarthy and Republicans in Congress were willing to hold our economy hostage as leverage for their demands, even if it meant plunging the nation into recession. That was reckless in the extreme.
President Biden negotiated an end to the economic hostage taking, and asked Congress to support a resolution of the stalemate, because a default would have hurt our most vulnerable citizens. I did.
The choice in front of us was defaulting on the U.S. government’s debt, or passing this bill. While there were elements of the bill I certainly didn’t like — it was a negotiation after all — it was certainly better than the alternative. And at the end of the day, **results are what matters, not rhetoric, and I wasn’t about to vote to tank the economy.**
While the bill has its flaws, I voted to stand with working families and protect us from a disastrous default that would have killed jobs and skyrocketed unemployment.
**[Watch my video to learn more about why I stood with President Biden at this critical time:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2318?t=4&akid=2396%2E5257348%2EkvYWkQ)**
[WATCH](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2318?t=5&akid=2396%2E5257348%2EkvYWkQ)
---
Thanks for watching. I’ll have more updates soon,
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1813?refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC60_20230602_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=2396%2E5257348%2EkvYWkQ)

---
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=2396%2E5257348%2EkvYWkQ) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=2396%2E5257348%2EkvYWkQ)**

Friend,
Every Republican elected official should be UNITED in outrage at what the Deep State has done to me and the America First movement.
**But sadly, some Republicans want to shy away from the topic, because they say they get tired of all the Deep State “drama.”**
Friend, the weaponization of the FBI is one of the single biggest threats to our free Republic.
My home has been raided. I was framed as a Russian asset. My family and associates have been intimidated. My private communications have been spied on. I’ve even been indicted and arrested – despite committing NO CRIME.
And it’s not _just_ me... Everyday, hardworking, freedom-loving patriots are also being targeted for holding views that go against the Deep State.
**That’s not _“drama.”_ That’s a declaration of war on everything we value as Americans.**
_If these politicians get fatigued from a bit of “drama,” then the Deep State will eat them alive. They will not rise to the challenge to defend our Republic, and most importantly, defend YOU._
But even though the Deep State has put me through hell, I am ready to do it again! Because I love our country, and I will _NEVER_ let it get destroyed.
_It’s no surprise that we’re leading the primary by 50 POINTS. Voters know that during these dark times, we need courage – not cowardice – in the White House._
The time has now come to solidify our lead so that we can turn our focus 100% to beating Crooked Joe Biden and DISMANTLING the Deep State.
Let’s finish the job we started, dismantle the Deep State, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

We're running a petition to show lawmakers where Americans stand, but time is running out before our midnight deadline, and we're still missing the 2,271 responses we need to hit critical mass: | | | | | | | | | | | | | From taking down Trump in 2020 to expanding the Senate majority in 2022, American Bridge is working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them by making sure Democrats around the country are elected up and down the ballot. A monthly donation is the most impactful way to power our critical work. Please, will you make a monthly recurring donation right now? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

To break through this crowded primary, he’s going to need a strong showing of support from people like you, Peter. From Cherelle Parker in Philadelphia, to Brandon Johnson in Chicago, and even Karen Bass in Los Angeles, it’s more clear than ever, Peter: Our endorsed mayoral candidates win. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Clay Middleton and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. Friend,

We're excited to say that — thanks to grassroots supporters like you — we beat our monthly fundraising goal. We're now able to invest in our field outreach for June at an even greater pace than planned!

This means we'll be able to have more conversations _sooner_ with folks in VA-10 about Jennifer's work on healthcare, infrastructure, transit, the environment, and reproductive rights. As always, It's through these conversations that we build the blocks for victory next year.

So, from all of us on Team Wexton, we wanted to **thank you** again for all of your support over the past month. You're what makes our movement possible, and Jennifer is looking forward to all we can accomplish together in the weeks and months ahead.

— Team Wexton

P.S. At the end of this month, we'll be facing our next public FEC filing deadline. All eyes will be on the numbers we raise, so we're going to work hard all throughout June to ensure that we meet our goals. [**Can you help us get an early start today by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64253239/409467542/-772585877?refcode=EM_C_230602TY_N_TW_FULL_5_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmRiMjEyYS05ZDAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxvyy4GdmSJNIMTDSL8wKlOtSp3zPJXyGek8-Bub-t8=) | **Rep. “ _**Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and the Democrats have seen the polls that show Jim Justice winning this race, and they're panicking. So now the Biden Justice Department has decided to play politics. We will see a lot more of this as the Democrats work to help Alex Mooney because they know they can easily beat him**." - Roman Stauffer, Campaign Manager, Jim Justice for U.S. Senate_”
Peter:

This week, **a poll was released showing me as the clear favorite in the 2024 U.S. Senate race in West Virginia. Head-to-head, I beat Democrat Joe Manchin – no questions asked**.

However, the same poll found **my Republican primary opponent and Sen. Joe Manchin TIED in a 1:1 matchup**. You read that right. Should I become the nominee, Republicans win. If my Republican primary opponent becomes the nominee, **Democrats have a better than 50% shot at keeping this Senate seat.**

_First, the Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee sued my office, seeking access to my records._

_**Biden’s Department of Justice is now SUING my family-owned businesses to tarnish my standing in West Virginia**_.

**None of this is a coincidence.**

**[I need YOUR help to fight back.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd78674e125b4e56823f64dd130b4c4e&_e=lXy2-3NfR7ayjNzMCp_GmqiuO8f3HVhKwsg5gxwrspDSWcbUGXQierXVmp5Ge3vKIF-HyeQF4u141DlyN89r-U6YJPj7tkPysFUoQdV1kfxWWVxmn22_xfx-07iISei0zIh6640LvWizXPcfkQtVn-bBJS0vIGlCQjLXoD_Bo9hblDTXi5zqdqGWC1z2KTvmPtkaMK3pPrdv6BWvHrLJTWqQtCTI5hcCPAZSqZoI6JX2gv4pWkbXpz-Phzic5KCelT9Lx-6anFwO9OUJFByQoblb3ATkjd5W5rFhSH6JF4SNE-kdqY7R3Vc4PFVSlpD-rYFGD3cTN9RRmcupctsZUmRWXA2cSawzhknbxFkn81LFCW2JCidYLuab7Y7Mrx0bH4caFsqKjvisKdsXWdXbAA%3D%3D)** If Democrats in D.C. are allowed to get away with this stunt, the chances of Republicans flipping this critical Senate seat _**evaporate**_.

[** chip in $5 **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fd78674e125b4e56823f64dd130b4c4e&_e=lXy2-3NfR7ayjNzMCp_GmqiuO8f3HVhKwsg5gxwrspDSWcbUGXQierXVmp5Ge3vKIF-HyeQF4u141DlyN89r-U6YJPj7tkPysFUoQdV1kfxWWVxmn22_xfx-07iISei0zIh6640LvWizXPcfkQtVn-bBJS0vIGlCQjLXoD_Bo9hblDTXi5zqdqGWC1z2KTvmPtkaMK3pPrdv6BWvHrLJTWqQtCTI5hcCPAZSqZoI6JX2gv4pWkbXpz-Phzic5KCewZ5-Ks0zz5FjlUqLhJhoFJmMeQnsVqLWH5PTeaOYyH-j1cOIABF-Mm32aIRelydIecqLMCMIQC0qF_e9fJnqpvnthUY1dQZlDBTzNuP5eY7cj-YeWqT64xsTICTNuA426MnPbgRizbmxf4dOCtk-yA%3D%3D)

The poll released this week proves that. Democrats know that I am the only Republican who can beat Joe Manchin, so they’re going to extreme lengths to ruin my good name and prop up my opponent at the same time.

**Less than 24 hours after the poll's release showing that I’m the only Republican in West Virginia who can beat Joe Manchin, I’m being sued by the crooked Biden Justice Department.**

**WILD STUFF.**

body:
Pride Month is about recognizing how far we’ve come, and how far we have left to go. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64253282/409467894/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230602_f_pridemonth1_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MmY4NTU4OS05ZTAxLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WsuBJ4aAIaUqKa-ANKVdMxdN5a-aTYIfTA7qColxwhU=&emci=91f85589-9e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=92f85589-9e01-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | It’s Pride Month, y’all! 🏳️🌈 Pride Month is about honoring the LGBTQ+ trail blazers who have bravely fought for our rights throughout history. It’s about celebrating the joy, authenticity, and freedom that every LGBTQ+ person deserves. It’s about recognizing how far we’ve come, and how far we have left to go. Don’t forget, Pride began as a protest. This year, we’ve seen GOP extremists wage relentless attacks on LGBTQ+ folks across the country — breaking records for the sheer quantity of legislation introduced. This unprecedented wave of legislation challenges LGBTQ+ peoples’ basic right to exist, from banning gender-affirming care for trans youth, to criminalizing drag performances, to permitting the intentional deadnaming or misgendering of trans and nonbinary students. **We’re only halfway through the year, and GOP extremists have already introduced more anti-LGBTQ+ bills in state houses than in each of the previous five years. Take a look for yourself:** | Year-to-Date Snapshot: 2023 Anti-LGBTQ+ State Legislative Activity
* **Over 520** anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced in state legislatures, a record;
* **Over 220** bills specifically target transgender and non-binary people, also a record; and
* **A record 70** anti-LGBTQ laws have been enacted so far this year, including:
* Laws banning gender affirming care for transgender youth: **15**
* Laws requiring or allowing misgendering of transgender students: **7**
* Laws targeting drag performances: **2**
* Laws creating a license to discriminate: **3**
* Laws censoring school curriculum, including books: **4**

_Human Rights Campaign, Roundup of Anti-LGBTQ+ Legislation Advancing In States Across the Country, May 23, 2023_
---
The truth is: When we have the freedom to make our voices heard at the ballot box, we have more power to protect LGBTQ+ rights and stop anti-LGBTQ+ extremism. We can elect leaders who will use their voices to fight for the LGBTQ+ community, and we can unseat the extremists who aim to do the exact opposite.
[_**That’s exactly why we’re supporting the Human Rights Campaign (HRC), as they lead the charge to defeat discriminatory LGBTQ+ legislation and elect a wave of pro-equality lawmakers. clean_body: Pride Month is about recognizing how far we’ve come, and how far we have left to go. | | | It’s Pride Month, y’all! 🏳️🌈 Pride Month is about honoring the LGBTQ+ trail blazers who have bravely fought for our rights throughout history. It’s about celebrating the joy, authenticity, and freedom that every LGBTQ+ person deserves. It’s about recognizing how far we’ve come, and how far we have left to go. Don’t forget, Pride began as a protest. This year, we’ve seen GOP extremists wage relentless attacks on LGBTQ+ folks across the country — breaking records for the sheer quantity of legislation introduced. This unprecedented wave of legislation challenges LGBTQ+ peoples’ basic right to exist, from banning gender-affirming care for trans youth, to criminalizing drag performances, to permitting the intentional deadnaming or misgendering of trans and nonbinary students. We’re only halfway through the year, and GOP extremists have already introduced more anti-LGBTQ+ bills in state houses than in each of the previous five years. Take a look for yourself: | Year-to-Date Snapshot: 2023 Anti-LGBTQ+ State Legislative Activity Over 520 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced in state legislatures, a record; Over 220 bills specifically target transgender and non-binary people, also a record; and A record 70 anti-LGBTQ laws have been enacted so far this year, including: Laws banning gender affirming care for transgender youth: 15 Laws requiring or allowing misgendering of transgender students: 7 Laws targeting drag performances: 2 Laws creating a license to discriminate: 3 Laws censoring school curriculum, including books: 4 Human Rights Campaign, Roundup of Anti-LGBTQ+ Legislation Advancing In States Across the Country, May 23, 2023 The truth is: When we have the freedom to make our voices heard at the ballot box, we have more power to protect LGBTQ+ rights and stop anti-LGBTQ+ extremism. We can elect leaders who will use their voices to fight for the LGBTQ+ community, and we can unseat the extremists who aim to do the exact opposite. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Human Rights Campaign and Fair Fight will process automatically: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- To our LGBTQ+ family reading this — we’re sending you extra love this Pride Month! 💜 The Fair Fight Team | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2023 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Tune in to 'The Warrior Class' Saturday June 3rd
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
The Untold Stories of America's Heroes
Tune In Saturday, June 3rd
Fox Local Stations will be airing The Warrior Class tomorrow at varying times in select markets (check below for your local Fox time).
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=imYlslUGPvw [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=imYlslUGPvw]
This weekend, on Saturday, June 3rd, ‘The Warrior Class’ episode one––and in select markets episode two––is airing on Fox Stations nationally.
In episode one, airing this weekend, Former Army Secretary and Congressman Patrick Murphy takes audiences behind the scenes as he and the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Mark Milley, bring to life the toll of supporting and defending the US Constitution against all enemies during the longest wars in American history, and how we can never forget the losses of those who gave the ultimate sacrifice.
In episode two, Murphy visits with Army Ranger and Former Johnson & Johnson CEO Alex Gorsky. They discuss why mental health and a growth mentality are imperative to success. Later, he meets up with a front-line healthcare worker who utilized their military training during the COVID pandemic.
The Warrior Class will air in the following select markets
Saturday June 3rd
San Francisco, KTVU+, 6:30 p.m., Episode 1
Philadelphia, FOX, 3:00 p.m., Episode 1 and Episode 2
Sunday June 4th
Los Angeles, FOX, 5:30 p.m., Episode 1
Seattle, FOX, 9:00 a.m., Episode 1
Phoenix, KUPT+ , 5:00 p.m., Episode 1
About the Host:
Having served in combat, the U.S. Congress, and the Pentagon, the Honorable Patrick J. Murphy is one of the country’s top vetrepreneurs, owning over 60 companies while devoting time to teaching at the Wharton School of Business. The series builds on Murphy’s longtime advocacy for veterans, his efforts to end the Iraq and Afghanistan Wars, and his work to pass a Post-9/11 GI bill for the 250,000 active troops that become veterans every year during his service in Congress.
About the show:
‘The Warrior Class” uncovers the military’s distinct American story at a time when the civilian-military divide is bigger than ever before. The program closes that gap with in-depth storytelling and never-before-heard accounts from top business, political, and professional leaders of today. Murphy’s passion for telling the untold stories of his brother and sister veterans jumps out from the screen with every episode.
Murphy is named after Army Specialist Patrick Ward, who earned the Silver Star while saving others in Vietnam, giving our nation the ultimate sacrifice. Excitingly, the docuseries touches on what it means to serve with interviews with some of the most widely-recognized veterans in the nation, including Chairman Mark Milley, Maryland Governor Wes Moore, U.S. Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg, and Army Ranger and former Johnson & Johnson CEO Alex Gorsky. The airing of ‘The Warrior Class’ follows Muphy’s Emmy-award-winning production of NBC’s Side by Side: The Hero Nurses of COVID .
Secretary Patrick J. Murphy is available for live interviews to talk about the Warrior Class, Memorial Day and give a preview of the great American leaders he’s interviewed for ‘The Warrior Class.’
The Warrior Class is produced and brought to life by Patrick Murphy, Dan Kunze, Ericha Rubach, and EMME Solutions.
Click Here to View The Warrior Class Website [https://www.revolutionarygrowthpartners.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyPA [https://www.facebook.com/PatrickMurphyPA] https://twitter.com/https:/PatrickMurphyPA [https://twitter.com/https:/PatrickMurphyPA] https://instagram.com/patrickmurphypa [https://instagram.com/patrickmurphypa] https://www.linkedin.com/patrickmurphypa [https://www.linkedin.com/patrickmurphypa]
